idea_spark.risk: 模型复杂度较高，实际部署时需考虑计算开销和通信带宽限制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从通信网络配置出发设计状态校正机制，为处理现实世界中的异步和噪声数据提供了新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a distributed encoded corrective double deep Q-network framework for heterogeneous multi-agent systems under communication delay and noise.
en.motivation: Existing methods assume noise-free and delay-free global states, ignoring communication asynchrony, delay, and link noise that affect state reconstruction.
en.method: Designs a message-passing mechanism explicitly modeling communication sampling asynchrony, delay, and link noise, uses a shared encoder to couple actor-critic networks, and employs double Q-networks to mitigate overestimation bias.
en.result: Outperforms various baselines in multiple test cases and provides a numerical regret analysis.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to design robust multi-agent control policies in communication-constrained environments.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly modeling communication noise and delay as part of state correction may inspire more general robust reinforcement learning frameworks.
idea_spark.risk: High model complexity may incur computational overhead and communication bandwidth limitations in deployment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Designing state correction mechanisms based on network configuration offers a new perspective for handling asynchronous and noisy data in real-world applications.

papers.title: Selective Safety Steering via Value-Filtered Decoding
papers.summary: While large language models (LLMs) are trained to align with human values, their generations may still violate safety constraints. A growing line of work addresses this problem by modifying the model's sampling policy at decoding time using a safety reward. However, existing decoding-time steering methods often intervene unnecessarily, modifying generations that would have been safe under the base model. Such unnecessary interventions are undesirable, as they can distort key properties of the base model such as helpfulness, fluency, style, and coherence. We propose a new test-time steering method designed to reduce such unnecessary interventions while improving the safety of unsafe responses. Our approach filters tokens using a value-based safety criterion and provides an explicit bound on the probability of false interventions. A single threshold hyperparameter controls this bound, allowing practitioners to trade off higher rates of unnecessary intervention for better output safety. Across multiple datasets and experiments, we show that our value-filtered decoding method outperforms existing baselines, achieving better trade-offs between safety, helpfulness, and similarity to the base model.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于价值过滤的解码方法，在解码时选择性干预，减少不必要的安全干预，同时提升不安全响应的安全性。
ai.motivation: 现有解码时安全干预方法常对原本安全的生成进行不必要修改，损害模型的帮助性、流畅性和风格一致性。
ai.method: 使用基于价值的安全准则过滤令牌，并给出虚假干预概率的显式上界，通过单一阈值超参数控制干预率与安全性的权衡。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上，该方法优于现有基线，在安全性、帮助性和与基础模型相似性之间取得更好平衡。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不牺牲模型原有能力的前提下，通过解码时选择性干预提升LLM的安全性。

idea_spark.idea: 将价值过滤与动态阈值调整结合，根据上下文风险自适应调节干预强度。
idea_spark.risk: 阈值设定可能过于保守或激进，导致安全覆盖不足或过度干预。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受统计假设检验中控制错误发现率的启发，将安全干预视为假设检验问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受统计假设检验中控制错误发现率的启发，将安全干预视为假设检验问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a value-filtered decoding method that selectively intervenes at decoding time to reduce unnecessary safety interventions while improving safety of unsafe responses.
en.motivation: Existing decoding-time safety steering methods often unnecessarily modify safe generations, harming helpfulness, fluency, and style consistency.
en.method: Filters tokens using a value-based safety criterion with an explicit bound on false intervention probability, controlled by a single threshold hyperparameter.
en.result: Outperforms baselines across multiple datasets, achieving better trade-offs between safety, helpfulness, and similarity to the base model.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to improve LLM safety via selective decoding-time intervention without sacrificing core model capabilities.

idea_spark.idea: Combine value filtering with dynamic threshold adjustment to adapt intervention strength based on contextual risk.
idea_spark.risk: Threshold setting may be too conservative or aggressive, leading to insufficient safety coverage or excessive intervention.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by controlling false discovery rate in statistical hypothesis testing, framing safety intervention as a hypothesis testing problem.

papers.title: Stochastic global optimization of continuous functions via random walks on Grassmannians
papers.summary: We introduce a stochastic global optimization method based on random walks on Grassmannian manifolds. To minimize a continuous objective $\ell:\mathbb{R}^d\rightarrow\mathbb{R}$, the method repeatedly samples random $k$-dimensional linear subspaces (with $k\ll d$), solves the resulting low-dimensional restrictions of these problems to these subspaces using an arbitrary black-box optimizer, and updates the iterate (which monotonically improves upon the previous iterate). Unlike classical optimization analyses that rely on convexity, smoothness, Lipschitz bounds, or Polyak-Lojasiewicz-type conditions, our convergence guarantees depend only on the geometric distribution of restricted minima across the $k$-dimensional subspaces passing through a given point in $\mathbb{R}^d$. We identify a gap parameter -- an analogue of a spectral gap for random walks -- that controls the rate at which the iterates approach the global minimum value. Finally, we argue that the same analysis yields a blind-spot robustness property: sufficiently narrow, deep dips of the loss function (small-measure regions where $\ell$ spikes downward) have limited influence on the algorithm's trajectory, since they are unlikely to be encountered by random subspace sampling.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于格拉斯曼流形随机游走的随机全局优化方法，通过反复采样低维子空间并求解其上的限制问题来逼近全局最小值。
ai.motivation: 传统优化分析依赖凸性、光滑性等条件，而实际目标函数往往不满足这些假设，需要一种仅依赖几何分布的全局优化方法。
ai.method: 每次迭代随机采样一个k维线性子空间（k远小于d），在该子空间上使用任意黑盒优化器求解限制问题，并单调更新当前迭代点。
ai.result: 收敛速度由间隙参数（类似谱间隙）控制，且算法具有盲点鲁棒性：窄而深的局部极小值对轨迹影响有限。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种不依赖凸性假设的全局优化框架，适用于高维非凸连续函数的最小化。

idea_spark.idea: 利用格拉斯曼流形上的随机游走探索低维子空间，结合黑盒优化器实现全局搜索。
idea_spark.risk: 间隙参数可能难以计算或估计，且子空间维度k的选择对性能敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将随机游走与流形几何结合，为高维优化提供新的理论分析工具。

zh.tldr: 提出一种基于格拉斯曼流形随机游走的随机全局优化方法，通过反复采样低维子空间并求解其上的限制问题来逼近全局最小值。
zh.motivation: 传统优化分析依赖凸性、光滑性等条件，而实际目标函数往往不满足这些假设，需要一种仅依赖几何分布的全局优化方法。
zh.method: 每次迭代随机采样一个k维线性子空间（k远小于d），在该子空间上使用任意黑盒优化器求解限制问题，并单调更新当前迭代点。
zh.result: 收敛速度由间隙参数（类似谱间隙）控制，且算法具有盲点鲁棒性：窄而深的局部极小值对轨迹影响有限。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种不依赖凸性假设的全局优化框架，适用于高维非凸连续函数的最小化。

idea_spark.idea: 利用格拉斯曼流形上的随机游走探索低维子空间，结合黑盒优化器实现全局搜索。
idea_spark.risk: 间隙参数可能难以计算或估计，且子空间维度k的选择对性能敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将随机游走与流形几何结合，为高维优化提供新的理论分析工具。

en.tldr: Introduces a stochastic global optimization method using random walks on Grassmannian manifolds, sampling low-dimensional subspaces and solving restricted problems to approach the global minimum.
en.motivation: Classical analyses rely on convexity, smoothness, etc., but real objectives often violate these; a method depending only on geometric distribution is needed.
en.method: At each iteration, randomly sample a k-dimensional linear subspace (k << d), solve the restricted problem on it with any black-box optimizer, and monotonically update the iterate.
en.result: Convergence rate is controlled by a gap parameter (analogous to spectral gap), and the algorithm exhibits blind-spot robustness: narrow deep dips have limited influence.
en.help_to_user: Provides a global optimization framework without convexity assumptions, suitable for high-dimensional non-convex continuous functions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine random walks on Grassmannians with black-box optimizers to explore low-dimensional subspaces for global search.
idea_spark.risk: The gap parameter may be hard to compute, and the choice of subspace dimension k is performance-sensitive.
idea_spark.inspiration: Merging random walks with manifold geometry offers new theoretical tools for high-dimensional optimization.

papers.title: Double Metric Learning for Building Directed Graphs with Chain Connections for the ATLAS ITk Detector
papers.summary: Graph construction is an essential step in the Graph Neural Network (GNN) based tracking pipelines. The goal of the graph construction is to construct a graph that contains only the defined true edge connections between nodes (detector hits). A promising approach for the graph construction is through the Metric Learning approach, where a node representation in an embedding space is learned, and nodes are connected according to their distance in the embedding space. The loss function for the metric learning in this case is a contrastive loss encouraging the true pairs of nodes to be close to each other, and pulling away the false pairs of nodes. This approach presents a conflict of the learning objective for the hopping connections when a true edge is defined as a chain connection in a particle track. To address the conflict for this case, we propose a ``Double Metric Learning'' approach, where two node representations are learned. A directed graph can then be constructed based on the distance between the two representations from two nodes respectively. We test this idea with the ATLAS ITk detector at the HL-LHC using the ATLAS ITk simulation and show better graph construction performance particularly for particles with high transverse momentum compared to the Simple Metric Learning approach. We also show that Double Metric Learning is able to accurately predict edge direction.

ai.tldr: 提出双度量学习方法，为ATLAS ITk探测器构建带链式连接的有向图，解决传统度量学习中跳跃连接的学习冲突。
ai.motivation: 在基于图神经网络的粒子跟踪中，图构建是关键步骤。传统度量学习使用对比损失，但链式连接的真实边定义导致跳跃连接的学习目标冲突。
ai.method: 学习两种节点表示，根据两个节点各自表示之间的距离构建有向图，从而解决链式连接中的学习冲突。
ai.result: 在ATLAS ITk模拟中，双度量学习相比简单度量学习，对高横向动量粒子的图构建性能更好，并能准确预测边的方向。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种改进图构建的方法，特别适用于需要处理链式连接和方向预测的粒子跟踪任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将双度量学习与注意力机制结合，让模型自动学习不同连接类型的重要性权重。
idea_spark.risk: 双表示学习可能增加模型复杂度和训练难度，需要更多调参和计算资源。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受链式连接中学习冲突的启发，想到用双表示分别编码节点在链中的不同角色（如前驱/后继）。

idea_spark.risk: 双表示学习可能增加模型复杂度和训练难度，需要更多调参和计算资源。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受链式连接中学习冲突的启发，想到用双表示分别编码节点在链中的不同角色（如前驱/后继）。

en.tldr: Proposes Double Metric Learning to build directed graphs with chain connections for the ATLAS ITk detector, resolving the learning conflict for hopping connections in traditional metric learning.
en.motivation: Graph construction is critical in GNN-based tracking. Traditional contrastive metric learning conflicts with chain-defined true edges due to hopping connections.
en.method: Learns two node representations and constructs a directed graph based on distances between the two representations from two nodes.
en.result: In ATLAS ITk simulation, Double Metric Learning outperforms Simple Metric Learning for high transverse momentum particles and accurately predicts edge direction.
en.help_to_user: Provides an improved graph construction method for particle tracking tasks involving chain connections and direction prediction.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Double Metric Learning with attention mechanisms to let the model automatically weigh the importance of different connection types.
idea_spark.risk: Dual representation learning may increase model complexity and training difficulty, requiring more hyperparameter tuning and computational resources.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the learning conflict in chain connections, the idea of using dual representations to encode different roles (e.g., predecessor/successor) in the chain emerged.

papers.title: SliceGraph: Mapping Process Isomers in Multi-Run Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
papers.summary: Multi-run chain-of-thought reasoning is usually collapsed to final-answer aggregates, which discard howsampled trajectories share, split, and rejoin through intermediate computation. We propose SliceGraph, a post-hoc problem-model-cell graph built by mutual-kNN over sparse activation-key Jaccard similarity between CoT slices, and treat it as a measurement object for process geometry rather than as a decoding program. Across sampled CoT ensembles from three primary 4B/8B models on math and science benchmarks, blinded annotation supports SliceGraph biconnected components as shared reasoning-state units and process families as within-family strategy-coherent route units. In 85.5% of 954 problem-model cells, correct CoTs sharing the same normalized answer split into multiple process families; among cells with at least two such runs, 76.6% of run pairs are cross-family on average. We call such same-answer, family-divergent correct trajectories process isomers. A label-seeded reward field provides a separate value-landscape layer: success-associated regions often split into disconnected high-value cores, and route families specialize over these core footprints rather than merely duplicating one another. A typed-state transition analysis further shows that process families navigate the same atlas with distinct transition kernels under matched null controls. Representation ablations, a cross-architecture replication, and two cross-scale replications support the robustness of the route-family scaffold, showing that final-answer aggregation overlooks this structured multi-route process geometry.

ai.tldr: 提出SliceGraph，通过互KNN和Jaccard相似性构建多轮思维链推理的过程图，发现相同正确答案的轨迹可分成多个过程家族（过程异构体），最终答案聚合会丢失这种结构化多路径几何。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将多轮思维链推理坍缩为最终答案聚合，丢弃了中间计算中轨迹如何共享、分裂和合并的结构信息。
ai.method: 基于互KNN和稀疏激活键Jaccard相似性构建后验问题-模型-单元图（SliceGraph），识别双连通分量作为共享推理状态单元，过程家族作为策略一致的路径单元。
ai.result: 在954个问题-模型单元中，85.5%的正确轨迹（相同归一化答案）分裂为多个过程家族；平均76.6%的轨迹对跨家族。标签种子奖励场显示成功区域分裂为不连通的高值核心，过程家族在这些核心足迹上特化。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解LLM推理过程中存在多条策略不同的正确路径，避免仅依赖最终答案聚合而忽略过程几何。

idea_spark.idea: 利用过程家族标签训练一个过程级奖励模型，引导模型在推理时探索更多样化的策略路径。
idea_spark.risk: 过程家族划分可能依赖超参数（如kNN的k值），不同设置下结果可能不稳定；计算开销随轨迹数量增加而增大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受化学中异构体概念启发，将相同答案但不同推理路径视为过程异构体，为模型可解释性和多样性提供新视角。

zh.tldr: 提出SliceGraph，通过互KNN和Jaccard相似性构建多轮思维链推理的过程图，发现相同正确答案的轨迹可分成多个过程家族（过程异构体），最终答案聚合会丢失这种结构化多路径几何。

idea_spark.idea: 利用过程家族标签训练一个过程级奖励模型，引导模型在推理时探索更多样化的策略路径。
idea_spark.risk: 过程家族划分可能依赖超参数（如kNN的k值），不同设置下结果可能不稳定；计算开销随轨迹数量增加而增大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受化学中异构体概念启发，将相同答案但不同推理路径视为过程异构体，为模型可解释性和多样性提供新视角。

en.tldr: Proposes SliceGraph, a post-hoc graph built by mutual-kNN and Jaccard similarity over CoT slices, revealing that correct trajectories with the same answer split into multiple process families (process isomers), which final-answer aggregation overlooks.
en.motivation: Current methods collapse multi-run chain-of-thought reasoning into final-answer aggregates, discarding how trajectories share, split, and rejoin through intermediate computation.
en.method: Constructs a problem-model-cell graph (SliceGraph) via mutual-kNN on sparse activation-key Jaccard similarity, identifying biconnected components as shared reasoning-state units and process families as strategy-coherent route units.
en.result: In 85.5% of 954 problem-model cells, correct CoTs with the same normalized answer split into multiple process families; 76.6% of run pairs are cross-family on average. Label-seeded reward fields show success regions split into disconnected high-value cores, with route families specializing over these footprints.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand that LLM reasoning contains multiple distinct correct paths, avoiding reliance on final-answer aggregation that loses process geometry.

idea_spark.idea: Train a process-level reward model using process family labels to encourage exploration of diverse strategy paths during inference.
idea_spark.risk: Process family partitioning may depend on hyperparameters (e.g., k in kNN), leading to instability; computational cost grows with trajectory count.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by chemical isomers, treating same-answer but different reasoning paths as process isomers offers a new perspective for model interpretability and diversity.

papers.title: A study of variational single solitary waves governed by the conservative-extended KdV equation with applications to shallow water dispersive shocks
papers.summary: The extended KdV equation is a nonlinear dispersive wave model that is asymptotically or variationally derived from the full dispersive Euler shallow water waves equations when gravity-capillary and higher order nonlinear effects are taken into account, under weakly nonlinear and long-wave approximations. This reduction introduces four additional terms beyond the classical KdV equation: a nonlinear term (quadratic nonlinearity), two nonlinear-dispersive terms, and a fully dispersive term (fifth order dispersion). In this paper, we employ a variational approach based on averaged Lagrangians to analyze the accuracy of single solitary wave solutions governed by a particular extended KdV equation where energy conservation is a key feature. Compared with solitary wave solutions previously obtained through higher order asymptotics and algebraic methods, the present variational solutions are notably simpler and more readily applicable to practical problems. The solitary wave solutions obtained through this method are then systematically compared with direct numerical simulations, and the corresponding results are critically discussed. We further demonstrate the applicability of these single solitary waves to problems in the field of non-convex dispersive hydrodynamics. These problems include shallow water classical undular bores, commonly known as dispersive shock waves, and non-classical (resonant) dispersive shocks which are additionally analyzed using the concept of Whitham shocks. Theoretical predictions show excellent agreement with numerical simulations.

ai.tldr: 本文采用基于平均拉格朗日量的变分方法，研究保守扩展KdV方程的单孤立波解，并将其应用于浅水色散激波问题。
ai.motivation: 经典KdV方程无法完全描述重力-毛细效应和高阶非线性效应，扩展KdV方程虽更精确但求解复杂，需要更简便的解析方法。
ai.method: 利用平均拉格朗日量的变分法推导单孤立波近似解，并与高阶渐近解、代数解及直接数值模拟进行系统比较。
ai.result: 变分解形式简单、易于应用，在非凸色散流体力学问题（如经典和非经典色散激波）中与数值模拟高度吻合。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种简化扩展KdV方程孤立波求解的变分框架，便于工程和物理中的快速预测。

idea_spark.idea: 将变分孤立波解作为初始条件，研究多孤立波相互作用或随机扰动下的稳定性。
idea_spark.risk: 变分近似在强非线性或强色散区域可能失效，需验证适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合Whitham激波理论，变分解可用于设计浅水波控制或能量收集装置。

zh.tldr: 本文采用基于平均拉格朗日量的变分方法，研究保守扩展KdV方程的单孤立波解，并将其应用于浅水色散激波问题。
zh.motivation: 经典KdV方程无法完全描述重力-毛细效应和高阶非线性效应，扩展KdV方程虽更精确但求解复杂，需要更简便的解析方法。

idea_spark.risk: 变分近似在强非线性或强色散区域可能失效，需验证适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合Whitham激波理论，变分解可用于设计浅水波控制或能量收集装置。

en.tldr: This paper uses a variational approach based on averaged Lagrangians to study single solitary wave solutions of the conservative extended KdV equation and applies them to shallow water dispersive shocks.
en.motivation: The classical KdV equation cannot fully capture gravity-capillary and higher-order nonlinear effects; the extended KdV equation is more accurate but solving it is complex, motivating a simpler analytical method.
en.method: A variational method with averaged Lagrangians derives approximate single solitary wave solutions, systematically compared with higher-order asymptotic solutions, algebraic methods, and direct numerical simulations.
en.result: The variational solutions are notably simpler and more applicable, showing excellent agreement with numerical simulations in non-convex dispersive hydrodynamics problems, including classical and non-classical dispersive shocks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simplified variational framework for solving solitary waves of the extended KdV equation, enabling fast predictions in engineering and physics.

idea_spark.idea: Use variational solitary wave solutions as initial conditions to study multi-soliton interactions or stability under random perturbations.
idea_spark.risk: The variational approximation may break down under strong nonlinearity or strong dispersion; its validity range needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combined with Whitham shock theory, variational solutions could guide shallow water wave control or energy harvesting devices.

papers.title: A tree-free approach to 3D Yang-Mills Langevin dynamic. Analytic estimates and the existence of a model for a regularity structure
papers.summary: Using the multi-index approach to regularity structures due to F. Otto et al., we construct a regularity structure and a model for it associated to the stochastic Langevin equation for the 3D Euclidean Yang-Mills functional. For the model we also obtain global stochastic and global pointwise weighted Besov type estimates which hold almost surely. The model is defined as a limit of a sequence of smooth models introduced with the help of a mollified noise. When the mollification is removed the sequence converges in a certain topology defined with the help of the stochastic estimates. To obtain these results we develop the multi-index approach for systems of equations with vector-valued white noises. This project is motivated by the problem for constructing 3D Euclidean Yang-Mills measure and by the earlier results of the author on the related problem of canonical quantization of the Yang-Mills field on the Minkowski space.

ai.tldr: 利用多指标方法构造了三维杨-米尔斯朗之万方程的规则结构及其模型，并获得了全局随机和点态加权贝索夫估计。
ai.motivation: 构造三维欧几里得杨-米尔斯测度，以及闵可夫斯基空间上杨-米尔斯场的正则量子化问题。
ai.method: 采用F. Otto等人的多指标规则结构方法，通过光滑化噪声引入光滑模型序列，在随机估计定义的拓扑下取极限得到模型。
ai.result: 模型几乎必然满足全局随机和点态加权贝索夫型估计，并发展了向量值白噪声方程组的多指标方法。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解三维杨-米尔斯随机动力学提供了严格的规则结构框架和估计工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将光滑化噪声序列的极限构造与加权贝索夫估计结合，为奇异SPDE提供模型构建路径。
idea_spark.risk: 极限存在性依赖于特定拓扑和随机估计，可能不适用于非高斯噪声或非多项式非线性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了Otto等人的多指标方法，但首次应用于杨-米尔斯系统并处理向量值噪声。

zh.tldr: 利用多指标方法构造了三维杨-米尔斯朗之万方程的规则结构及其模型，并获得了全局随机和点态加权贝索夫估计。
zh.motivation: 构造三维欧几里得杨-米尔斯测度，以及闵可夫斯基空间上杨-米尔斯场的正则量子化问题。
zh.method: 采用F. Otto等人的多指标规则结构方法，通过光滑化噪声引入光滑模型序列，在随机估计定义的拓扑下取极限得到模型。
zh.result: 模型几乎必然满足全局随机和点态加权贝索夫型估计，并发展了向量值白噪声方程组的多指标方法。
zh.help_to_user: 为理解三维杨-米尔斯随机动力学提供了严格的规则结构框架和估计工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将光滑化噪声序列的极限构造与加权贝索夫估计结合，为奇异SPDE提供模型构建路径。
idea_spark.risk: 极限存在性依赖于特定拓扑和随机估计，可能不适用于非高斯噪声或非多项式非线性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了Otto等人的多指标方法，但首次应用于杨-米尔斯系统并处理向量值噪声。

en.tldr: Constructed a regularity structure and model for the 3D Yang-Mills Langevin equation using the multi-index approach, obtaining global stochastic and pointwise weighted Besov estimates.
en.motivation: To construct the 3D Euclidean Yang-Mills measure and address canonical quantization of Yang-Mills fields on Minkowski space.
en.method: Employed the multi-index approach to regularity structures by F. Otto et al., introduced smooth models via mollified noise, and took limits in a topology defined by stochastic estimates.
en.result: The model satisfies global stochastic and pointwise weighted Besov-type estimates almost surely, and the multi-index approach was extended to systems with vector-valued white noises.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous regularity structure framework and estimation tools for 3D Yang-Mills stochastic dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Combining mollified noise limit construction with weighted Besov estimates offers a model-building path for singular SPDEs.
idea_spark.risk: Existence of the limit depends on specific topology and stochastic estimates, which may not hold for non-Gaussian noises or non-polynomial nonlinearities.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Otto et al.'s multi-index approach, but applied for the first time to Yang-Mills systems with vector-valued noise.

papers.title: RAVEN: Real-time Autoregressive Video Extrapolation with Consistency-model GRPO
papers.summary: Causal autoregressive video diffusion models support real-time streaming generation by extrapolating future chunks from previously generated content. Distilling such generators from high-fidelity bidirectional teachers yields competitive few-step models, yet a persistent gap between the history distributions encountered during training and those arising at inference constrains generation quality over long horizons. We introduce the Real-time Autoregressive Video Extrapolation Network (RAVEN), a training-time test framework that repacks each self rollout into an interleaved sequence of clean historical endpoints and noisy denoising states. This formulation aligns training attention with inference-time extrapolation and allows downstream chunk losses to supervise the history representations on which future predictions depend. We further propose Consistency-model Group Relative Policy Optimization (CM-GRPO), which reformulates a consistency sampling step as a conditional Gaussian transition and applies online Reinforcement Learning (RL) directly to this kernel, avoiding the Euler-Maruyama auxiliary process adopted in prior flow-model RL formulations. Experiments demonstrate that RAVEN surpasses recent causal video distillation baselines across quality, semantic, and dynamic degree evaluations, and that CM-GRPO provides further gains when combined with RAVEN.

ai.tldr: 提出RAVEN框架和CM-GRPO算法，解决因果自回归视频扩散模型在长时生成中的历史分布偏移问题，提升实时视频外推质量。
ai.motivation: 因果自回归视频扩散模型在训练时遇到的历史分布与推理时不一致，导致长时生成质量下降。
ai.method: RAVEN在训练时将自滚动输出重排为干净历史端点与噪声去噪状态的交错序列，使注意力对齐推理外推；CM-GRPO将一致性采样步重构为条件高斯转移，直接应用在线强化学习。
ai.result: RAVEN在质量、语义和动态度评估上超越近期因果视频蒸馏基线，CM-GRPO进一步带来增益。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过训练时测试框架和强化学习改进视频扩散模型的长时生成一致性。

idea_spark.risk: 强化学习训练可能不稳定，需要仔细调整奖励函数和超参数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从强化学习视角重新设计扩散模型的采样步骤，可能启发更高效的生成策略。

en.tldr: Proposes RAVEN framework and CM-GRPO algorithm to address history distribution mismatch in causal autoregressive video diffusion models, improving long-horizon real-time video extrapolation quality.
en.motivation: Causal autoregressive video diffusion models suffer from a persistent gap between training and inference history distributions, constraining long-horizon generation quality.
en.method: RAVEN repacks self-rollouts into interleaved clean historical endpoints and noisy denoising states during training, aligning attention with inference extrapolation; CM-GRPO reformulates consistency sampling as conditional Gaussian transitions and applies online RL directly.
en.result: RAVEN surpasses recent causal video distillation baselines in quality, semantic, and dynamic evaluations; CM-GRPO provides further gains.

idea_spark.idea: Combining consistency models with GRPO avoids auxiliary processes in prior flow-model RL, simplifying optimization.

idea_spark.inspiration: Reformulating diffusion sampling steps from an RL perspective may inspire more efficient generation strategies.

papers.title: Non--exchangeable mean field games with moderate interactions and common noise
papers.summary: We study mean field games for large non--exchangeable populations with moderate local interactions and common noise. The finite--player system is driven by two complementary interaction mechanisms : a graphon--type structure, which encodes heterogeneous large--scale interactions between agents, and a rescaled local kernel, which produces a density-dependent interaction term in the limit. The limiting model is a non--exchangeable mean field game in which the representative player is indexed by a label \(u\in[0,1]\), interacts through a graphon--weighted local density, and is affected by a graphon--induced environment law.   We introduce a relaxed formulation of the limiting mean field game, adapted to the presence of common noise, and prove existence under general continuity and non--degeneracy assumptions. Under additional convexity assumptions, relaxed equilibria can be realized in strict form. In the deterministic case without common noise, we obtain deterministic equilibria and provide a probabilistic characterization of strict equilibria through a nonlinear Feynman--Kac representation.   We then establish the asymptotic connection with the finite--player game. We prove that every limit point of approximate closed--loop Nash equilibria is a relaxed solution of the limiting mean field game, and that the corresponding averaged equilibrium payoffs converge. Conversely, every relaxed mean field game equilibrium can be approximated by Markovian approximate Nash equilibria of the finite--player systems. These results give a complete asymptotic characterization of equilibrium behavior for non--exchangeable games with moderate interactions and common noise.

ai.tldr: 研究具有中等局部交互和共同噪声的大规模不可交换群体的平均场博弈，建立了极限模型并证明了均衡的存在性与渐近收敛性。
ai.motivation: 现有平均场博弈理论多假设群体可交换，但实际系统中个体异质性和局部交互普遍存在，需要更一般的模型。
ai.method: 引入图论型结构和重标度局部核描述两种交互机制，采用松弛形式处理共同噪声，通过凸性假设和Feynman-Kac表示获得严格均衡。
ai.result: 证明了极限平均场博弈松弛解的存在性，以及有限玩家近似纳什均衡与极限均衡之间的双向渐近关系。
ai.help_to_user: 为分析异质群体、局部交互和随机环境下的博弈问题提供了严格的数学框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将松弛均衡概念与共同噪声结合，可能启发随机控制或金融中带噪声的异质代理模型。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（如凸性、非退化）在具体应用中可能难以满足，需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图论型环境律替代传统平均场，为处理高维异质系统提供新视角。

en.tldr: Studies mean field games for large non-exchangeable populations with moderate local interactions and common noise, establishing existence of relaxed equilibria and asymptotic connection to finite-player games.
en.motivation: Existing mean field game theory often assumes exchangeable populations, but real systems feature heterogeneous agents and local interactions, requiring more general models.
en.method: Introduces graphon-type structure and rescaled local kernel for two interaction mechanisms, uses relaxed formulation to handle common noise, and obtains strict equilibria under convexity via Feynman-Kac representation.
en.result: Proves existence of relaxed solutions for the limiting mean field game and bidirectional asymptotic relationships between finite-player approximate Nash equilibria and limiting equilibria.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for analyzing games with heterogeneous populations, local interactions, and common noise.

idea_spark.idea: Combining relaxed equilibrium with common noise may inspire stochastic control or finance models with noisy heterogeneous agents.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (e.g., convexity, non-degeneracy) may be hard to satisfy in specific applications and require validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using graphon-induced environment law instead of classical mean field offers a new perspective for high-dimensional heterogeneous systems.

papers.title: Learning Direct Control Policies with Flow Matching for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: We present a flow-matching planner for autonomous driving that directly outputs actionable control trajectories defined by acceleration and curvature profiles. The model is conditioned on a bird's-eye-view (BEV) raster of the surrounding scene and generates control sequences in a small number of Ordinary Differential Equations (ODE) integration steps, enabling low-latency inference suitable for real-time closed-loop re-planning. We train exclusively on urban scenarios (real urban city streets, intersections and roundabouts of the city of Parma, Italy) collected from a 2D traffic simulator with reactive agents, and evaluate in closed-loop on both in-distribution and markedly out-of-distribution environments, including multi-lane highways and unseen urban scenarios. Our results show that the model generalizes reliably to these unseen conditions, maintaining stable closed-loop control and successfully completing scenarios that differ substantially from the training distribution. We attribute this to the BEV representation, which provides a geometry-centric view of the scene that is inherently less sensitive to distributional shifts, and to the flow-matching formulation, which learns a smooth vector field that degrades gracefully under distribution shift. We provide video demonstrations of closed-loop behavior at https://marcelloceresini.github.io/DirectControlFlowMatching.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于流匹配的规划器，直接输出加速度和曲率控制轨迹，在BEV栅格条件下通过少量ODE步骤实现低延迟闭环重规划。
ai.motivation: 现有自动驾驶规划方法依赖复杂模块或高计算量，难以在分布外场景中保持稳定闭环控制。
ai.method: 以BEV栅格为条件，利用流匹配学习平滑向量场，通过少量ODE积分步骤生成控制序列。
ai.result: 在真实城市场景训练后，模型在未见过的多车道高速公路和城市场景中仍能保持稳定闭环控制，成功完成分布外任务。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种轻量、泛化性强的直接控制规划方法，适合实时自动驾驶系统。

idea_spark.idea: 结合BEV几何表示与流匹配，使模型对分布偏移不敏感，实现零样本泛化。
idea_spark.risk: 训练数据仅来自模拟器，真实世界噪声和动态可能影响性能；ODE步数虽少但仍需实时硬件支持。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用几何中心表示和流匹配的平滑退化特性，可启发其他领域（如医疗影像）的分布外泛化设计。

idea_spark.idea: 结合BEV几何表示与流匹配，使模型对分布偏移不敏感，实现零样本泛化。
idea_spark.risk: 训练数据仅来自模拟器，真实世界噪声和动态可能影响性能；ODE步数虽少但仍需实时硬件支持。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用几何中心表示和流匹配的平滑退化特性，可启发其他领域（如医疗影像）的分布外泛化设计。

en.tldr: We present a flow-matching planner for autonomous driving that directly outputs acceleration and curvature control trajectories, conditioned on a BEV raster, enabling low-latency closed-loop re-planning with few ODE steps.
en.motivation: Existing autonomous driving planners often rely on complex modules or high computation, struggling to maintain stable closed-loop control under out-of-distribution scenarios.
en.method: The model is conditioned on a bird's-eye-view raster and uses flow matching to learn a smooth vector field, generating control sequences via a small number of ODE integration steps.
en.result: Trained on urban scenarios from a 2D traffic simulator, the model generalizes reliably to unseen multi-lane highways and urban environments, maintaining stable closed-loop control.
en.help_to_user: Offers a lightweight, generalizable direct control planning method suitable for real-time autonomous driving systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining BEV geometric representation with flow matching makes the model insensitive to distribution shifts, enabling zero-shot generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Training data is solely from a simulator; real-world noise and dynamics may degrade performance. The ODE steps, though few, still require real-time hardware support.
idea_spark.inspiration: The use of geometry-centric representation and smooth degradation of flow matching can inspire out-of-distribution generalization designs in other fields, such as medical imaging.

papers.title: Some lifting and approximation properties for maps in $W^{1,2}(\mathbb{B}^3;\mathbb{S}^2)$
papers.summary: Smooth maps $u\colon\mathbb B^3\to\mathbb S^2$ can be lifted to $\hat u\colon\mathbb B^3\to\mathbb S^3$ using the Hopf fibration $h\colon \mathbb S^3\to\mathbb S^2$ via the factorization $u=h\circ\hat u$. In this note we characterize the $W^{1,2}$-maps which have this lifting property in terms of exactness of the pullback form $u^*ω_{\mathbb S^2}$, and deduce a smooth approximation property preserving the constraint $u^*ω_{\mathbb S^2}=dη$.

ai.tldr: 本文刻画了从三维球到二维球面的Sobolev映射具有Hopf提升性质的条件，并证明了保持约束的光滑逼近性质。
ai.motivation: 研究Sobolev映射是否可以通过Hopf纤维化提升到三维球面，并保持某种微分形式的精确性。
ai.method: 利用拉回形式的恰当性来刻画提升性质，并构造保持约束的光滑逼近序列。
ai.result: 给出了W^{1,2}映射具有提升性质的充要条件，并证明了相应的光滑逼近定理。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解Sobolev映射在拓扑约束下的提升与逼近问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用拉回形式的恰当性作为约束，构造保持拓扑结构的光滑逼近。
idea_spark.risk: 高维情形下Sobolev映射的拓扑复杂性可能使提升性质难以刻画。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从调和映射的lifting问题出发，将拓扑约束转化为微分形式的条件。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从调和映射的lifting问题出发，将拓扑约束转化为微分形式的条件。

en.tldr: This note characterizes the lifting property of Sobolev maps from the 3-ball to the 2-sphere via the Hopf fibration, and proves a smooth approximation result preserving the exactness of the pullback form.
en.motivation: To understand when Sobolev maps can be lifted to the 3-sphere via the Hopf fibration while preserving a differential form constraint.
en.method: Characterization via exactness of the pullback form, and construction of a smooth approximating sequence that respects the constraint.
en.result: Necessary and sufficient condition for the lifting property in W^{1,2}, and a smooth approximation theorem.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into lifting and approximation of Sobolev maps under topological constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Use exactness of the pullback form as a constraint to construct smooth approximations that preserve topology.
idea_spark.risk: In higher dimensions, the topological complexity of Sobolev maps may hinder the characterization of lifting.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by lifting problems in harmonic maps, translating topological constraints into differential form conditions.

papers.title: Avoiding Bias in Clipped SGD for Overparameterized Models under Generalized Smoothness
papers.summary: Modern machine learning is dominated by complex, overparameterized architectures capable of interpolating data and achieving zero training loss. For such models, we investigate the convergence properties of two popular modifications to standard SGD: clipped SGD and normalized SGD. We show that under overparameterization and a mild assumption on batch size, both clipped and normalized SGD do not suffer from the bias typically introduced by clipping, converging effectively at the same rate as their deterministic counterparts. This provides a rigorous theoretical justification for the empirical success of gradient clipping methods. In our analysis, we employ the $(L_0,L_1)$-smoothness condition, under which we obtain convergence rates that improve upon the best known results in prior work. Furthermore, we extend our analysis to specific challenging regimes, including heavy-tailed noise, $(H_0,H_1)$-smoothness (which is strictly weaker than standard assumptions in optimization literature) and the deterministic regime.

ai.tldr: 本文证明在过参数化模型下，裁剪SGD和归一化SGD不会引入偏差，收敛速度与确定性方法相同。
ai.motivation: 现代机器学习中广泛使用裁剪梯度方法，但其偏差问题缺乏理论解释。
ai.method: 利用$(L_0,L_1)$-光滑性条件分析裁剪SGD和归一化SGD的收敛性。
ai.result: 在过参数化和温和批次假设下，两种方法均无偏差，收敛率优于已知结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解裁剪梯度方法为何在实践中有效，并提供理论保证。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在非光滑或非凸场景下裁剪SGD的偏差特性。
idea_spark.risk: 理论假设（如过参数化）可能不适用于所有实际模型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合重尾噪声分析，设计更鲁棒的优化器。

en.tldr: This paper proves that under overparameterized models, clipped SGD and normalized SGD do not suffer from bias and converge at the same rate as deterministic methods.
en.motivation: Gradient clipping is widely used in modern machine learning, but its bias lacks theoretical explanation.
en.method: Analyze convergence of clipped and normalized SGD using the $(L_0,L_1)$-smoothness condition.
en.result: Under overparameterization and mild batch assumptions, both methods are bias-free with convergence rates better than known results.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand why gradient clipping works in practice and provides theoretical guarantees.

idea_spark.idea: Explore bias properties of clipped SGD in non-smooth or non-convex settings.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical assumptions (e.g., overparameterization) may not hold for all practical models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Design more robust optimizers by incorporating heavy-tailed noise analysis.

papers.title: Fredholm Criteria for $G$-pseudodifferential Operators
papers.summary: Let $G$ be a compact Lie group that acts smoothly on a closed manifold $M$. Using a general Simonenko principle, we derive a novel criterion for the Fredholm property of $G$-pseudodifferential operators acting on Sobolev spaces of sections of vector bundles over $M$. In case the group is finite, we obtain a further characterization of the Fredholm property of $G$-pseudodifferential operators in terms of the invertibility of suitable symbols.

ai.tldr: 本文利用Simonenko原理，为紧李群作用下的G-伪微分算子的Fredholm性质提供了新的判定准则，并针对有限群情形给出了基于符号可逆性的进一步刻画。
ai.motivation: 在紧李群作用下，G-伪微分算子的Fredholm性质缺乏统一的判定方法，现有结果不够系统。
ai.method: 采用Simonenko原理，将Fredholm性质转化为算子的局部和全局性质，并结合群作用与符号分析。
ai.result: 得到了G-伪微分算子Fredholm性的新准则，对有限群情形还给出了符号可逆性的等价条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户判断紧李群作用下伪微分算子的Fredholm性，为相关偏微分方程和指标理论提供工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将群作用与符号可逆性结合，可能用于非交换几何中的指标计算。
idea_spark.risk: 对非紧群或非光滑作用，该准则可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将群表示论与算子Fredholm理论交叉，探索新的指标公式。

zh.tldr: 本文利用Simonenko原理，为紧李群作用下的G-伪微分算子的Fredholm性质提供了新的判定准则，并针对有限群情形给出了基于符号可逆性的进一步刻画。
zh.motivation: 在紧李群作用下，G-伪微分算子的Fredholm性质缺乏统一的判定方法，现有结果不够系统。
zh.method: 采用Simonenko原理，将Fredholm性质转化为算子的局部和全局性质，并结合群作用与符号分析。
zh.result: 得到了G-伪微分算子Fredholm性的新准则，对有限群情形还给出了符号可逆性的等价条件。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户判断紧李群作用下伪微分算子的Fredholm性，为相关偏微分方程和指标理论提供工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将群作用与符号可逆性结合，可能用于非交换几何中的指标计算。
idea_spark.risk: 对非紧群或非光滑作用，该准则可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将群表示论与算子Fredholm理论交叉，探索新的指标公式。

en.tldr: Using the Simonenko principle, this paper derives a novel criterion for the Fredholm property of G-pseudodifferential operators on a closed manifold with a compact Lie group action, and for finite groups obtains a characterization via symbol invertibility.
en.motivation: There is a lack of unified criteria for the Fredholm property of G-pseudodifferential operators under compact Lie group actions.
en.method: The Simonenko principle is employed to reduce the Fredholm property to local and global properties, combined with group action and symbol analysis.
en.result: A new criterion for the Fredholm property of G-pseudodifferential operators is obtained, with an equivalent condition in terms of symbol invertibility for finite groups.
en.help_to_user: Helps users determine the Fredholm property of pseudodifferential operators under compact Lie group actions, providing tools for PDEs and index theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combining group actions with symbol invertibility may lead to index computations in noncommutative geometry.
idea_spark.risk: The criterion may fail for non-compact groups or non-smooth actions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires cross-fertilization between group representation theory and operator Fredholm theory for new index formulas.

papers.title: Breaking Global Self-Attention Bottlenecks in Transformer-based Spiking Neural Networks with Local Structure-Aware Self-Attention
papers.summary: Transformer-based Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) integrate SNNs with global self-attention and have demonstrated impressive performance. However, existing Transformer-based SNNs suffer from two fundamental limitations. First, they typically employ max pooling layers to reduce the size of feature maps, but the max pooling captures only the strongest response and fails to comprehensively preserve representative regional features. Second, the global self-attention involves all global feature interactions, resulting in computational redundancy and quadratic computational complexity, thus conflicting with the sparse and energy-efficient characteristics of SNNs. To address these challenges, we develop Local Structure-Aware Spiking Transformer (LSFormer), a novel Transformer-based Spiking Neural Network that incorporates Spiking Response Pooling (SPooling) and Local Structure-Aware Spiking Self-Attention (LS-SSA). For the first time, our LSFormer leverages a local dilated window mechanism to capture both local details and long-range dependencies. Experimental results demonstrate that our LSFormer achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing advanced Transformer-based SNNs. Notably, on the more challenging static dataset Tiny-ImageNet and neuromorphic dataset N-CALTECH101, LSFormer substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by 4.3\% and 8.6\% in top-1 classification accuracy, respectively. These results highlight the potential of LSFormer to advance energy-efficient spiking models toward practical deployment in large-scale vision applications.

ai.tldr: 提出局部结构感知脉冲Transformer（LSFormer），通过脉冲响应池化和局部膨胀窗口自注意力，解决全局自注意力计算冗余和特征保留不足的问题，在Tiny-ImageNet和N-CALTECH101上分别提升4.3%和8.6%的top-1准确率。
ai.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的脉冲神经网络使用最大池化丢失区域特征，且全局自注意力计算复杂度高，与SNN的稀疏节能特性矛盾。
ai.method: 设计脉冲响应池化（SPooling）保留代表性区域特征，提出局部结构感知脉冲自注意力（LS-SSA）采用局部膨胀窗口机制同时捕获局部细节和长程依赖。
ai.result: 在静态数据集Tiny-ImageNet和神经形态数据集N-CALTECH101上，LSFormer的top-1分类准确率分别比最先进基线高4.3%和8.6%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过局部结构感知机制降低Transformer SNN的计算开销，同时提升特征表示能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将脉冲响应池化与局部膨胀窗口结合，替代全局自注意力，实现高效特征交互。
idea_spark.risk: 局部窗口大小和膨胀率的选择可能影响长程依赖捕获能力，需针对不同任务调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受卷积神经网络局部感受野启发，将稀疏局部注意力引入脉冲Transformer，兼顾效率与性能。

idea_spark.risk: 局部窗口大小和膨胀率的选择可能影响长程依赖捕获能力，需针对不同任务调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受卷积神经网络局部感受野启发，将稀疏局部注意力引入脉冲Transformer，兼顾效率与性能。

en.tldr: Proposes Local Structure-Aware Spiking Transformer (LSFormer) with spiking response pooling and local dilated window self-attention to overcome global self-attention redundancy and feature loss, achieving 4.3% and 8.6% top-1 accuracy gains on Tiny-ImageNet and N-CALTECH101.
en.motivation: Existing Transformer-based SNNs use max pooling that loses regional features, and global self-attention incurs quadratic complexity, conflicting with SNN's sparse and energy-efficient nature.
en.method: Introduces Spiking Response Pooling (SPooling) to preserve representative regional features, and Local Structure-Aware Spiking Self-Attention (LS-SSA) with a local dilated window mechanism to capture both local details and long-range dependencies.
en.result: LSFormer achieves state-of-the-art top-1 accuracy, outperforming baselines by 4.3% on Tiny-ImageNet and 8.6% on N-CALTECH101.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how local structure-aware mechanisms can reduce computational overhead in Transformer SNNs while improving feature representation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine spiking response pooling with local dilated windows to replace global self-attention for efficient feature interaction.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of window size and dilation rate may affect long-range dependency capture, requiring task-specific tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by convolutional local receptive fields, introduces sparse local attention into spiking Transformers for efficiency and performance.

papers.title: Computing Lower Bounds on the Nonnegative Rank via Non-Convex Optimization Solvers
papers.summary: The nonnegative rank of a nonnegative matrix $X$ is the smallest number of nonnegative rank-one factors that sum to $X$. Since computing the nonnegative rank is NP-hard, it is common to circumvent this issue by computing lower and upper bounds. In this paper, we propose non-convex formulations and practical implementations for four important lower bounds for the nonnegative rank, namely the fooling set bound (FSB), the rectangle covering bound (RCB), the hyperplane separation bound (HSB), and the self-scaled bound (SSB). In particular, our algorithm for computing the SSB is the first available in the literature, to the best of our knowledge. It allows us to improve the best known lower bound on the nonnegative rank for some matrices. In some cases, they coincide with the best known upper bound, thereby establishing their exact nonnegative rank for the first time. Moreover, on canonical benchmarks, we show that our non-convex approaches provide a meaningful and often competitive alternative to standard methods. The paper also provides a consolidated reference for the current state of several classical lower bounds on a large number of benchmark matrices.

ai.tldr: 提出用非凸优化方法计算非负矩阵秩的四个下界，首次实现了自缩放界。
ai.motivation: 非负秩计算是NP难的，现有下界方法有限，尤其缺乏自缩放界的实用算法。
ai.method: 将四个下界（愚弄集界、矩形覆盖界、超平面分离界、自缩放界）转化为非凸优化问题并求解。
ai.result: 自缩放界算法首次实现，改进了部分矩阵的非负秩下界，甚至与上界相等从而确定精确秩。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种计算非负秩下界的新工具，尤其适用于验证或逼近矩阵的非负秩。

idea_spark.idea: 将自缩放界转化为非凸优化问题，首次实现其计算。
idea_spark.risk: 非凸优化可能陷入局部最优，下界未必全局最优。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用非凸优化绕过组合爆炸，为其他NP难下界问题提供思路。

zh.motivation: 非负秩计算是NP难的，现有下界方法有限，尤其缺乏自缩放界的实用算法。

en.tldr: Proposes non-convex optimization formulations to compute four lower bounds for the nonnegative rank, with the first practical implementation of the self-scaled bound.
en.motivation: Computing the nonnegative rank is NP-hard, and existing lower bound methods are limited, especially lacking a practical algorithm for the self-scaled bound.
en.method: Formulates four lower bounds (fooling set, rectangle covering, hyperplane separation, self-scaled) as non-convex optimization problems and solves them.
en.result: The self-scaled bound algorithm is implemented for the first time, improving known lower bounds for some matrices and even matching upper bounds to determine exact ranks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new tool for computing lower bounds on the nonnegative rank, useful for verifying or approximating the rank.

idea_spark.idea: Formulating the self-scaled bound as a non-convex optimization problem enables its first practical computation.
idea_spark.risk: Non-convex optimization may yield local optima, so the computed lower bound may not be globally optimal.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using non-convex optimization to bypass combinatorial explosion offers a template for other NP-hard lower bound problems.

papers.title: Energy identity for stationary biharmonic mappings into spheres in supercritical dimensions
papers.summary: Energy identity for harmonic type maps in supercritical dimensions is an important and difficult problem. For sphere-valued harmonic maps, the first breakthrough was achieved by Lin-Rivière [Duke Math. J. 2002]. In this paper, by adapting their strategy, we establish the energy identity for stationary biharmonic maps into spheres in supercritical dimensions $n\ge 5$.

ai.tldr: 本文在超临界维度中建立了球面值稳态双调和映射的能量恒等式。
ai.motivation: 超临界维度中调和型映射的能量恒等式是一个重要且困难的问题，本文旨在将其推广到双调和映射。
ai.method: 借鉴Lin-Rivière的策略，对球面值稳态双调和映射进行分析。
ai.result: 对于维度n≥5的球面值稳态双调和映射，成功建立了能量恒等式。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解超临界维度中双调和映射的紧性性质提供了理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将类似方法应用于其他目标流形（如复射影空间）的双调和映射。
idea_spark.risk: 目标流形的几何复杂性可能使能量恒等式的证明更加困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从调和映射到双调和映射的推广思路，可启发高阶椭圆系统的能量恒等式研究。

zh.tldr: 本文在超临界维度中建立了球面值稳态双调和映射的能量恒等式。

en.tldr: This paper establishes the energy identity for stationary biharmonic maps into spheres in supercritical dimensions.
en.motivation: The energy identity for harmonic-type maps in supercritical dimensions is an important and difficult problem; this work extends it to biharmonic maps.
en.method: Adapting the strategy of Lin-Rivière for sphere-valued stationary biharmonic maps.
en.result: The energy identity is proved for stationary biharmonic maps into spheres in dimensions n≥5.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation for understanding compactness properties of biharmonic maps in supercritical dimensions.

idea_spark.idea: Try applying similar methods to biharmonic maps into other target manifolds, such as complex projective spaces.
idea_spark.risk: The geometric complexity of the target manifold may make the proof of the energy identity more challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: The generalization from harmonic to biharmonic maps inspires research on energy identities for higher-order elliptic systems.

papers.title: FactorizedHMR: A Hybrid Framework for Video Human Mesh Recovery
papers.summary: Human Mesh Recovery (HMR) is fundamentally ambiguous: under occlusion or weak depth cues, multiple 3D bodies can explain the same image evidence. This ambiguity is not uniform across the body, as torso pose and root structure are often relatively well constrained, whereas distal articulations such as the arms and legs are more uncertain. Building on this observation, we propose FactorizedHMR, a two-stage framework that treats these two regimes differently. A deterministic regression module first recovers a stable torso-root anchor, and a probabilistic flow-matching module then completes the remaining non-torso articulation. To make this completion reliable, we combine a composite target representation with geometry-aware supervision and feature-aware classifier-free guidance, preserving the torso-root anchor while improving single-reference recovery of ambiguity-prone articulation. We also introduce a synthetic data pipeline that provides the paired image-camera-motion supervision under diverse viewpoints. Across camera-space and world-space benchmarks, FactorizedHMR remains competitive with strong baselines, with the clearest gains in occlusion-heavy recovery and drift-sensitive world-space metrics.

ai.tldr: 提出FactorizedHMR，一种两阶段框架，分别用确定性回归处理躯干根节点、用概率流匹配处理四肢，结合几何感知监督和特征感知无分类器引导，在遮挡和世界空间指标上表现优异。
ai.motivation: 人体网格重建存在固有歧义，且不同身体部位不确定性不同：躯干和根结构相对确定，而四肢更不确定。现有方法未区分处理。
ai.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段确定性回归模块恢复稳定的躯干根锚点；第二阶段概率流匹配模块完成剩余非躯干关节，并采用复合目标表示、几何感知监督和特征感知无分类器引导保持锚点。
ai.result: 在相机空间和世界空间基准上，与强基线竞争，在遮挡严重和漂移敏感的世界空间指标上提升最明显。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种处理人体重建中不同部位不确定性的混合框架思路，尤其适合遮挡场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将人体运动先验（如运动平滑性）融入概率流匹配阶段，进一步提升时序一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实数据分布差异可能导致泛化问题；两阶段级联可能累积误差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人体解剖学中躯干与四肢稳定性差异启发，类似思路可用于机器人关节控制中刚性基座与柔性末端的建模。

idea_spark.risk: 合成数据与真实数据分布差异可能导致泛化问题；两阶段级联可能累积误差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人体解剖学中躯干与四肢稳定性差异启发，类似思路可用于机器人关节控制中刚性基座与柔性末端的建模。

en.tldr: Proposes FactorizedHMR, a two-stage framework that handles torso-root with deterministic regression and distal articulations with probabilistic flow-matching, using geometry-aware supervision and feature-aware classifier-free guidance, achieving strong results especially under occlusion.
en.motivation: Human mesh recovery is inherently ambiguous, with uncertainty varying across body parts: torso and root are relatively constrained while limbs are more uncertain. Existing methods treat all parts uniformly.
en.method: Two-stage framework: first a deterministic regression module recovers a stable torso-root anchor, then a probabilistic flow-matching module completes non-torso articulation, using composite target representation, geometry-aware supervision, and feature-aware classifier-free guidance.
en.result: Competitive with strong baselines on camera-space and world-space benchmarks, with clearest gains in occlusion-heavy recovery and drift-sensitive world-space metrics.
en.help_to_user: Provides a hybrid framework for handling varying uncertainty across body parts in human mesh recovery, particularly beneficial under occlusion.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate human motion priors (e.g., smoothness) into the probabilistic flow-matching stage to further improve temporal consistency.
idea_spark.risk: Domain gap between synthetic and real data may cause generalization issues; two-stage cascading may accumulate errors.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the anatomical stability difference between torso and limbs; similar idea could be applied to modeling rigid base vs. flexible end-effector in robot joint control.

papers.title: ToMAToMP: Robust and Multi-Parameter Topological Clustering
papers.summary: Topological clustering, and its main algorithm ToMATo, is a clustering method from Topological Data Analysis (TDA) which has been applied successfully in several applications during the last few years. This is due to its high versatility, as clusters are detected from the persistent components in the sublevel sets of any user-defined function (gene expression, pixel values, etc), and efficiency, as topological clustering enjoys robustness guarantees. However, ToMATo is also limited in several ways. First, a graph on the data points needs to be provided as a hyper-parameter of the method (whose fine-tuning is left to the user). Second, ToMATo is known to be very sensitive to outlier values in the function range. Finally, and most importantly, ToMATo can only handle one function at a time, whereas it is critical to use several functions in various applications. In this article, we introduce ToMAToMP: the first topological clustering method able to handle several functions at the same time with theoretical guarantees. More specifically, we leverage a recent tool from multi-parameter persistent homology, called MMA decomposition, to design our clustering algorithm, and prove that it enjoys robustness properties. As corollaries, we show that it can be used to make ToMATo independent of graph tuning, and robust to outliers. Finally, we provide a set of numerical experiments showcasing the efficiency and quality of the clusterings produced by ToMAToMP, by showing strong improvement over non-topological and topological baselines for various datasets.

ai.tldr: 提出ToMAToMP，首个能同时处理多个函数且具有理论保证的拓扑聚类方法，解决了原ToMATo对图超参数敏感、易受离群值影响、只能处理单一函数的局限。
ai.motivation: 现有拓扑聚类方法ToMATo需要用户提供图超参数、对函数离群值敏感、且只能处理单一函数，限制了其应用范围。
ai.method: 利用多参数持续同调中的MMA分解设计聚类算法，并证明其鲁棒性；通过多函数联合分析实现图调参无关和离群值鲁棒。
ai.result: 在多个数据集上，ToMAToMP相比非拓扑和拓扑基线方法在聚类质量和效率上均有显著提升。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需手动调图、抗离群值、支持多函数输入的鲁棒拓扑聚类工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将多参数拓扑分析与聚类结合，利用分解结构同时处理多个数据特征。
idea_spark.risk: MMA分解的计算复杂度可能随参数数量增加而升高，需验证大规模数据上的可扩展性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴多参数持续同调的理论工具解决实际聚类中的多源数据融合问题。

zh.tldr: 提出ToMAToMP，首个能同时处理多个函数且具有理论保证的拓扑聚类方法，解决了原ToMATo对图超参数敏感、易受离群值影响、只能处理单一函数的局限。
zh.motivation: 现有拓扑聚类方法ToMATo需要用户提供图超参数、对函数离群值敏感、且只能处理单一函数，限制了其应用范围。
zh.method: 利用多参数持续同调中的MMA分解设计聚类算法，并证明其鲁棒性；通过多函数联合分析实现图调参无关和离群值鲁棒。
zh.result: 在多个数据集上，ToMAToMP相比非拓扑和拓扑基线方法在聚类质量和效率上均有显著提升。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需手动调图、抗离群值、支持多函数输入的鲁棒拓扑聚类工具。

idea_spark.risk: MMA分解的计算复杂度可能随参数数量增加而升高，需验证大规模数据上的可扩展性。

en.tldr: Proposes ToMAToMP, the first topological clustering method that handles multiple functions simultaneously with theoretical guarantees, overcoming ToMATo's limitations on graph tuning, outlier sensitivity, and single-function input.
en.motivation: Existing ToMATo requires a user-provided graph hyperparameter, is sensitive to outliers in the function range, and can only process one function at a time, restricting its applicability.
en.method: Leverages the MMA decomposition from multi-parameter persistent homology to design the clustering algorithm and prove its robustness; enables graph-tuning independence and outlier robustness through joint multi-function analysis.
en.result: ToMAToMP significantly outperforms non-topological and topological baselines in clustering quality and efficiency across multiple datasets.
en.help_to_user: Provides a robust topological clustering tool that eliminates manual graph tuning, resists outliers, and supports multiple input functions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine multi-parameter topological analysis with clustering, using decomposition structures to process multiple data features simultaneously.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity of MMA decomposition may increase with the number of parameters; scalability on large datasets needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage theoretical tools from multi-parameter persistent homology to address practical multi-source data fusion in clustering.

papers.title: Bilinear embedding for divergence-form operators with first-order terms and negative potentials
papers.summary: This article establishes a bilinear embedding for second-order divergence-form operators with complex coefficients, characterized by the simultaneous presence of first-order terms and negative potentials. This work provides a further development of the theory initiated by Carbonaro and Dragičević for the homogeneous case, and recently extended by the second author to cases where first-order terms or negative potentials were treated in isolation.   We work in the general setting of arbitrary open subsets of $\mathbb{R}^d$ under Dirichlet, Neumann, or mixed boundary conditions. Our main contribution is the introduction of a unified notion of generalized $p$-ellipticity that extends all its predecessors and serves as the natural condition for the bilinear inequality. Methodologically, we overcome the rigidity of the Bellman-heat method on arbitrary open subsets by introducing a novel sequence-based approach that unifies and simplifies the previous techniques.   As fundamental applications, we prove the boundedness of the $H^\infty$-calculus on $L^p$ and establish $L^p$-maximal regularity. Moreover, we show that this generalized $p$-ellipticity provides a sufficient condition for the $L^p$-contractivity and $L^p$-analyticity of the generated semigroup.

ai.method: 提出基于序列的新方法，克服了Bellman-热方法在任意开子集上的刚性。
ai.result: 证明了H∞-演算的有界性和Lp-极大正则性，并给出了Lp-压缩性和解析性的充分条件。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受Carbonaro和Dragičević工作的启发，将分离条件统一为单一椭圆性条件。

papers.title: The Mean-Field Limit of Online Stochastic Vector Balancing
papers.summary: We study an online vector balancing problem, in which $n$ independent Gaussian random vectors $\boldsymbolζ(1),\dots,\boldsymbolζ(n) \sim \mathcal{N}(0, I_n)$, each of dimension $n$, arrive one at a time. The goal is to choose signs $\varepsilon(1),\dots,\varepsilon(n) \in \{\pm 1\}$ with $\varepsilon(k)$ depending only on $\boldsymbolζ(1),\dots,\boldsymbolζ(k)$, so as to minimize the expected $\ell^{\infty}$ norm of the signed sum $\frac{1}{\sqrt{n}}\sum_{k = 1}^n \varepsilon(k) \boldsymbolζ(k)$. Prior work showed that the optimal value $V^n$ is $O(1)$, at least for Rademacher $\boldsymbolζ(k)$'s, by constructing specific algorithms. Our main contribution is to determine the exact limit $V^{\infty} = \lim_{n\to\infty} V^n$ as the value of a nonstandard stochastic control problem of mean-field type: find the narrowest terminal interval into which a Brownian motion can be adaptively steered under a uniform-in-time $L^2$ constraint on the drift. The proof of the lower bound $V^{\infty} \leq \liminf_{n \to \infty} V^n$ uses probabilistic compactness arguments, and is very flexible. In fact, we show that the lower bound is universal, in that it holds as long as the entries of the $\boldsymbolζ(k)$ vectors are i.i.d. with mean zero, variance 1, and finite fourth moment. The proof of the upper bound $\limsup_{n \to \infty} V^n \leq V^{\infty}$ is more delicate, relying on dynamic programming principles and a priori bounds obtained from a coupling procedure involving the Föllmer drift, which makes explicit use of the Gaussian structure. In addition to our main convergence result, we provide some analysis and asymptotics for the limiting mean-field control problem.

ai.tldr: 研究了在线随机向量平衡问题的平均场极限，确定了最优值的精确极限，并将其转化为一个非标准平均场随机控制问题。
ai.motivation: 在线向量平衡问题在计算机科学和运筹学中有广泛应用，但高维情形下的精确最优值未知，需要理论刻画。
ai.method: 通过概率紧性论证得到下界，利用动态规划和Föllmer漂移耦合过程得到上界，最终将问题转化为布朗运动自适应控制问题。
ai.result: 证明了最优值的极限等于一个平均场控制问题的值，且下界具有普适性（仅需i.i.d.零均值、方差1、有限四阶矩）。
ai.help_to_user: 为在线平衡算法提供了理论最优基准，并展示了平均场方法在随机控制中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将高维在线平衡问题转化为连续时间布朗运动控制问题，可能启发新的算法设计。
idea_spark.risk: 高斯假设限制了直接应用，非高斯情形可能需要更复杂的分析。

en.tldr: We study the mean-field limit of an online stochastic vector balancing problem, determining the exact limit of the optimal value as a nonstandard mean-field stochastic control problem.
en.motivation: Online vector balancing has broad applications, but the exact optimal value in high dimensions was unknown, requiring a theoretical characterization.
en.method: We prove a lower bound via probabilistic compactness arguments and an upper bound via dynamic programming and a coupling with the Föllmer drift, reducing the problem to steering a Brownian motion.
en.result: The limit of the optimal value equals the value of a mean-field control problem, and the lower bound is universal under mild moment conditions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical benchmark for online balancing algorithms and demonstrates the power of mean-field methods in stochastic control.

idea_spark.idea: Transforming high-dimensional online balancing into a continuous-time Brownian control problem may inspire new algorithmic designs.
idea_spark.risk: The Gaussian assumption limits direct applicability; non-Gaussian cases may require more complex analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using drift constraints in stochastic control to model discrete online decisions offers a fresh perspective for theoretical computer science.

papers.title: The "good" Boussinesq equation on the half-line with Robin boundary conditions
papers.summary: We prove the local Hadamard well-posedness of the ``good'' Boussinesq equation formulated on the half-line with nonzero Robin boundary conditions. These boundary data involve the Dirichlet and Neumann boundary values as well as the second spatial derivative of the solution evaluated at the boundary. The nonlinear analysis crucially relies on the linear estimates established through the explicit solution formula obtained for the forced linear counterpart of the problem via Fokas's unified transform. The two pieces of initial data and the two pieces of boundary data belong in appropriate Sobolev spaces. The corresponding solution is established in the natural Hadamard solution space of continuous/continuously differentiable functions from a suitable time interval to the Sobolev spaces associated with the two initial data. Furthermore, in line with the well-posedness theory of the Cauchy problem, in the case of low regularity (namely, below the spatial continuity threshold) the solution space is refined by also including an appropriate spatiotemporal Lebesgue space.

ai.tldr: 证明了半直线上带非零Robin边界条件的“好”Boussinesq方程的局部Hadamard适定性。
ai.motivation: 研究半直线上带Robin边界条件的Boussinesq方程的适定性，填补该边界条件下非线性色散波方程理论空白。
ai.method: 利用Fokas统一变换获得线性问题的显式解公式，建立线性估计，再通过非线性分析证明适定性。
ai.result: 在适当的Sobolev空间中建立了解的局部存在唯一性和连续依赖性；低正则情形下解空间需包含时空Lebesgue空间。
ai.help_to_user: 为半直线Robin边界条件下的Boussinesq方程提供了严格的适定性理论，可用于后续数值模拟和物理建模。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将Robin边界条件推广到更一般的线性组合边界，或研究高维区域上的类似问题。
idea_spark.risk: 非线性项与边界条件的耦合可能破坏线性估计的精度，需仔细验证估计的紧性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用显式解公式处理边界条件，启发我们探索其他可积系统在非标准边界下的显式解结构。

zh.motivation: 研究半直线上带Robin边界条件的Boussinesq方程的适定性，填补该边界条件下非线性色散波方程理论空白。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用显式解公式处理边界条件，启发我们探索其他可积系统在非标准边界下的显式解结构。

en.tldr: We prove local Hadamard well-posedness for the good Boussinesq equation on the half-line with nonzero Robin boundary conditions.
en.motivation: To establish well-posedness for the Boussinesq equation under Robin boundary conditions, filling a theoretical gap for nonlinear dispersive waves on a half-line.
en.method: We use Fokas's unified transform to derive an explicit solution formula for the forced linear problem, obtain linear estimates, and then prove well-posedness via nonlinear analysis.
en.result: Local existence, uniqueness, and continuous dependence are established in appropriate Sobolev spaces; for low regularity, the solution space is refined with a spatiotemporal Lebesgue space.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous well-posedness theory for the Boussinesq equation with Robin boundary conditions on a half-line, useful for numerical simulations and physical modeling.

idea_spark.idea: Consider generalizing Robin conditions to more general linear combinations, or study analogous problems in higher dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: The coupling between nonlinearity and boundary conditions may compromise the sharpness of linear estimates, requiring careful verification of compactness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using explicit solution formulas to handle boundary conditions inspires exploration of explicit solution structures for other integrable systems under nonstandard boundaries.

papers.title: CHASM: Cross-frequency Harmonized Axis-Separable Mixing for Spectral Token Operators
papers.summary: Spectral token mixers based on Fourier transforms provide an efficient way to model global interactions in visual feature maps. Existing designs often either apply filter-wise spectral responses along fixed channel axes, or learn adaptive frequency-indexed channel mixing without explicitly aligning the channel directions used across frequencies. We propose CHASM, a Cross-frequency Harmonized Axis-Separable Mixer, as a structured middle ground. CHASM separates what should be shared from what should remain frequency-specific: all frequencies share a learned channel eigenbasis, while each frequency retains its own positive spectral gains. The shared basis makes channel directions comparable across the spectrum, whereas the positive gains preserve local spectral adaptivity. CHASM applies this structured operator separably along the height and width axes and is used as a drop-in replacement mixer inside existing backbones. We provide a structural characterization of the shared-basis operator family and evaluate CHASM through controlled same-backbone comparisons. Across accelerated MRI reconstruction, undersampled MRI segmentation, and natural-image reconstruction, CHASM consistently improves over same-backbone spectral-mixer baselines. Ablations show that removing the shared-basis constraint weakens performance, and randomizing coherent sampling geometry substantially reduces the gain, supporting cross-frequency harmonization as a useful inductive bias for spectral token operators.

ai.tldr: 提出CHASM，一种跨频率协调的轴可分离混合器，通过共享通道特征基和频率特定增益改进谱令牌算子，在MRI重建、分割和自然图像重建中优于基线。
ai.motivation: 现有谱令牌混合器要么沿固定通道轴应用滤波器响应，要么学习自适应频率索引通道混合，但未显式对齐不同频率的通道方向，导致跨频率信息利用不足。
ai.method: 设计跨频率协调的轴可分离混合器（CHASM），所有频率共享一个学习的通道特征基，每个频率保留自己的正谱增益，沿高度和宽度轴可分离应用，作为即插即用模块嵌入现有骨干网络。
ai.result: 在加速MRI重建、欠采样MRI分割和自然图像重建任务中，CHASM一致优于同骨干网络的谱混合基线；消融实验表明移除共享基约束会降低性能，随机化相干采样几何会大幅削弱增益。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种改进谱令牌混合器的结构化方法，适用于图像重建和分割任务，可作为现有骨干网络的直接替换模块。

idea_spark.idea: 将跨频率协调思想扩展到多模态数据，例如在医学图像中联合处理不同模态（如MRI和CT）的频率特征。
idea_spark.risk: 共享基可能限制极端频率差异场景的适应性，需验证在高度非平稳信号中的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受信号处理中公共子空间和自适应滤波的启发，将全局共享结构与局部自适应结合。

idea_spark.idea: 将跨频率协调思想扩展到多模态数据，例如在医学图像中联合处理不同模态（如MRI和CT）的频率特征。
idea_spark.risk: 共享基可能限制极端频率差异场景的适应性，需验证在高度非平稳信号中的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受信号处理中公共子空间和自适应滤波的启发，将全局共享结构与局部自适应结合。

en.tldr: Proposes CHASM, a cross-frequency harmonized axis-separable mixer that improves spectral token operators via a shared channel eigenbasis and frequency-specific gains, outperforming baselines in MRI reconstruction, segmentation, and natural-image reconstruction.
en.motivation: Existing spectral token mixers either apply filter-wise responses along fixed channel axes or learn adaptive frequency-indexed channel mixing without explicitly aligning channel directions across frequencies, limiting cross-frequency information utilization.
en.method: Designs a cross-frequency harmonized axis-separable mixer (CHASM) where all frequencies share a learned channel eigenbasis while each frequency retains its own positive spectral gains, applied separably along height and width axes as a drop-in replacement for existing backbones.
en.result: CHASM consistently outperforms same-backbone spectral-mixer baselines in accelerated MRI reconstruction, undersampled MRI segmentation, and natural-image reconstruction; ablations show removing the shared-basis constraint weakens performance and randomizing coherent sampling geometry substantially reduces gain.
en.help_to_user: Provides a structured method to improve spectral token mixers for image reconstruction and segmentation tasks, usable as a direct replacement module in existing backbones.

idea_spark.idea: Extend cross-frequency harmonization to multimodal data, e.g., jointly processing frequency features from different modalities (e.g., MRI and CT) in medical imaging.
idea_spark.risk: The shared basis may limit adaptability in scenarios with extreme frequency differences; robustness in highly non-stationary signals needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by common subspace and adaptive filtering in signal processing, combining global shared structure with local adaptation.

papers.title: CoralLite: μCT Reconstruction of Coral Colonies from Individual Corallites
papers.summary: The life history of an individual coral is archived within the accreting skeleton of the colony. While reef-forming coral colonies (e.g. massive \emph{Porites} sp.) may live for hundreds of years and deposit calcareous structures many metres in height and width, their living tissue is a thin outer surface layer comprised of asexually-dividing polyps that only survive a few years. To understand the rate and timing of polyp division and the consequences for colony skeletal growth, scientists need to track the skeletal corallite deposited around each polyp. Here we propose CoralLite, an annotated μCT scan dataset of entire calcareous skeletons and an associated, first corallite deep learning reconstruction baseline. CoralLite combines fully quantified volumetric segmentations with cross-slice linking for visualisations of 3D models for each corallite up to colony scale. For segmentation, we propose and evaluate in detail a hybrid V-Trans-UNet architecture applicable to segmenting tiled μCT virtual slabs of \emph{Porites} sp. colonies. The model is pre-trained on weakly annotated data and topology-aware fine-tuned using fully annotated slice sections with 8k+ manual corallite region annotations. On unseen slices of the same colony, the resulting model reaches 0.94 topological accuracy at mean Dice scores of 0.77 on the same colony and projection axis, and 0.63 mean Dice scores on a different, biologically unrelated specimen. Whilst our experiments are limited in scale and context, our results show for the first time that visual machine learning can effectively support full 3D individual corallite modelling from μCT scans of coral skeletons alone. For reproducibility and as a baseline for future research we publish our full dataset of 697 μCT slices, 37 partial or full slice annotations, and all network weights and source code with this paper.

ai.tldr: 提出CoralLite数据集和首个基于深度学习的珊瑚个体杯形重建基线，使用混合V-Trans-UNet架构实现μCT切片中珊瑚杯的精确分割与三维建模。
ai.motivation: 珊瑚生长历史记录在骨骼中，但追踪单个珊瑚杯的沉积过程需要高精度三维重建，现有方法难以处理大规模菌落。
ai.method: 构建包含697张μCT切片和8000+手动标注的数据集，采用V-Trans-UNet混合架构，先弱监督预训练再拓扑感知微调，实现跨切片链接的三维可视化。
ai.result: 在同菌落未见过切片上达到0.94拓扑准确率和0.77平均Dice，在无关标本上平均Dice为0.63，首次证明视觉机器学习可有效支持全三维珊瑚杯建模。
ai.help_to_user: 提供完整数据集、代码和基线模型，便于珊瑚生物学和计算成像领域研究者复现和扩展。

en.tldr: Proposes CoralLite dataset and first deep learning baseline for coral corallite reconstruction from μCT scans, using a hybrid V-Trans-UNet for accurate segmentation and 3D modeling.
en.motivation: Coral growth history is recorded in skeletons, but tracking individual corallite deposition requires high-precision 3D reconstruction, which is challenging at colony scale.
en.method: Constructs a dataset of 697 μCT slices with 8k+ manual annotations, employs a V-Trans-UNet hybrid architecture with weak-to-full supervision and topology-aware fine-tuning, enabling cross-slice linking for 3D visualization.
en.result: Achieves 0.94 topological accuracy and 0.77 mean Dice on unseen slices of the same colony, 0.63 mean Dice on a different specimen, demonstrating for the first time that visual machine learning can support full 3D corallite modeling.
en.help_to_user: Provides full dataset, code, and baseline model for reproducibility and future research in coral biology and computational imaging.

idea_spark.idea: Combine time-series μCT scans to track corallite division events and quantify colony growth dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: Limited dataset scale (single colony) and cross-species generalization; high manual annotation cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Weakly supervised pretraining reduces annotation burden, topology-aware loss improves segmentation continuity, inspiring solutions for other elongated structure segmentation problems.

papers.title: How opinions shape epidemics: a graphon-based kinetic approach
papers.summary: Understanding the mutual influence between social behavior and physical health is crucial for designing effective epidemic mitigation strategies. Individual interactions drive the evolution of opinions, which in turn shape how infectious diseases are perceived and consequently how they spread within a population, for instance through the adoption or rejection of preventive measures. At the same time, the distribution and dynamics of physical contacts play a fundamental role in determining transmission patterns. To this end, we develop a mathematical framework to analyze the coupled dynamics of opinion formation, disease transmission, and physical contacts by employing graphon-based networks, which capture heterogeneous and large-scale connectivity patterns typical of realistic social structures. The epidemic compartmental model further incorporates a kinetic description of microscopic level physical contacts, allowing for a consistent multiscale representation of interaction patterns. Starting from a microscopic description governed by interpersonal compromise and intrinsic self-thinking processes, we derive a kinetic compartmental epidemic model on graphons via a mean-field limit. This formulation allows us to investigate the joint evolution of the disease state and the opinion distribution, with a particular focus on the role of social networks and physical contacts. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the graphon-kinetic approach provides a comprehensive representation of the coupled opinion-epidemic dynamics, revealing new possibilities for controlling disease spread by shaping population opinion patterns.

ai.tldr: 提出图论与动理学结合的框架，研究观点形成与传染病传播的相互影响。
ai.motivation: 理解社会行为与身体健康之间的双向反馈，以设计更有效的疫情缓解策略。
ai.method: 基于图论网络描述异质性社交连接，引入动理学描述微观接触，通过平均场极限推导出耦合的传染病-观点演化模型。
ai.result: 数值实验表明该框架能全面刻画观点-疫情耦合动力学，揭示通过塑造群体观点来控制疾病传播的新可能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解社交网络和观点如何影响传染病传播，为政策制定提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用观点干预（如推广预防措施）来间接调控疫情传播。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设可能过于简化真实社交互动，且观点变化对行为的影响存在不确定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从图论网络和动理学方程的结合中获得灵感，用于分析复杂社会系统中的多尺度耦合问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a graphon-kinetic framework to study the interplay between opinion formation and epidemic spread.
en.motivation: To understand the mutual influence between social behavior and physical health for designing effective epidemic mitigation strategies.
en.method: Uses graphon-based networks to capture heterogeneous connectivity, incorporates a kinetic description of microscopic contacts, and derives a coupled opinion-epidemic model via mean-field limit.
en.result: Numerical experiments show the framework captures coupled dynamics and reveals new possibilities for controlling disease spread by shaping opinions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how social networks and opinions affect disease transmission, providing theoretical support for policy-making.

idea_spark.risk: Model assumptions may oversimplify real social interactions, and the impact of opinion changes on behavior is uncertain.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by combining graphon networks and kinetic equations to analyze multiscale coupling in complex social systems.

papers.title: Few Channels Draw The Whole Picture: Revealing Massive Activations in Diffusion Transformers
papers.summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) and related flow-based architectures are now among the strongest text-to-image generators, yet the internal mechanisms through which prompts shape image semantics remain poorly understood. In this work, we study massive activations: a small subset of hidden-state channels whose responses are consistently much larger than the rest. We show that, despite their sparsity, these few channels effectively draw the whole picture, in three complementary senses. First, they are functionally critical: a controlled disruption probe that zeroes the massive channels causes a sharp collapse in generation quality, while disrupting an equally-sized set of low-statistic channels has marginal effect. Second, they are spatially organized: restricting image-stream tokens to massive channels and clustering them yields coherent partitions that closely align with the main subject and salient regions, exposing a structured spatial code hidden inside an apparently outlier-like subspace. Third, they are transferable: transporting massive activations from one prompt-conditioned trajectory into another, shifts the final image toward the source prompt while preserving substantial content from the target, producing localized semantic interpolation rather than unstructured pixel blending. We exploit this property in two use cases: text-conditioned and image-conditioned semantic transport, where massive activations transport enables prompt interpolation and subject-driven generation without any additional training. Together, these results recast massive activations not as activation anomalies, but as a sparse prompt-conditioned carrier subspace that organizes and controls semantic information in modern DiT models.

ai.tldr: 发现扩散Transformer中少量隐藏状态通道（大规模激活）对图像语义生成起关键作用，具有功能重要性、空间组织性和可迁移性，可用于无需额外训练的语义传输。
ai.motivation: 扩散Transformer虽在文本到图像生成中表现优异，但其内部机制尚不明确，特别是提示如何塑造图像语义。
ai.method: 通过零化大规模激活通道的干扰实验、聚类分析图像流令牌、以及跨提示轨迹迁移大规模激活，揭示其功能、空间和可迁移特性。
ai.result: 大规模激活通道虽稀疏但功能关键，空间上对应主体和显著区域，可迁移实现语义插值和主题驱动生成。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解扩散Transformer内部语义编码机制，提供无需训练的语义操控方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将大规模激活作为稀疏语义载体，设计轻量级编辑接口，实现实时图像语义调整。
idea_spark.risk: 迁移可能引入源提示的无关特征，需控制迁移强度以避免内容失真。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受激活稀疏性启发，可探索其他生成模型中类似的结构化子空间。
