en.tldr: Massive activations in Diffusion Transformers are a sparse set of channels that critically control image semantics, exhibit spatial organization, and enable transferable semantic interpolation without extra training.
en.motivation: Despite the success of Diffusion Transformers in text-to-image generation, the internal mechanisms by which prompts shape image semantics remain poorly understood.
en.method: We study massive activations via zeroing probes, clustering of image-stream tokens, and cross-trajectory activation transport to reveal their functional, spatial, and transferable properties.
en.result: Massive activations are functionally critical, spatially aligned with salient regions, and transferable for prompt interpolation and subject-driven generation.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the semantic encoding of Diffusion Transformers and offers training-free semantic manipulation techniques.

idea_spark.idea: Use massive activations as a sparse semantic carrier to design a lightweight editing interface for real-time image semantic adjustment.
idea_spark.risk: Transfer may introduce irrelevant features from the source prompt; careful control of transfer strength is needed to avoid content distortion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by activation sparsity, explore similar structured subspaces in other generative models.

papers.title: EverAnimate: Minute-Scale Human Animation via Latent Flow Restoration
papers.summary: We propose EverAnimate, an efficient post-training method for long-horizon animated video generation that preserves visual quality and character identity. Long-form animation remains challenging because highly dynamic human motion must be synthesized against relatively static environments, making chunk-based generation prone to accumulated drift: (i) low-level quality drift, such as progressive degradation of static backgrounds, and (ii) high-level semantic drift, such as inconsistent character identity and view-dependent attributes. To address this issue, EverAnimate restores drifted flow trajectories by anchoring generation to a persistent latent context memory, consisting of two complementary mechanisms. (i) Persistent Latent Propagation maintains a context memory across chunks to propagate identity and motion in latent space while mitigating temporal forgetting. (ii) Restorative Flow Matching introduces an implicit restoration objective during sampling through velocity adjustment, improving within-chunk fidelity. With only lightweight LoRA tuning, EverAnimate outperforms state-of-the-art long-animation methods in both short- and long-horizon settings: at 10 seconds, it improves PSNR/SSIM by 8%/7% and reduces LPIPS/FID by 22%/11%; at 90 seconds, the gains increase to 15%/15% and 32%/27%, respectively.

ai.tldr: 提出EverAnimate，一种高效的后训练方法，通过潜在流恢复实现分钟级人物动画生成，在保持视觉质量和角色身份的同时，显著优于现有长动画方法。
ai.motivation: 长时动画生成中，高度动态的人体运动与相对静态的环境结合，导致分块生成出现累积漂移（低质背景退化、高维身份不一致），现有方法难以解决。
ai.method: 构建持久潜在上下文记忆，包含持久潜在传播（跨块传播身份与运动，缓解时序遗忘）和恢复性流匹配（通过速度调整隐式恢复目标，提升块内保真度），仅需轻量LoRA微调。
ai.result: 在10秒时PSNR/SSIM提升8%/7%，LPIPS/FID降低22%/11%；90秒时增益增至15%/15%和32%/27%，全面超越SOTA。
ai.help_to_user: 可帮助用户生成分钟级、身份一致、背景稳定的高质量人物动画视频，适用于影视、虚拟角色等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将恢复性流匹配与扩散模型采样结合，通过速度调整隐式修正漂移，无需额外显式约束。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练扩散模型，LoRA微调可能限制泛化能力；长时序下记忆衰减仍需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受视频压缩中运动补偿启发，将潜在流视为可恢复的轨迹，通过记忆锚定生成过程。

en.tldr: Proposes EverAnimate, an efficient post-training method for minute-scale human animation via latent flow restoration, preserving visual quality and character identity, significantly outperforming existing long-animation methods.
en.motivation: Long-form animation suffers from accumulated drift (background degradation and identity inconsistency) due to dynamic human motion against static environments, which chunk-based generation fails to handle.
en.method: Builds a persistent latent context memory with two mechanisms: Persistent Latent Propagation (propagates identity and motion across chunks, mitigating temporal forgetting) and Restorative Flow Matching (implicit restoration via velocity adjustment during sampling), requiring only lightweight LoRA tuning.
en.result: At 10s, improves PSNR/SSIM by 8%/7% and reduces LPIPS/FID by 22%/11%; at 90s, gains increase to 15%/15% and 32%/27%, outperforming SOTA.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to generate minute-long, identity-consistent, background-stable human animation videos for film, virtual characters, etc.

idea_spark.idea: Combines restorative flow matching with diffusion sampling via velocity adjustment to implicitly correct drift without explicit constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on pretrained diffusion models; LoRA tuning may limit generalization; memory decay over long horizons needs further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by motion compensation in video compression, treating latent flows as restorable trajectories anchored by memory.

papers.title: Noether symmetries and conservation laws of a class of time-dependent multidimensional nonlinear wave equations
papers.summary: Conservation laws of a class of time-dependent damped nonlinear multidimensional wave equations are derived by Noether's theorem. For arbitrary nonzero damping coefficient and nonlinear interaction term, its infinitesimal variational symmetries span a Euclidean algebra $\euclid(n)$ of space translations and rotations. They produce conservation of linear and angular momentums. For some specific forms of these two terms symmetry algebra is enlarged to a subalgebra of the conformal algebra $\conf(1,n)$ and in this case more interesting conservation laws are found.

ai.tldr: 通过Noether定理推导了一类含时阻尼非线性多维波动方程的守恒律，并分析了对称性代数。
ai.motivation: 研究含时阻尼非线性多维波动方程的守恒律，以理解其物理性质。
ai.method: 应用Noether定理，分析无穷小变分对称性，并扩展对称性代数。
ai.result: 对于任意非零阻尼和非线性项，对称性生成欧几里得代数，得到线动量和角动量守恒；特定形式下对称性扩展为共形代数子代数，得到更多守恒律。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解含时阻尼非线性波动方程的对称性和守恒律。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他非线性项或阻尼形式下对称性代数的扩展。
idea_spark.risk: 特定形式可能难以找到解析解或对称性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 共形对称性可能揭示方程的隐对称性或可积性。

zh.motivation: 研究含时阻尼非线性多维波动方程的守恒律，以理解其物理性质。

idea_spark.inspiration: 共形对称性可能揭示方程的隐对称性或可积性。

en.tldr: Conservation laws for a class of time-dependent damped nonlinear multidimensional wave equations are derived via Noether's theorem, with symmetry algebras analyzed.
en.motivation: To study conservation laws of time-dependent damped nonlinear wave equations for understanding their physical properties.
en.method: Apply Noether's theorem, analyze infinitesimal variational symmetries, and extend symmetry algebras.
en.result: For arbitrary nonzero damping and nonlinearity, symmetries generate Euclidean algebra, yielding linear and angular momentum conservation; specific forms extend symmetry to a subalgebra of conformal algebra, giving more conservation laws.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand symmetries and conservation laws of time-dependent damped nonlinear wave equations.

idea_spark.idea: Explore symmetry algebra extensions for other nonlinear terms or damping forms.
idea_spark.risk: Specific forms may lack analytic solutions or symmetries.
idea_spark.inspiration: Conformal symmetry may reveal hidden symmetries or integrability.

papers.title: Generalization and Probabilistic Proofs of Some Combinatorial Identities
papers.summary: Using a probabilistic approach, we derive some interesting combinatorial identities involving gamma and beta functions. These results generalize certain well-known combinatorial identities involving binomial coefficients and special functions. In particular, by studying moments of the difference of two gamma and beta random variables, both in the dependent and independent cases, we obtain new combinatorial identities. This approach provides a systematic method to derive further combinatorial identities from probabilistic transformations.

ai.tldr: 利用概率方法推导出涉及伽马函数和贝塔函数的组合恒等式，推广了已知的二项式系数恒等式。
ai.motivation: 寻找系统性的概率方法以生成新的组合恒等式。

papers.title: Lower bound on the mixing time of $p$-spin glasses
papers.summary: We show that Glauber dynamics for $ p$-spin glass mixes exponentially slowly at inverse temperatures larger than a constant times $ \ln (p)/p $ for large enough $ p $. This is done by analyzing the energy landscape using Gaussian decompositions and establishing a bottleneck bound.

ai.tldr: 本文证明在足够大的p下，p自旋玻璃的Glauber动力学在逆温度大于常数倍ln(p)/p时混合速度呈指数缓慢。
ai.motivation: 理解p自旋玻璃在低温下的动力学行为，特别是混合时间的下界。
ai.method: 利用高斯分解分析能量景观，并建立瓶颈界。
ai.result: 得到了混合时间的指数下界，且该下界在逆温度高于特定阈值时成立。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解p自旋玻璃在低温下的缓慢混合现象及其理论证明方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将高斯分解与瓶颈界结合，为自旋玻璃的缓慢混合提供严格下界。
idea_spark.risk: 方法可能依赖于p足够大的假设，对较小p的适用性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发利用能量景观的几何结构来研究其他无序系统的动力学性质。

en.tldr: This paper proves that Glauber dynamics for p-spin glass mixes exponentially slowly at inverse temperatures larger than a constant times ln(p)/p for large enough p.
en.motivation: To understand the dynamical behavior of p-spin glasses at low temperatures, especially the lower bound on mixing time.
en.method: Analyze the energy landscape using Gaussian decompositions and establish a bottleneck bound.
en.result: An exponential lower bound on the mixing time is obtained, valid for inverse temperatures above a certain threshold.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the slow mixing phenomenon in p-spin glasses at low temperatures and the theoretical proof method.

papers.title: Distributionally Robust Model Predictive Control for Virtual Power Plants
papers.summary: This paper presents a distributionally robust model predictive control (DRMPC) framework for the optimal Virtual Power Plant (VPP) operation under electricity price uncertainty. A unified VPP model is formulated that captures the interaction between buildings, battery storage, and renewable generation, all influenced by exogenous weather and market signals. The proposed approach integrates data-driven forecasting with quantile-based uncertainty quantification to construct time-varying Wasserstein ambiguity sets that adapt to forecast dispersion and distributional shifts. This yields a tractable DR-MPC formulation that incorporates predictive distribution information directly into real-time decision making. The method is evaluated using real weather and market data from a Nordic case study across two seasonal scenarios. The results show that DR-MPC improves economic performance relative to standard forecast-based MPC when the ambiguity radius is chosen appropriately, with consistent gains of up to 0.8% for small radii across both seasonal scenarios. Larger radii become overly conservative and reduce revenue, underscoring the importance of proper radius selection. These findings demonstrate the practical value of distributionally robust optimization for uncertainty-aware VPP operation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种分布鲁棒模型预测控制框架，用于虚拟电厂在电价不确定性下的优化运行，通过数据驱动预测和分位数不确定性量化构建时变Wasserstein模糊集，在Nordic案例中实现最高0.8%的经济收益提升。
ai.motivation: 虚拟电厂运行面临电价不确定性，传统预测模型预测误差大，需要更鲁棒的优化方法。
ai.method: 集成数据驱动预测与分位数不确定性量化，构建时变Wasserstein模糊集，形成可解的分布鲁棒模型预测控制公式。
ai.result: 与标准预测模型预测控制相比，适当模糊半径下经济收益提升最高0.8%，过大半径导致保守性增加。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将分布鲁棒优化应用于虚拟电厂实时决策，提升不确定性下的经济性。

idea_spark.idea: 结合在线学习动态调整模糊半径，或引入多阶段决策以应对更长时间尺度的不确定性。

en.tldr: Proposes a distributionally robust model predictive control framework for optimal virtual power plant operation under electricity price uncertainty, using data-driven forecasting and quantile-based uncertainty quantification to construct time-varying Wasserstein ambiguity sets, achieving up to 0.8% economic improvement in a Nordic case study.
en.motivation: Virtual power plant operation faces electricity price uncertainty, and standard forecast-based models suffer from prediction errors, requiring more robust optimization methods.
en.method: Integrates data-driven forecasting with quantile-based uncertainty quantification to construct time-varying Wasserstein ambiguity sets, yielding a tractable distributionally robust model predictive control formulation.
en.result: Compared to standard forecast-based model predictive control, economic performance improves by up to 0.8% with appropriate ambiguity radius; larger radii lead to excessive conservatism.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to apply distributionally robust optimization to real-time virtual power plant decision-making, improving economics under uncertainty.

idea_spark.idea: Combine online learning to dynamically adjust the ambiguity radius, or introduce multi-stage decision-making to handle longer-term uncertainties.
idea_spark.risk: Ambiguity radius selection may rely on heuristics or additional optimization, increasing computational burden; real-world data distribution shifts may violate assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The combination of quantile-based uncertainty quantification and Wasserstein ambiguity sets offers a novel approach to handling non-stationary uncertainties.

papers.title: Where Should Diffusion Enter a Language Model? Geometry-Guided Hidden-State Replacement
papers.summary: Continuous diffusion language models lag behind autoregressive transformers, partly because diffusion is applied in spaces poorly suited to language denoising and token recovery. We propose DiHAL, a geometry-guided diffusion-transformer hybrid that asks where diffusion should enter a pretrained transformer. DiHAL scores layers with geometry-based proxies, selects a diffusion-friendly hidden-state interface, and replaces the lower transformer prefix with a diffusion bridge while retaining the upper layers and original LM head. By reconstructing the selected-layer hidden state rather than tokens, DiHAL avoids direct continuous-to-discrete recovery. Experiments on 8B-scale backbones show that the geometry score predicts effective shallow insertion layers under a fixed bridge-training protocol and that hidden-state recovery improves over continuous diffusion baselines in a diagnostic comparison matching the diffusion/recovery training budget. These results suggest that hidden-state geometry helps identify where diffusion-based replacement is feasible inside pretrained language models.

ai.tldr: 提出 DiHAL，通过几何引导选择扩散插入层，在预训练 Transformer 中替换低层为扩散桥，重构隐藏状态而非 token，提升连续扩散语言模型性能。
ai.motivation: 连续扩散语言模型在语言去噪和 token 恢复上表现不佳，原因是扩散应用于不适合语言的空间。
ai.method: 用几何代理分数对层评分，选择扩散友好的隐藏状态接口，将低层 Transformer 前缀替换为扩散桥，保留高层和原始 LM 头，重构选定层的隐藏状态。
ai.result: 在 8B 规模骨干上，几何分数能预测有效浅层插入位置，隐藏状态恢复优于连续扩散基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何将扩散模型有效集成到预训练语言模型中，以及几何信息在模型设计中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 探索在更深的层或不同注意力头中插入扩散桥，或使用动态几何分数自适应选择插入层。
idea_spark.risk: 几何代理分数可能对特定模型或任务过拟合，泛化性需验证；隐藏状态重构可能丢失细粒度 token 信息。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受几何信息引导模型结构设计的启发，可进一步研究其他几何量（如曲率、测地距离）在模型剪枝或知识蒸馏中的应用。

en.tldr: Proposes DiHAL, which uses geometry-guided layer selection to replace lower transformer layers with a diffusion bridge, reconstructing hidden states instead of tokens, improving continuous diffusion language models.
en.motivation: Continuous diffusion language models underperform due to diffusion applied in spaces ill-suited for language denoising and token recovery.
en.method: Scores layers with geometry-based proxies, selects a diffusion-friendly hidden-state interface, replaces the lower transformer prefix with a diffusion bridge, retains upper layers and LM head, and reconstructs the selected-layer hidden state.
en.result: On 8B-scale backbones, geometry scores predict effective shallow insertion layers; hidden-state recovery outperforms continuous diffusion baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to effectively integrate diffusion models into pretrained language models and the role of geometric information in model design.

idea_spark.idea: Explore inserting diffusion bridges at deeper layers or different attention heads, or use dynamic geometry scores for adaptive layer selection.
idea_spark.risk: Geometry proxies may overfit to specific models or tasks, requiring generalization verification; hidden-state reconstruction may lose fine-grained token information.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by geometry guiding model structure design, further investigate other geometric quantities (e.g., curvature, geodesic distance) in model pruning or knowledge distillation.

papers.title: SurgicalMamba: Dual-Path SSD with State Regramming for Online Surgical Phase Recognition
papers.summary: Online surgical phase recognition (SPR) underpins context-aware operating-room systems and requires committing to a prediction at every frame from past context alone. Surgical video poses three demands that natural-video recognizers do not jointly address: procedures span tens of thousands of frames, time flows non-uniformly as long routine stretches are punctuated by brief phase-defining transitions, and the visual domain is narrow so backbone features are strongly correlated across channels. Existing recognizers either let per-frame cost grow with elapsed length, or hold cost bounded but advance state at a uniform rate with channel-independent dynamics, leaving the latter two demands unaddressed. We present SurgicalMamba, a causal SPR model built on Mamba2's structured state-space duality (SSD) that holds per-frame cost at O(d). It introduces three SSD-compatible components, each targeting one demand: a dual-path SSD block that separates long- and short-term regimes at the level of recurrent state; intensity-modulated stepping, a continuous-time time-warp that adapts the slow path's effective rate to phase-relevant information; and state regramming, a per-chunk Cayley rotation that opens cross-channel mixing in the otherwise axis-aligned SSM recurrence. The learned rotation planes inherit a phase-aligned structure without any direct supervision, offering an interpretable internal signature of surgical workflow. Across seven public SPR benchmarks, SurgicalMamba reaches state-of-the-art accuracy and phase-level Jaccard under strict online evaluation: 94.6%/82.7% on Cholec80 (+0.7 pp/+2.2 pp over the strongest prior) and 89.5%/68.9% on AutoLaparo (+1.7 pp/+2.0 pp), at 119 fps on a single GPU. Ablations isolate the contribution of each component. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/sukjuoh/Surgical-Mamba.

ai.tldr: 提出SurgicalMamba，基于Mamba2的SSD架构，通过双路径状态空间、强度调制步进和状态重编程，实现高精度在线手术阶段识别。
ai.motivation: 现有在线手术阶段识别方法无法同时处理长序列、非均匀时间流速和通道强相关三个挑战。
ai.method: 采用Mamba2的SSD保持每帧O(d)成本，引入双路径SSD块分离长短时记忆、强度调制步进自适应时间扭曲、状态重编程通过Cayley旋转实现跨通道混合。
ai.result: 在Cholec80和AutoLaparo等七个基准上达到SOTA，准确率94.6%/89.5%，Jaccard指数82.7%/68.9%，速度119fps。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效、可解释的在线手术视频分析工具，适用于实时手术室系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Cayley旋转实现状态重编程，在保持SSM效率的同时引入跨通道交互。
idea_spark.risk: 旋转矩阵的优化可能增加训练难度，且对超参数敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从手术视频的非均匀时间特性出发，启发其他领域（如监控视频）的在线识别设计。

en.tldr: SurgicalMamba leverages Mamba2's SSD with dual-path state space, intensity-modulated stepping, and state regramming for online surgical phase recognition, achieving SOTA accuracy and speed.
en.motivation: Existing online surgical phase recognizers fail to jointly handle long sequences, non-uniform temporal flow, and strong channel correlations in surgical videos.
en.method: Built on Mamba2's SSD with O(d) per-frame cost, introduces dual-path SSD block for long/short-term memory, intensity-modulated stepping for adaptive time warping, and state regramming via Cayley rotation for cross-channel mixing.
en.result: Achieves SOTA on seven benchmarks: 94.6%/82.7% on Cholec80 and 89.5%/68.9% on AutoLaparo, at 119 fps on a single GPU.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient and interpretable tool for real-time surgical video analysis in operating-room systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use Cayley rotation for state regramming to enable cross-channel interaction while preserving SSM efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Optimizing rotation matrices may increase training difficulty and sensitivity to hyperparameters.
idea_spark.inspiration: The non-uniform temporal flow in surgical videos inspires similar designs for online recognition in other domains like surveillance.

papers.title: Quantitative Soft-to-Hard Terminal Constraint Convergence for the Heat Equation
papers.summary: We study an optimal control problem for the heat equation with a prescribed terminal state. To circumvent the difficulty of enforcing a hard terminal constraint, we analyze a penalized formulation and prove that the corresponding optimal controls and terminal states converge to the exact constrained solution as the penalty parameter \(α\to \infty\). We establish explicit quantitative convergence estimates of order \(O(α^{-θ})\), including the sharp \(O(1/α)\) rate under stronger modal summability assumptions on the terminal mismatch. A finite-dimensional prototype is used to illustrate the underlying projection structure, while numerical illustrations are reported in a companion study.

ai.tldr: 针对热方程的最优控制问题，研究了用惩罚项逼近硬终端约束的定量收敛性，证明了当惩罚参数趋于无穷时，最优控制和终端状态以O(α^{-θ})速率收敛到精确解。
ai.motivation: 硬终端约束在数值求解中难以直接施加，需要一种可计算的软约束替代方案并保证收敛性。
ai.method: 采用惩罚函数法将终端约束松弛为软约束，通过变分分析和模态分解建立显式收敛估计。
ai.result: 获得了O(α^{-θ})的定量收敛速率，在更强的模态可和性假设下达到最优的O(1/α)速率。
ai.help_to_user: 为热方程终端约束最优控制问题提供了理论保证和收敛速率指导，便于数值实现。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模态分解和投影结构，将无限维约束问题转化为有限维近似，并分析截断误差。
idea_spark.risk: 收敛速率依赖于终端失配的模态可和性，实际应用中可能难以验证该假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将硬约束转化为软约束并建立显式误差界，可启发其他PDE约束优化问题的可计算近似方法。

zh.tldr: 针对热方程的最优控制问题，研究了用惩罚项逼近硬终端约束的定量收敛性，证明了当惩罚参数趋于无穷时，最优控制和终端状态以O(α^{-θ})速率收敛到精确解。
zh.motivation: 硬终端约束在数值求解中难以直接施加，需要一种可计算的软约束替代方案并保证收敛性。
zh.method: 采用惩罚函数法将终端约束松弛为软约束，通过变分分析和模态分解建立显式收敛估计。
zh.result: 获得了O(α^{-θ})的定量收敛速率，在更强的模态可和性假设下达到最优的O(1/α)速率。
zh.help_to_user: 为热方程终端约束最优控制问题提供了理论保证和收敛速率指导，便于数值实现。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模态分解和投影结构，将无限维约束问题转化为有限维近似，并分析截断误差。
idea_spark.risk: 收敛速率依赖于终端失配的模态可和性，实际应用中可能难以验证该假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将硬约束转化为软约束并建立显式误差界，可启发其他PDE约束优化问题的可计算近似方法。

en.tldr: For an optimal control problem of the heat equation with a prescribed terminal state, we analyze a penalized formulation and prove that the optimal controls and terminal states converge to the exact constrained solution at a rate O(α^{-θ}), with a sharp O(1/α) rate under stronger modal summability assumptions.
en.motivation: Hard terminal constraints are difficult to enforce numerically, motivating a soft-constraint penalized approach with guaranteed convergence.
en.method: A penalty method relaxes the terminal constraint; variational analysis and modal decomposition yield explicit convergence estimates.
en.result: Quantitative convergence rates O(α^{-θ}) are established, achieving the optimal O(1/α) rate under stronger modal summability conditions.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees and convergence rates for numerically solving heat equation optimal control problems with terminal constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Use modal decomposition and projection structure to reduce the infinite-dimensional constrained problem to a finite-dimensional approximation with truncation error analysis.
idea_spark.risk: Convergence rates depend on modal summability of the terminal mismatch, which may be difficult to verify in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Converting hard constraints to soft ones with explicit error bounds can inspire computable approximations for other PDE-constrained optimization problems.

papers.title: Equilibrium for Time-inconsistent Mean Field Games: A Systematic Analysis by Entropy Regularization
papers.summary: This paper studies the existence and approximation of equilibria for general time-inconsistent mean field game (MFG) problems in the continuous-time setting. To handle the intricate nonlocal equilibrium Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (EHJB) system arising from initial-time dependence, such as non-exponential discounting, we develop a vanishing entropy regularization approach for solving the MFG. With entropy regularization, we first characterize the regularized equilibrium via a coupled exploratory equilibrium HJB (EEHJB) equation and a law-dependent stochastic differential equation. By exploiting Schauder fixed-point arguments and tailored parabolic regularity estimates in a suitable functional space involving both value functions and measure flows, we establish the global existence of regularized equilibria under mild assumptions. We next analyze convergence as the entropy regularization vanishes. By employing compactness arguments, Young measure techniques, and a duality tool for divergence-form Fokker-Planck equations, we prove that the regularized equilibria converge, up to subsequences, to an equilibrium of the original time-inconsistent MFG. Furthermore, under entropy regularization, we propose a policy iteration algorithm and establish its convergence under a short time horizon and weak terminal interaction conditions.

ai.tldr: 本文通过熵正则化方法系统分析了连续时间下时间不一致平均场博弈的均衡存在性与逼近。
ai.motivation: 时间不一致性（如非指数贴现）导致均衡HJB系统非局部且难以直接求解，现有方法缺乏统一分析框架。
ai.method: 引入消失熵正则化，将原问题转化为耦合的探索性均衡HJB方程与依赖律的随机微分方程；利用Schauder不动点定理和抛物正则性估计证明正则化均衡存在；通过紧性论证、Young测度和Fokker-Planck对偶工具证明正则化均衡收敛到原均衡；并设计策略迭代算法。
ai.result: 在温和假设下建立了正则化均衡的全局存在性，证明了正则化均衡子序列收敛到原均衡，并给出了策略迭代算法的收敛条件。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理时间不一致MFG提供了理论保证和可计算的算法框架，适用于金融、经济学等涉及非指数贴现的决策问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用熵正则化将非局部耦合系统转化为局部结构，再通过消失极限恢复原均衡，这一思路可应用于其他非标准动态规划问题。
idea_spark.risk: 正则化参数趋于零时收敛速度未知，且算法对短时间窗口和弱终端交互的依赖可能限制实际应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理学的熵正则化（如强化学习中的最大熵方法）借鉴，将复杂均衡问题分解为可解子问题，启发其他领域类似分解策略。

en.tldr: This paper systematically analyzes the existence and approximation of equilibria for time-inconsistent mean field games via entropy regularization.
en.motivation: Time inconsistency (e.g., non-exponential discounting) leads to a nonlocal equilibrium HJB system that is difficult to solve directly, and existing methods lack a unified analysis framework.
en.method: Introduce vanishing entropy regularization, reformulating the problem into a coupled exploratory equilibrium HJB equation and a law-dependent SDE; prove existence of regularized equilibria via Schauder fixed-point theorem and parabolic regularity; show convergence of regularized equilibria to the original equilibrium via compactness, Young measures, and Fokker-Planck duality; propose a policy iteration algorithm.
en.result: Global existence of regularized equilibria under mild assumptions, subsequential convergence to the original equilibrium, and convergence conditions for the policy iteration algorithm.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees and a computable algorithmic framework for time-inconsistent MFGs, applicable to decision problems with non-exponential discounting in finance and economics.

idea_spark.idea: Using entropy regularization to convert a nonlocal coupled system into a local structure, then recovering the original equilibrium via vanishing limit, can be applied to other nonstandard dynamic programming problems.
idea_spark.risk: The convergence rate as the regularization parameter vanishes is unknown, and the algorithm's dependence on short time horizons and weak terminal interactions may limit practical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from entropy regularization in physics (e.g., maximum entropy methods in reinforcement learning), this decomposition of complex equilibrium problems into solvable subproblems inspires similar strategies in other fields.

papers.title: FKPP fronts in quenched random media
papers.summary: We study numerically the evolution of one-dimensional FKPP fronts initiated from steep initial conditions in the presence of a quenched random growth rate. Compared to both the homogeneous case (with velocity $v_0$) and deterministic disorder, quenched randomness increases the average propagation speed. We show that the velocity shift relative to the homogeneous case scales linearly with the disorder variance $σ^2$, with a universal prefactor -- independent of the specific distribution of the disorder -- such that $v = v_0 + a σ^2$, with $a \approx 0.02432 \pm 0.00002$. Moreover, the front position exhibits diffusive fluctuations across disorder realizations. The corresponding effective diffusion coefficient scales quadratically with $σ$, $D = \frac{b^2 σ^2}{2}$, with $b \approx 0.223 \pm 0.002$. These results suggest a universal statistical response of FKPP fronts to quenched heterogeneity.

ai.tldr: 数值研究了一维FKPP锋面在淬火随机生长率下的演化，发现淬火无序使平均传播速度增加，速度偏移与无序方差线性相关，且锋面位置表现出扩散涨落。
ai.motivation: 理解淬火随机介质对FKPP锋面传播的影响，特别是速度变化和涨落行为的普适规律。
ai.method: 数值模拟一维FKPP方程，初始条件陡峭，生长率为淬火随机场，统计不同无序实现下的锋面速度和位置涨落。
ai.result: 速度偏移与无序方差σ²线性相关，系数a≈0.02432；有效扩散系数D与σ²成正比，系数b≈0.223。
ai.help_to_user: 揭示了淬火无序下FKPP锋面传播的普适统计响应，可用于预测随机介质中的反应扩散过程。

idea_spark.idea: 将淬火无序视为一种有效噪声，探索其对锋面涨落和扩散行为的理论解释，或推广到更高维度。
idea_spark.risk: 数值结果依赖于特定参数范围，普适性需更多理论验证；实际系统中无序分布可能偏离假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于无序系统中标度律的普适性，可尝试将类似方法用于研究生态学或燃烧学中的随机传播现象。

en.tldr: Numerical study of one-dimensional FKPP fronts in quenched random growth rate shows that quenched disorder increases average propagation speed, with a velocity shift linear in disorder variance, and front position exhibits diffusive fluctuations.
en.motivation: To understand the effect of quenched random media on FKPP front propagation, particularly the universal scaling of velocity shift and fluctuations.
en.method: Numerical simulation of the one-dimensional FKPP equation with steep initial conditions and a quenched random growth rate, averaging over disorder realizations.
en.result: Velocity shift scales linearly with disorder variance σ², with prefactor a≈0.02432; effective diffusion coefficient D scales as b²σ²/2 with b≈0.223.
en.help_to_user: Reveals universal statistical response of FKPP fronts to quenched heterogeneity, useful for predicting reaction-diffusion processes in random media.

idea_spark.idea: Treat quenched disorder as effective noise to theoretically explain front fluctuations and diffusion, or extend to higher dimensions.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical results depend on specific parameter ranges; universality requires further theoretical validation; real disorder may deviate from assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by universal scaling laws in disordered systems, similar methods could be applied to ecological or combustion front propagation in random environments.

papers.title: Well-posedness theorems in fluid-structure interaction: perfectly elastic shells
papers.summary: In this work, we consider the interaction of a 3D incompressible fluid with a 2D flexible shell that occupies (a part of) the boundary of the fluid domain. We assume that the shell is perfectly elastic while the fluid is governed by the Navier--Stokes equations. Consequently, damping within the coupled system comes entirely from the parabolic fluid subsystem. Our main result is the construction of a local-in-time unique strong solution to the system of PDEs. Standard techniques from the literature do not apply here. They are restricted to visco-elastic structures, where the corresponding solid phase is parabolic. Our construction relies on a different method built upon a new estimate for the acceleration of the system. In the case of a 2D viscous incompressible fluid interacting with a 1D perfectly elastic shell we can extend the local solution globally in time (until a possible self-intersection of the shell).

ai.tldr: 本文研究了三维不可压缩流体与二维完全弹性壳体的流固耦合系统，证明了局部强解的存在唯一性，并在二维流体与一维壳体情形下将解延拓至全局。
ai.motivation: 现有方法仅适用于粘弹性结构（抛物型固体相），无法处理完全弹性壳体（无阻尼）的耦合系统。
ai.method: 提出基于系统加速度新估计的构造方法，替代传统粘弹性假设下的技术。
ai.result: 建立了局部强解的存在唯一性；对二维流体与一维弹性壳体，解可全局延拓（直至壳体自交）。
ai.help_to_user: 为完全弹性壳体流固耦合问题的数学分析提供了新的理论工具和存在性结果。

idea_spark.idea: 利用系统加速度的精细估计绕过固体相抛物性要求，可能适用于更一般的弹性结构。
idea_spark.risk: 全局延拓依赖于低维壳体（1D），高维情形可能需额外正则性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将流体方程与弹性方程耦合时，可尝试从加速度而非速度或位移入手建立估计。

en.tldr: This work proves local-in-time unique strong solutions for a 3D incompressible fluid interacting with a 2D perfectly elastic shell, and extends to global solutions for a 2D fluid with a 1D shell.
en.motivation: Standard techniques are limited to viscoelastic structures (parabolic solid phase) and cannot handle perfectly elastic shells without damping.
en.method: A novel construction based on a new estimate for the acceleration of the system, bypassing the need for parabolic solid assumptions.
en.result: Existence and uniqueness of local strong solutions; global-in-time extension for the 2D fluid / 1D shell case (until possible self-intersection).
en.help_to_user: Provides new theoretical tools and existence results for fluid-structure interaction with perfectly elastic shells.

idea_spark.idea: Using fine estimates of system acceleration to circumvent parabolic solid requirements, potentially applicable to more general elastic structures.
idea_spark.risk: Global extension relies on low-dimensional shell (1D); higher dimensions may require additional regularity conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: When coupling fluid and elastic equations, consider establishing estimates from acceleration rather than velocity or displacement.

papers.title: Video-Zero: Self-Evolution Video Understanding
papers.summary: Self-evolution offers a promising path for improving reasoning models without relying on intensive human annotation. However, extending this paradigm to video understanding remains underexplored and challenging: videos are long, dynamic, and redundant, while the evidence needed for reasoning is often sparse and temporally localized. Naively generating difficult question-answer pairs from full videos can therefore produce supervision that appears challenging but is weakly grounded, relying on static cues or language priors rather than temporal evidence. In this work, we argue that the key bottleneck of video self-evolution is not difficulty alone, but grounding. We propose Video-Zero, an annotation-free Questioner--Solver co-evolution framework that centers self-evolution on temporally localized evidence. The Questioner discovers informative evidence segments and generates evidence-grounded questions, while the Solver learns to answer and align its predictions with the supporting evidence. This closes an iterative loop of evidence discovery, grounded supervision, and evidence-aligned learning. Across 13 benchmarks spanning temporal grounding, long-video understanding, and video reasoning, Video-Zero consistently improves multiple video VLM backbones, demonstrating the effectiveness and transferability of evidence-centered self-evolution.

ai.tldr: 提出Video-Zero框架，通过无标注的问答器-求解器协同进化，实现以时间定位证据为中心的视频自进化理解。
ai.motivation: 视频自进化面临关键瓶颈：生成的问答对往往依赖静态线索或语言先验，缺乏时间证据支撑。
ai.method: Questioner发现证据片段并生成基于证据的问题，Solver学习回答并与证据对齐，形成证据发现-监督-对齐的迭代循环。
ai.result: 在13个基准上一致提升多种视频VLM骨干，证明以证据为中心的自进化有效且可迁移。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种无需人工标注的视频推理模型改进方法，尤其适用于长视频和时间定位任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将Questioner设计为可学习证据重要性权重的模块，动态调整问题难度与证据粒度。
idea_spark.risk: 证据片段自动发现可能引入噪声，需设计鲁棒性验证机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴课程学习思想，从简单证据到复杂证据逐步提升问题难度。

en.tldr: Proposes Video-Zero, an annotation-free Questioner-Solver co-evolution framework that centers self-evolution on temporally localized evidence for video understanding.
en.motivation: The key bottleneck of video self-evolution is not difficulty alone but grounding; naive QA generation often relies on static cues or language priors rather than temporal evidence.
en.method: The Questioner discovers informative evidence segments and generates evidence-grounded questions, while the Solver learns to answer and align its predictions with the supporting evidence, forming an iterative loop.
en.result: Consistently improves multiple video VLM backbones across 13 benchmarks, demonstrating effectiveness and transferability of evidence-centered self-evolution.
en.help_to_user: Provides a human-annotation-free method to improve video reasoning models, especially for long-video and temporal grounding tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Design the Questioner as a learnable module that weights evidence importance, dynamically adjusting question difficulty and evidence granularity.
idea_spark.risk: Automatic evidence segment discovery may introduce noise; robust verification mechanisms are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draw from curriculum learning to gradually increase question difficulty from simple to complex evidence.

papers.title: The radial Newton problem: nonlinear dynamics of minimal resistance in central fields
papers.summary: This paper investigates the nonlinear dynamics of Newton's problem of minimal resistance in radial fields. We move beyond classical translational symmetry to analyze two non-equilibrium scenarios: a scale-invariant free expansion and an incompressible source flow. Our analysis reveals that the scale-invariant model suffers from a symmetry-breaking instability (loss of ellipticity) that necessitates geometric truncation. Conversely, we prove that the incompressible flow acts as a structural regularizer, admitting unique, smooth, and strictly concave solutions. These findings provide new qualitative insights into how physical conservation laws ensure the regularity and symmetry of optimal configurations in high-speed central flows, bridging the gap between variational calculus and the physics of complex systems.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了径向场中牛顿最小阻力问题的非线性动力学，分析了两种非平衡场景，发现标度不变模型存在对称性破缺不稳定性，而不可压缩流作为结构正则化器，保证了最优构型的正则性和对称性。
ai.motivation: 超越经典平移对称性，探索径向场中最小阻力问题的非线性动力学行为。
ai.method: 对标度不变自由膨胀和不可压缩源流两种非平衡场景进行数学分析，包括椭圆性丧失和结构正则化证明。
ai.result: 标度不变模型出现对称性破缺不稳定性，需几何截断；不可压缩流则存在唯一、光滑且严格凹的解。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解物理守恒律如何确保高速中心流中优化构型的正则性和对称性。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the nonlinear dynamics of Newton's problem of minimal resistance in radial fields, analyzing two non-equilibrium scenarios and finding that the scale-invariant model suffers from symmetry-breaking instability while incompressible flow acts as a structural regularizer ensuring regularity and symmetry.
en.motivation: To go beyond classical translational symmetry and explore nonlinear dynamics of minimal resistance in radial fields.
en.method: Mathematical analysis of two non-equilibrium scenarios: scale-invariant free expansion and incompressible source flow, including loss of ellipticity and structural regularization proof.
en.result: Scale-invariant model exhibits symmetry-breaking instability requiring geometric truncation; incompressible flow admits unique, smooth, and strictly concave solutions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how physical conservation laws ensure regularity and symmetry of optimal configurations in high-speed central flows.

idea_spark.idea: Introduce incompressibility constraints into other optimization problems to eliminate instabilities and ensure solution smoothness.
idea_spark.risk: Constraints may overly restrict the solution space, leading to suboptimal solutions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Physical conservation laws (e.g., incompressibility) can serve as mathematical regularization tools, inspiring design of more stable optimization algorithms.

papers.title: Predicting Response to Neoadjuvant Chemotherapy in Ovarian Cancer from CT Baseline Using Multi-Loss Deep Learning
papers.summary: Ovarian cancer is the most lethal gynecologic malignancy: around 60% of patients are diagnosed at an advanced stage, with an associated 5-year survival rate of about 30%. Early identification of non-responders to neoadjuvant chemotherapy remains a key unmet need, as it could prevent ineffective therapy and avoid delays in optimal surgical management. This work proposes a non-invasive deep learning framework to predict neoadjuvant chemotherapy response from pre-treatment contrast-enhanced CT by leveraging automatically derived 3D lesion masks. The approach encodes axial slices with a partially fine-tuned pretrained image encoder and aggregates slice-level representations into a volumetric embedding through an attention-based module. Training combines classification loss with supervised contrastive regularization and hard-negative mining to improve separation between ambiguous responders and non-responders. The method was developed on a retrospective single-center cohort from the European Institute of Oncology (Milan, IT), including 280 eligible patients (147 responder, 133 non-responder). On the test cohort, the model achieved a ROC-AUC of 0.73 (95% CI: 0.58-0.86) and an F1-score of 0.70 (95% CI: 0.56-0.82). Overall, these results suggest that the proposed architecture learns clinically relevant predictive patterns and provides a robust foundation for an imaging-based stratification tool.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于CT基线影像的多损失深度学习框架，预测卵巢癌新辅助化疗反应，在280例患者队列中达到0.73的ROC-AUC。
ai.motivation: 卵巢癌晚期患者对化疗反应差异大，早期识别无反应者可避免无效治疗和手术延误。
ai.method: 利用预训练图像编码器提取轴向切片特征，通过注意力模块聚合为三维嵌入，结合分类损失、监督对比正则化和难例挖掘进行训练。
ai.result: 测试集ROC-AUC为0.73，F1分数为0.70。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种非侵入性影像学工具，辅助临床决策新辅助化疗方案。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多模态数据（如临床指标、基因组学）进一步提升预测性能。
idea_spark.risk: 单中心回顾性数据可能限制泛化性，需多中心验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 注意力机制与对比学习结合可有效处理医学影像中的类间模糊问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a multi-loss deep learning framework using CT baseline to predict neoadjuvant chemotherapy response in ovarian cancer, achieving ROC-AUC of 0.73 on 280 patients.
en.motivation: Early identification of non-responders to neoadjuvant chemotherapy can prevent ineffective therapy and avoid surgical delays in advanced ovarian cancer.
en.method: Encodes axial slices with a pretrained image encoder, aggregates slice representations via attention, and trains with classification loss, supervised contrastive regularization, and hard-negative mining.
en.result: Test cohort ROC-AUC 0.73, F1-score 0.70.

papers.title: WHTDM: Walsh-Hadamard Transform Division Multiplexing for Doubly-Selective Channels
papers.summary: We propose Walsh-Hadamard Transform Division Multiplexing (WHTDM), a multicarrier waveform that replaces the conventional IFFT/FFT pair in OFDM with a real-valued, unitary Walsh-Hadamard transform (WHT). WHTDM inherits the CP-OFDM transceiver structure while eliminating all complex multiplications from the transform stage, yielding a transmitter with zero real multipliers in the core modulation block. For detection under doubly-selective channels, we adopt a cross-domain memory approximate message passing (CD-MAMP) equalizer that operates on the banded structure of the equivalent WHT-domain channel matrix. Simulation results under the 3GPP TDL-C channel model at 28 GHz demonstrate that WHTDM with CD-MAMP significantly outperforms conventional OFDM 1-tap MMSE at high mobility, achieving over an order of magnitude lower BER at 120 km/h. Among the compared CD-MAMP-equalized new waveforms, WHTDM achieves the best BER performance while maintaining a transmitter complexity 2.5 $\times$ lower than OFDM and completely eliminating complex multipliers from the transform stage, making it well-suited for low-power IoT terminals.

ai.tldr: 提出WHTDM，用Walsh-Hadamard变换替代OFDM的IFFT/FFT，结合跨域记忆近似消息传递均衡器，在高移动性下显著优于传统OFDM，且发射机复杂度降低2.5倍。
ai.motivation: OFDM在高移动性双选信道下性能下降，且IFFT/FFT需要大量复数乘法，不适合低功耗IoT终端。
ai.method: 采用实值酉Walsh-Hadamard变换替代IFFT/FFT，保留CP-OFDM收发结构，消除变换级所有复数乘法；接收端使用CD-MAMP均衡器利用等效WHT域信道矩阵的带状结构。
ai.result: 在28 GHz 3GPP TDL-C信道模型下，120 km/h时WHTDM+CD-MAMP的BER比OFDM 1-tap MMSE低一个数量级以上，且发射机复杂度仅为OFDM的40%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种低复杂度、高移动性鲁棒的波形设计方案，适合IoT和高速移动通信场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将WHT与CD-MAMP结合，利用带状矩阵结构降低均衡复杂度，同时保持优异性能。
idea_spark.risk: WHT域信道矩阵的带状近似在极端多径环境下可能失效，需验证实际信道适配性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 用实值变换替代复数变换以降低硬件成本，同时通过跨域迭代均衡弥补变换带来的性能损失。

idea_spark.risk: WHT域信道矩阵的带状近似在极端多径环境下可能失效，需验证实际信道适配性。

en.tldr: Proposes WHTDM, replacing OFDM's IFFT/FFT with Walsh-Hadamard transform, combined with cross-domain memory approximate message passing equalizer, significantly outperforming conventional OFDM under high mobility while reducing transmitter complexity by 2.5×.
en.motivation: OFDM suffers performance degradation under doubly-selective channels and requires complex multiplications, unsuitable for low-power IoT terminals.
en.method: Replaces IFFT/FFT with real-valued unitary Walsh-Hadamard transform, retaining CP-OFDM structure and eliminating all complex multiplications in the transform stage; receiver uses CD-MAMP equalizer exploiting the banded structure of the equivalent WHT-domain channel matrix.
en.result: Under 28 GHz 3GPP TDL-C channel model at 120 km/h, WHTDM+CD-MAMP achieves over an order of magnitude lower BER than OFDM 1-tap MMSE, with transmitter complexity 2.5× lower than OFDM.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-complexity, high-mobility robust waveform design suitable for IoT and high-speed mobile communications.

idea_spark.idea: Combine WHT with CD-MAMP, exploiting banded matrix structure to reduce equalization complexity while maintaining excellent performance.
idea_spark.risk: The banded approximation of the WHT-domain channel matrix may fail under extreme multipath conditions; actual channel adaptability needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Replace complex transforms with real-valued ones to reduce hardware cost, and compensate performance loss via cross-domain iterative equalization.

papers.title: Aligning Latent Geometry for Spherical Flow Matching in Image Generation
papers.summary: Latent flow matching for image generation usually transports Gaussian noise to variational autoencoder latents along linear paths. Both endpoints, however, concentrate in thin spherical shells, and a Euclidean chord leaves those shells even when preprocessing aligns their radii. By decomposing each latent token into radial and angular components, we show through component-swap probes that decoded perceptual and semantic content is carried predominantly by direction, with radius contributing much less. We therefore project data latents onto a fixed token radius, use the radial projection of Gaussian noise as the spherical prior, finetune the decoder with the encoder frozen, and replace linear interpolation with spherical linear interpolation. The resulting geodesic paths stay on the sphere at every timestep, and their velocity targets are purely angular by construction. Under matched training, the method consistently improves class-conditional ImageNet-256 FID across different image tokenizers, leaves the diffusion architecture unchanged, and requires no auxiliary encoder or representation-alignment objective.

ai.tldr: 提出一种球形流匹配方法，通过将潜变量投影到固定半径球面并采用球面线性插值，使生成路径完全位于球面上，从而提升图像生成质量。
ai.motivation: 标准潜流匹配中，高斯噪声和VAE潜变量都集中在薄球壳上，但欧几里得线性插值路径会离开球壳，导致生成效果不佳。
ai.method: 将每个潜变量token分解为径向和角度分量，固定径向半径为常数，将高斯噪声径向投影作为球面先验，冻结编码器微调解码器，并用球面线性插值替代线性插值。
ai.result: 在ImageNet-256上，该方法在不同图像分词器下一致提升FID，且不改变扩散架构，无需额外编码器或对齐目标。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需复杂修改即可提升现有潜流匹配生成模型性能的几何对齐技巧。

idea_spark.idea: 将潜变量强制约束在球面上，并利用球面插值保持路径几何一致性，可能启发更广泛的流形学习生成方法。
idea_spark.risk: 固定半径可能丢失部分语义信息，且对解码器微调要求较高，可能不适用于所有数据集。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从潜变量的径向/角度分解出发，探索其他非欧几何结构（如双曲空间）在生成模型中的应用。

idea_spark.risk: 固定半径可能丢失部分语义信息，且对解码器微调要求较高，可能不适用于所有数据集。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从潜变量的径向/角度分解出发，探索其他非欧几何结构（如双曲空间）在生成模型中的应用。

en.tldr: Proposes a spherical flow matching method that projects latents onto a fixed-radius sphere and uses spherical linear interpolation, keeping paths on the sphere to improve image generation quality.
en.motivation: In standard latent flow matching, both Gaussian noise and VAE latents concentrate on thin spherical shells, but Euclidean linear interpolation leaves those shells, degrading generation.
en.method: Decomposes each latent token into radial and angular components, fixes the radial radius, uses the radial projection of Gaussian noise as spherical prior, finetunes the decoder with frozen encoder, and replaces linear interpolation with spherical linear interpolation.
en.result: On ImageNet-256, the method consistently improves FID across different image tokenizers without changing the diffusion architecture or requiring extra encoders or alignment objectives.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simple geometric alignment trick to boost existing latent flow matching generative models without major modifications.

idea_spark.idea: Constraining latents to a sphere and using spherical interpolation to maintain path geometry may inspire broader manifold-based generative methods.
idea_spark.risk: Fixing the radius may lose some semantic information, and decoder finetuning may be demanding, potentially not working for all datasets.
idea_spark.inspiration: From radial/angular decomposition, explore other non-Euclidean geometries (e.g., hyperbolic space) in generative models.

papers.title: Perfect transmission and parallel composition for quantum walks on graphs with two leads
papers.summary: We study scattering for continuous-time quantum walks on finite graphs with two attached leads. We derive explicit formulae for the two-terminal scattering matrix in terms of characteristic polynomials of the finite graph and its vertex-deleted subgraphs. For real-weighted two-terminal graphs, we then introduce three real quantities, $μ_1$, $μ_2$, and $ν$, which are each additive under parallel composition of graphs. In these variables, perfect transmission at fixed momentum is characterized by the condition $μ_1=μ_2$ together with a hyperbola in the corresponding $(μ,ν)$-plane, whose points determine the transmission phase. This turns the search for graphs with prescribed transmission properties into a geometric vector-sum problem for smaller building blocks.

ai.tldr: 研究了带有两条引线的有限图上连续时间量子游走的散射问题，推导了双端散射矩阵的显式公式，并引入三个可加量来刻画完美传输条件。
ai.motivation: 为量子游走中的完美传输和并行组合提供解析框架，便于设计具有特定传输性质的图结构。
ai.method: 利用特征多项式及其顶点删除子图的多项式表达散射矩阵；引入三个实数量μ₁、μ₂、ν，它们在图的并行组合下可加，并将完美传输条件转化为几何向量和问题。
ai.result: 完美传输由μ₁=μ₂和一条双曲线共同决定，双曲线上的点确定传输相位；并行组合下这些量可加，从而将搜索问题简化为构建块的向量求和。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过图分解和代数条件系统性地构造具有理想传输特性的量子游走系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用并行组合的可加性，将复杂图的传输设计拆解为小模块的向量叠加，可能实现模块化量子电路。
idea_spark.risk: 实际实现中需考虑图权重的物理可行性以及多端口扩展时的复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受电路理论中阻抗加法的启发，将量子游走的传输特性转化为几何向量问题。

idea_spark.risk: 实际实现中需考虑图权重的物理可行性以及多端口扩展时的复杂度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受电路理论中阻抗加法的启发，将量子游走的传输特性转化为几何向量问题。

en.tldr: We study scattering for continuous-time quantum walks on finite graphs with two leads, derive explicit two-terminal scattering matrix formulas, and introduce three additive quantities that characterize perfect transmission.
en.motivation: To provide an analytic framework for perfect transmission and parallel composition in quantum walks, enabling systematic design of graphs with desired transmission properties.
en.method: Express the scattering matrix using characteristic polynomials of the graph and its vertex-deleted subgraphs; introduce three real quantities μ₁, μ₂, ν that are additive under parallel composition, and reduce perfect transmission to a geometric vector-sum condition.
en.result: Perfect transmission is characterized by μ₁=μ₂ together with a hyperbola in the (μ,ν)-plane, whose points determine the transmission phase; these quantities are additive under parallel composition, turning the search into a vector-sum problem for building blocks.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to systematically construct quantum walk systems with desired transmission properties via graph decomposition and algebraic conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit additivity under parallel composition to decompose complex graph transmission design into vector superposition of small modules, potentially enabling modular quantum circuits.
idea_spark.risk: Practical implementation must consider physical feasibility of graph weights and complexity when scaling to multi-port systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by impedance addition in circuit theory, the transmission properties of quantum walks are transformed into a geometric vector problem.

papers.title: On the Necessity of Logarithmic Estimates for Hypoellipticity
papers.summary: This paper is focused on necessary conditions for hypoellipticity of an operator $L$ of the form $L=L_1(x)+g(x)L_2(y)$, where the operator $L_1$ is either elliptic or parabolic, $L_2$ is degenerately elliptic and $g(x)$ may itself vanish adding further degeneracy. First, we establish a logarithmic criterion: if the operator $L$ above is hypoelliptic and $L_1$ has a family of spectral solutions we define in the paper, then the remaining part $L_2$ must gain a power of a logarithm of a derivative. Such a property can be thought of as a restriction on degeneracy of the operator $L_2$. We then use this criterion to examine degenerate elliptic and parabolic operators closing gaps between sufficiency and necessity that have been open since 1980s in three and higher dimensions.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了一类算子L=L1(x)+g(x)L2(y)的亚椭圆性的必要条件，其中L1是椭圆或抛物型，L2是退化椭圆型，g(x)可能进一步退化。建立了对数准则：若L亚椭圆且L1有谱解族，则L2必须获得导数的对数幂，这限制了L2的退化程度。该准则用于检验退化椭圆和抛物算子，填补了自1980年代以来三维及更高维空间中充分性与必要性之间的空白。

en.tldr: This paper establishes necessary conditions for hypoellipticity of operators of the form L = L1(x) + g(x)L2(y), where L1 is elliptic or parabolic, L2 is degenerately elliptic, and g(x) may vanish. A logarithmic criterion is proved: if L is hypoelliptic and L1 has a family of spectral solutions, then L2 must gain a power of a logarithm of a derivative, restricting the degeneracy of L2. This criterion is applied to degenerate elliptic and parabolic operators, closing gaps between sufficiency and necessity that have been open since the 1980s in three and higher dimensions.
en.motivation: To close the long-standing gap between sufficient and necessary conditions for hypoellipticity of degenerate elliptic and parabolic operators, especially in dimensions three and higher.
en.method: Construction of spectral solution families and derivation of a logarithmic necessary condition, applied to degenerate elliptic and parabolic operators.
en.result: A necessary condition requiring L2 to gain a logarithmic power of a derivative for hypoellipticity, with applications to various degenerate cases.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new necessary criterion for hypoellipticity, helping to understand the fundamental limitations of degeneracy in partial differential operators.

idea_spark.idea: Combining spectral families with logarithmic gains could be used to study subellipticity or other weak regularity notions.
idea_spark.risk: The logarithmic condition may be too restrictive; practical applications require verifying the existence of spectral solution families.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from classical elliptic and parabolic theory, explore new regularity boundaries via logarithmic corrections of degenerate terms.

papers.title: Universal quantum resource distillation via composite generalised quantum Stein's lemma
papers.summary: The performance of quantum resource manipulation protocols, including key examples such as distillation of quantum entanglement, is measured in terms of the rate at which desired target states can be produced from a given noisy state. However, to achieve optimal rates, known protocols require precise tailoring to the quantum state in question, demanding a perfect knowledge of the input and allowing no errors in its preparation. Here we show that distillation of quantum resources in the framework of resource non-generating operations can be performed universally: optimal rates of distillation can be achieved with no knowledge of the input state whatsoever, certifying the robustness of quantum resource distillation. The findings apply in particular to the purification of quantum entanglement under non-entangling maps, where the optimal rates are governed by the regularised relative entropy of entanglement. Our result relies on an extension of the generalised quantum Stein's lemma in quantum hypothesis testing to a composite setting where the null hypothesis is no longer a fixed quantum state, but is rather composed of i.i.d. copies of an unknown state. The solution of this asymptotic problem is made possible through new developments in one-shot quantum information and a refinement of the blurring technique from [Lami, arXiv:2408.06410].

ai.tldr: 提出了一种通用量子资源蒸馏协议，无需知道输入态的任何信息即可达到最优速率，并扩展了广义量子Stein引理到复合假设检验场景。
ai.motivation: 现有量子资源蒸馏协议需要精确了解输入态并允许无误差制备，限制了其普适性和鲁棒性。
ai.method: 通过将广义量子Stein引理扩展到复合假设检验（零假设为未知态的i.i.d.副本），结合单次量子信息论和模糊化技术。
ai.result: 在资源非生成操作框架下，量子资源蒸馏可通用实现，最优速率由正则化相对熵决定，尤其适用于非纠缠映射下的纠缠纯化。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解量子资源蒸馏的通用性及其理论基础，为设计无需先验知识的量子信息处理协议提供指导。

idea_spark.idea: 利用模糊化技术处理未知态的不确定性，结合单次信息论实现渐近最优速率。
idea_spark.risk: 实际实现中可能面临高计算复杂度或对噪声模型的敏感性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发探索其他量子信息任务（如量子纠错、量子密钥分发）中的通用协议设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a universal quantum resource distillation protocol achieving optimal rates without any knowledge of the input state, extending the generalized quantum Stein's lemma to composite hypothesis testing.
en.motivation: Existing protocols require precise knowledge of the input state and error-free preparation, limiting universality and robustness.
en.method: Extends the generalized quantum Stein's lemma to composite hypothesis testing (null hypothesis as i.i.d. copies of an unknown state), using one-shot quantum information theory and a blurring technique.
en.result: Under resource non-generating operations, quantum resource distillation is universal; optimal rates are governed by regularized relative entropy, especially for entanglement purification under non-entangling maps.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the universality of quantum resource distillation and its theoretical foundation, guiding the design of prior-knowledge-free quantum information protocols.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage blurring technique to handle unknown state uncertainty, combined with one-shot information theory for asymptotic optimal rates.
idea_spark.risk: Practical implementation may face high computational complexity or sensitivity to noise models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires exploration of universal protocol design in other quantum information tasks (e.g., quantum error correction, quantum key distribution).

papers.title: BEAM: Binary Expert Activation Masking for Dynamic Routing in MoE
papers.summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures enhance the efficiency of large language models by activating only a subset of experts per token. However, standard MoE employs a fixed Top-K routing strategy, leading to redundant computation and suboptimal inference latency. Existing acceleration methods either require costly retraining with architectural changes or suffer from severe performance drop at high sparsity due to train-inference mismatch. To address these limitations, we propose BEAM (Binary Expert Activation Masking), a novel method that learns token-adaptive expert selection via trainable binary masks. With a straight-through estimator and an auxiliary regularization loss, BEAM induces dynamic expert sparsity through end-to-end training while maintaining model capability. We further implement an efficient custom CUDA kernel for BEAM, ensuring seamless integration with the vLLM inference framework. Experiments show that BEAM retains over 98\% of the original model's performance while reducing MoE layer FLOPs by up to 85\%, achieving up to 2.5$\times$ faster decoding and 1.4$\times$ higher throughput, demonstrating its effectiveness as a practical, plug-and-play solution for efficient MoE inference.

ai.tldr: 提出BEAM方法，通过可训练二值掩码实现令牌自适应的专家选择，在保持模型性能的同时大幅降低MoE层计算量。
ai.motivation: 标准MoE使用固定Top-K路由策略导致冗余计算和次优推理延迟，现有加速方法要么需要昂贵重训练，要么在高稀疏度下性能严重下降。
ai.method: 学习令牌自适应的专家选择，使用直通估计器和辅助正则化损失进行端到端训练，并实现自定义CUDA内核以集成vLLM推理框架。
ai.result: 保留98%以上原始模型性能，MoE层FLOPs降低85%，解码速度提升2.5倍，吞吐量提升1.4倍。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种即插即用的MoE推理加速方案，无需架构修改即可显著提升效率。

idea_spark.idea: 将BEAM与量化或剪枝结合，进一步压缩模型。
idea_spark.risk: 二值掩码训练可能不稳定，需要仔细调节正则化损失。
idea_spark.inspiration: 动态稀疏性可通过端到端学习自动发现，启发更灵活的路由策略设计。

papers.title: MetaBackdoor: Exploiting Positional Encoding as a Backdoor Attack Surface in LLMs
papers.summary: Backdoor attacks pose a serious security threat to large language models (LLMs), which are increasingly deployed as general-purpose assistants in safety- and privacy-critical applications. Existing LLM backdoors rely primarily on content-based triggers, requiring explicit modification of the input text. In this work, we show that this assumption is unnecessary and limiting. We introduce MetaBackdoor, a new class of backdoor attacks that exploits positional information as the trigger, without modifying textual content. Our key insight is that Transformer-based LLMs necessarily encode token positions to process ordered sequences. As a result, length-correlated positional structure is reflected in the model's internal computation and can be used as an effective non-content trigger signal.   We demonstrate that even a simple length-based positional trigger is sufficient to activate stealthy backdoors. Unlike prior attacks, MetaBackdoor operates on visibly and semantically clean inputs and enables qualitatively new capabilities. We show that a backdoored LLM can be induced to disclose sensitive internal information, including proprietary system prompts, once a length condition is satisfied. We further demonstrate a self-activation scenario, where normal multi-turn interaction can move the conversation context into the trigger region and induce malicious tool-call behavior without attacker-supplied trigger text. In addition, MetaBackdoor is orthogonal to content-based backdoors and can be composed with them to create more precise and harder-to-detect activation conditions.   Our results expand the threat model of LLM backdoors by revealing positional encoding as a previously overlooked attack surface. This challenges defenses that focus on detecting suspicious text and highlights the need for new defense strategies that explicitly account for positional triggers in modern LLM architectures.

ai.tldr: 提出一种利用位置编码作为触发器的后门攻击方法，无需修改输入文本，可诱导模型泄露系统提示或执行恶意工具调用。
ai.motivation: 现有后门攻击依赖内容触发器，需要修改输入文本，限制了攻击的隐蔽性和能力。
ai.method: 利用Transformer位置编码对序列长度的敏感性，设计基于长度的位置触发器，使模型在满足长度条件时激活后门行为。
ai.result: 在干净输入上成功激活后门，实现系统提示泄露、自激活工具调用，并能与内容后门组合提高精确性和隐蔽性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解LLM后门攻击的新威胁面，提升对位置编码安全风险的认识。

idea_spark.idea: 探索利用位置编码的其它属性（如相对位置、旋转位置编码）设计更隐蔽的触发器。
idea_spark.risk: 攻击可能绕过基于文本内容的防御机制，增加检测难度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发设计针对位置编码的防御策略，如位置扰动或长度无关的编码方案。

en.tldr: Proposes a backdoor attack using positional encoding as a trigger, requiring no text modification, capable of leaking system prompts or inducing malicious tool calls.
en.motivation: Existing backdoor attacks rely on content-based triggers requiring explicit text modification, limiting stealth and capability.
en.method: Exploits Transformer positional encoding's sensitivity to sequence length, using length-based positional triggers to activate backdoor behavior when length condition is met.
en.result: Successfully activates backdoor on clean inputs, achieves system prompt leakage, self-activation of tool calls, and can combine with content backdoors for higher precision and stealth.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand a new threat surface in LLM backdoor attacks, raising awareness of positional encoding security risks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore other properties of positional encoding (e.g., relative position, rotary position encoding) to design more stealthy triggers.
idea_spark.risk: Attack may bypass text-content-based defenses, increasing detection difficulty.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires designing defenses against positional triggers, such as position perturbation or length-agnostic encoding schemes.

papers.title: Sharp Phase Transition for the Formation of Infinite Tubes
papers.summary: Classical bond percolation theory studies the conditions for a given point in a random graph to be connected to infinity, or "escape" to infinity, via a sequence of random edges. In this work, we present a higher-dimensional generalization of this question, asking whether a fixed loop (or, more generally, a topological sphere) can escape to infinity via a tube formed by random plaquettes. We refer to this phenomenon as tube percolation. We first compare tube percolation with previously studied higher-dimensional percolation phenomena, including face and cycle percolation. For tubes of codimension one, we further relate the critical probability for tube percolation to those for percolation of finite clusters and shielded percolation in the dual bond percolation model. Next, we introduce a tubular analogue of the classical one-arm event, the tubular one-arm event, and prove that it exhibits a sharp threshold at criticality: below criticality, its probability decays exponentially in scale, whereas above criticality, it admits a mean-field-type lower bound. The proof relies on the O'Donnell-Saks-Schramm-Servedio (OSSS) inequality together with an exploration algorithm adapted to the topology of tubes. Finally, we study the tubular box-crossing property. Unlike ordinary path connectedness, "tube connectedness" is not transitive, and thus there is no natural notion of clusters. Nevertheless, we establish an analogue of the uniqueness of the infinite cluster from classical bond percolation. Combining this result with the sharp threshold for the tubular one-arm event, we prove that the existence of a box-crossing tube also exhibits a sharp threshold.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了管状渗流（tube percolation）的概念，研究固定环或拓扑球面能否通过随机plaquettes形成的管状结构逃逸至无穷远，并证明了管状单臂事件在临界点处存在尖锐相变。
ai.motivation: 经典键渗流研究点与无穷远的连通性，本文将其推广到高维，探索环或拓扑球面通过管状结构逃逸的条件。
ai.method: 利用OSSS不等式和适应管状拓扑的探索算法，证明管状单臂事件概率在临界点以下指数衰减、以上满足平均场下界；并建立管状盒交叉的尖锐阈值。
ai.result: 管状单臂事件在临界点处呈现尖锐相变；管状盒交叉的存在性同样具有尖锐阈值；证明了管状渗流中无限管状结构的唯一性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解高维渗流中管状结构的相变行为，为拓扑渗流理论提供新的分析工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将管状单臂事件的尖锐阈值方法应用于实际网络（如脑网络、社交网络）的环状结构连通性分析。
idea_spark.risk: 实际网络中的环状结构可能不满足随机性假设，导致理论适用性受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典渗流中单臂事件和盒交叉性质的启发，本文将其推广到管状拓扑，为高维渗流研究开辟新方向。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典渗流中单臂事件和盒交叉性质的启发，本文将其推广到管状拓扑，为高维渗流研究开辟新方向。

en.tldr: This paper introduces tube percolation, studying whether a fixed loop or topological sphere can escape to infinity via tubes formed by random plaquettes, and proves a sharp phase transition for the tubular one-arm event at criticality.
en.motivation: Classical bond percolation studies point-to-infinity connectivity; this work generalizes to higher dimensions, exploring escape of loops or spheres via tubular structures.
en.method: Using the OSSS inequality and an exploration algorithm adapted to tube topology, we prove exponential decay below criticality and mean-field lower bound above for the tubular one-arm probability; we also establish a sharp threshold for tubular box-crossing.
en.result: The tubular one-arm event exhibits a sharp phase transition at criticality; tubular box-crossing also has a sharp threshold; uniqueness of the infinite tube cluster is proved.
en.help_to_user: Provides insights into phase transitions of tubular structures in higher-dimensional percolation, offering new analytical tools for topological percolation theory.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the sharp threshold method for tubular one-arm events to analyze loop connectivity in real-world networks such as brain networks or social networks.
idea_spark.risk: Real-world networks may not satisfy the randomness assumptions, limiting theoretical applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by classical one-arm events and box-crossing properties, this work extends them to tubular topology, opening new directions in higher-dimensional percolation.

papers.title: SpectraFlow: Unifying Structural Pretraining and Frequency Adaptation for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.summary: Medical image segmentation remains challenging in low-data regimes, where scarce annotations often yield poor generalization and ambiguous boundaries with missing fine structures. Recent self-supervised pretraining has improved transferability, but it often exhibits a texture bias. In contrast, accurate segmentation is inherently geometry-aware and depends on both topological consistency and precise boundary preservation. To address this problem, we propose a two-stage framework that couples structure-aware encoder pretraining with boundary-oriented decoding. In Stage-1, we aim to learn structure-aware representations for downstream segmentation in low-data regimes. To this end, we propose Mixed-Domain MeanFlow Pretraining, which aligns images and binary masks in a shared latent space through latent transport regression, where masks act as conditional structural guidance rather than prediction targets, making the pretraining task-agnostic. To further improve training stability under scarce supervision, we incorporate a lightweight Dispersive Loss to prevent representation collapse. In Stage-2, we fine-tune the pretrained encoder with a lightweight decoder that combines Direct Attentional Fusion for adaptive cross-scale gating and Frequency-Directional Dynamic Convolution for high-frequency boundary refinement under appearance variation. Experiments on ISIC-2016, Kvasir-SEG, and GlaS demonstrate consistent gains over state-of-the-art methods, with improved robustness in low-data settings and sharper boundary delineation.

ai.tldr: 提出SpectraFlow两阶段框架，通过结构感知预训练和频率自适应解码，提升低数据下医学图像分割的边界清晰度。
ai.motivation: 低数据场景下医学图像分割泛化差、边界模糊，现有自监督预训练存在纹理偏差，而准确分割依赖几何拓扑和边界保持。
ai.method: 第一阶段用混合域均值流预训练对齐图像与掩码的潜在空间，并加入分散损失防止表示坍缩；第二阶段用直接注意力融合和频率方向动态卷积进行边界细化。
ai.result: 在ISIC-2016、Kvasir-SEG和GlaS上超越现有方法，低数据设置下鲁棒性更强，边界更锐利。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种结合结构预训练与频率适应的分割框架，适用于标注稀缺的医学图像分析任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将频率方向动态卷积与注意力融合结合，在解码阶段自适应增强高频边界，可推广至任意分割网络。
idea_spark.risk: 预训练阶段依赖二值掩码作为条件引导，可能对掩码质量敏感；频率卷积计算开销需评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用潜在空间回归而非预测目标进行预训练，启发设计更通用的自监督范式。

idea_spark.risk: 预训练阶段依赖二值掩码作为条件引导，可能对掩码质量敏感；频率卷积计算开销需评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用潜在空间回归而非预测目标进行预训练，启发设计更通用的自监督范式。

en.tldr: Proposes SpectraFlow, a two-stage framework that unifies structure-aware pretraining and frequency adaptation for sharper medical image segmentation under low data.
en.motivation: Low-data medical segmentation suffers from poor generalization and blurred boundaries; existing self-supervised pretraining exhibits texture bias, while accurate segmentation requires geometric and boundary awareness.
en.method: Stage-1 uses Mixed-Domain MeanFlow Pretraining to align images and masks in latent space with a dispersive loss to avoid collapse; Stage-2 fine-tunes with Direct Attentional Fusion and Frequency-Directional Dynamic Convolution for boundary refinement.
en.result: Outperforms SOTA on ISIC-2016, Kvasir-SEG, and GlaS, with improved robustness and sharper boundaries in low-data regimes.
en.help_to_user: Provides a segmentation framework combining structural pretraining and frequency adaptation, suitable for annotation-scarce medical imaging tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Combining frequency-directional dynamic convolution with attention fusion for adaptive high-frequency boundary enhancement can be plugged into any segmentation network.
idea_spark.risk: Pretraining relies on binary masks as conditional guidance, which may be sensitive to mask quality; frequency convolution overhead needs evaluation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using latent space regression instead of prediction targets for pretraining inspires more general self-supervised paradigms.

papers.title: CineMesh4D: Personalized 4D Whole Heart Reconstruction from Sparse Cine MRI
papers.summary: Accurate 3D+t whole-heart mesh reconstruction from cine MRI is a clinically crucial yet technically challenging task. The difficulty of this task arises from two coupled factors: inherently sparse sampling of 3D cardiac anatomy by 2D image slices and the tight coupling between cardiac shape and motion. Current cardiac image-to-mesh approaches typically reconstruct only a subset of cardiac chambers or a single phase of the cardiac cycle. In this work, we propose CineMesh4D, a novel end-to-end 4D (3D+t) pipeline that directly reconstructs patient-specific whole-heart mesh from multi-view 2D cine MRI via cross-domain mapping. Specifically, we introduce a differentiable rendering loss that enables supervision of 3D+t whole-heart mesh from multi-view sparse contours of cine MRI. Furthermore, we develop a dual-context temporal block that fuses global and local cardiac temporal information to capture high-dimensional sequential patterns. In quantitative and qualitative evaluations, CineMesh4D outperforms existing approaches in terms of reconstruction quality and motion consistency, providing a practical pathway for personalized real-time cardiac assessment. The code will be publicly released once the manuscript is accepted.

ai.tldr: 提出CineMesh4D，从稀疏2D电影MRI直接重建个性化4D全心网格，通过可微渲染损失和双上下文时间模块提升重建质量与运动一致性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法仅重建部分心腔或单一时相，无法实现全心动周期、全心的精确4D网格重建。
ai.method: 端到端4D管道，利用可微渲染损失从多视角稀疏轮廓监督3D+t网格，并设计双上下文时间模块融合全局与局部时序信息。
ai.result: 在定量和定性评估中，重建质量和运动一致性优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何从临床常规稀疏电影MRI数据生成个性化、时间连续的全心4D网格。

idea_spark.idea: 利用可微渲染将2D轮廓监督直接作用于3D网格，避免中间体素表示。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖多视角轮廓标注，可能受限于临床数据获取难度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将渲染损失用于医学图像到网格的直接映射，启发其他器官的4D重建。

zh.tldr: 提出CineMesh4D，从稀疏2D电影MRI直接重建个性化4D全心网格，通过可微渲染损失和双上下文时间模块提升重建质量与运动一致性。

zh.result: 在定量和定性评估中，重建质量和运动一致性优于现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何从临床常规稀疏电影MRI数据生成个性化、时间连续的全心4D网格。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖多视角轮廓标注，可能受限于临床数据获取难度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将渲染损失用于医学图像到网格的直接映射，启发其他器官的4D重建。

en.tldr: Proposes CineMesh4D, an end-to-end pipeline that directly reconstructs personalized 4D whole-heart mesh from sparse 2D cine MRI using differentiable rendering loss and a dual-context temporal block, achieving superior reconstruction quality and motion consistency.
en.motivation: Existing methods reconstruct only partial chambers or a single cardiac phase, failing to provide full-cycle, whole-heart 4D mesh.
en.method: End-to-end 4D pipeline with differentiable rendering loss to supervise 3D+t mesh from multi-view sparse contours, and a dual-context temporal block to capture global and local temporal patterns.
en.result: Outperforms existing approaches in reconstruction quality and motion consistency in both quantitative and qualitative evaluations.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to generate personalized, temporally coherent 4D whole-heart meshes from routine sparse cine MRI data.

idea_spark.idea: Use differentiable rendering to directly supervise 3D mesh from 2D contours, bypassing intermediate volumetric representations.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on multi-view contour annotations, which may be limited in clinical practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Applying rendering loss to direct medical image-to-mesh mapping inspires 4D reconstruction of other organs.

papers.title: Implicit spatial-frequency fusion of hyperspectral and lidar data via kolmogorov-arnold networks
papers.summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification is challenging in complex scenes due to spectral ambiguity, spatial heterogeneity, and the strong coupling between material properties and geometric structures. Although LiDAR provides complementary elevation information, most HSI-LiDAR fusion methods rely on CNNs or MLPs with fixed activation functions and linear weights. These methods struggle to model structural discontinuities in LiDAR data, intricate spectral features of HSI, and their interactions. In addition, fusion of the two modalities in both spatial and frequency domains with LiDAR guidance remains underexplored.   To address these issues, we propose the Implicit Frequency-Geometry Fusion Network (IFGNet), which leverages Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs) with learnable spline-based functions to adaptively capture highly nonlinear relationships between hyperspectral and LiDAR features. Furthermore, IFGNet introduces a LiDAR-guided implicit aggregation module in both spatial and frequency domains, enhancing geometry-aware spatial representations while capturing global structural patterns.   Experiments on the Houston 2013 and MUUFL benchmarks demonstrate that IFGNet consistently outperforms existing fusion methods in overall accuracy, average accuracy, and Cohen's Kappa, while maintaining an efficient architecture.

ai.tldr: 提出IFGNet，利用KAN网络和LiDAR引导的隐式空间-频率融合，提升高光谱图像分类精度。
ai.motivation: 现有HSI-LiDAR融合方法依赖固定激活函数的CNN/MLP，难以建模结构不连续、光谱细节及模态交互，且空间-频率双域融合未充分探索。
ai.method: 采用KAN的可学习样条函数自适应捕获非线性关系，并设计LiDAR引导的隐式聚合模块，同时在空间域和频率域增强几何感知与全局结构模式。
ai.result: 在Houston 2013和MUUFL基准上，IFGNet在总体精度、平均精度和Kappa系数上均优于现有融合方法，且架构高效。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种新的多模态遥感数据融合思路，尤其适用于复杂场景下的地物分类任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将LiDAR引导的隐式聚合扩展到时间序列遥感数据，实现动态场景下的自适应融合。
idea_spark.risk: KAN的样条函数可能增加训练复杂度，需平衡可解释性与计算效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受KAN替代MLP的启发，可探索其他可微参数化函数（如径向基函数）用于多模态特征交互。

zh.tldr: 提出IFGNet，利用KAN网络和LiDAR引导的隐式空间-频率融合，提升高光谱图像分类精度。
zh.motivation: 现有HSI-LiDAR融合方法依赖固定激活函数的CNN/MLP，难以建模结构不连续、光谱细节及模态交互，且空间-频率双域融合未充分探索。
zh.method: 采用KAN的可学习样条函数自适应捕获非线性关系，并设计LiDAR引导的隐式聚合模块，同时在空间域和频率域增强几何感知与全局结构模式。
