en.tldr: Proposes XDomainBench, a diagnostic benchmark for reasoning collapse in high-dimensional scientific knowledge composition by LLMs.
en.motivation: Existing benchmarks focus on single-turn restricted scenarios, failing to capture compositional generalization boundaries in interactive scientific workflows.
en.method: Formalizes composition order and mixture structure, constructing 8,598 interactive sessions across 20 domains, 4 task categories, and 8 trajectory patterns.
en.result: Large-scale evaluation reveals systematic reasoning collapse as composition order increases, due to difficulty increase and interaction-amplified failures like error accumulation and domain confusion.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers systematically evaluate and diagnose LLM reasoning deficiencies in interdisciplinary knowledge composition tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Based on diagnostic results, design adaptive prompting or training methods that dynamically inject domain knowledge or correct error accumulation as composition order increases.
idea_spark.risk: The benchmark may not cover all real-world scientific workflow complexities, and LLM reasoning collapse patterns may evolve with model updates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by how human experts gradually integrate knowledge in interdisciplinary collaboration, simulating a progressive composition process from single to multiple domains.

papers.title: Rethinking the Good Enough Embedding for Easy Few-Shot Learning
papers.summary: The field of deep visual recognition is undergoing a paradigm shift toward universal representations. The Platonic Representation Hypothesis suggests that diverse architectures trained on massive datasets are converging toward a shared, "ideal" latent space. This again raises a critical question: is a "Good Embedding All You Need?" In this paper, we leverage this convergence to demonstrate that off-the-shelf embeddings are inherently "good enough" for complex tasks, rendering intensive task-specific fine-tuning unnecessary. We explore this hypothesis within the few-shot learning framework, proposing a straightforward, non-parametric pipeline that entirely bypasses backpropagation. By utilizing a k-Nearest Neighbor classifier on frozen DINOv2-L features, we conduct a layer-wise characterization to identify an optimal feature extraction. We further demonstrate that manifold refinement via PCA and ICA provides a beneficial regularizing effect. Our results across four major benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently surpasses sophisticated meta-learning algorithms, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

ai.tldr: 本文证明现成的视觉嵌入（如DINOv2-L）已足够好，无需微调即可在少样本学习中超越元学习算法。
ai.motivation: 探索通用表示收敛背景下，是否无需任务特定微调即可利用现成嵌入解决复杂少样本学习问题。
ai.method: 使用冻结的DINOv2-L特征，通过逐层分析选择最优层，结合k近邻分类器，并利用PCA和ICA进行流形精炼。
ai.result: 在四个基准上一致超越复杂元学习方法，达到最先进性能。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种简单、非参数的少样本学习基线，降低计算成本，便于快速部署。

idea_spark.idea: 将流形精炼（PCA+ICA）与逐层特征选择结合，作为通用嵌入的后处理步骤。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预训练模型质量，在分布外场景下性能可能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Platonic Representation Hypothesis启发，验证了通用嵌入的充分性，挑战了微调的必要性。

zh.tldr: 本文证明现成的视觉嵌入（如DINOv2-L）已足够好，无需微调即可在少样本学习中超越元学习算法。

en.tldr: This paper shows that off-the-shelf embeddings (e.g., DINOv2-L) are good enough for few-shot learning, surpassing meta-learning methods without fine-tuning.
en.motivation: To explore whether task-specific fine-tuning is unnecessary for complex few-shot learning tasks given the convergence of universal representations.
en.method: Uses frozen DINOv2-L features with layer-wise selection, a k-Nearest Neighbor classifier, and manifold refinement via PCA and ICA.
en.result: Consistently outperforms sophisticated meta-learning algorithms on four benchmarks, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
en.help_to_user: Provides a simple, non-parametric baseline for few-shot learning, reducing computational cost and enabling rapid deployment.

idea_spark.idea: Combine manifold refinement (PCA+ICA) with layer-wise feature selection as a post-processing step for generic embeddings.
idea_spark.risk: Performance may degrade under distribution shift due to reliance on pretrained model quality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Platonic Representation Hypothesis, validating the sufficiency of generic embeddings and challenging the necessity of fine-tuning.

papers.title: UniTriGen: Unified Triplet Generation of Aligned Visible-Infrared-Label for Few-Shot RGB-T Semantic Segmentation
papers.summary: RGB-T semantic segmentation requires strictly aligned VIS-IR-Label triplets; however, such aligned triplet data are often scarce in real-world scenarios. Existing generative augmentation methods usually adopt cascaded generation paradigms, decomposing joint triplet generation into local conditional processes. As a result, consistency among VIS, IR, and Label in spatial structure, semantic content, and cross-modal details cannot be reliably maintained. To address this issue, we propose UniTriGen, a unified triplet generation framework that directly generates spatially aligned, semantically consistent, and modality complementary VIS-IR-Label triplets under the guidance of text prompts. UniTriGen first introduces a unified triplet generation mechanism, where VIS, IR, and Label are jointly encoded into a shared latent space and modeled with a diffusion process to enforce global cross-modal consistency. Lightweight modality-specific residual adapters are further integrated into this mechanism to accommodate modality-specific imaging characteristics and output formats. To mitigate generation bias caused by imbalanced scene and class distributions in limited paired triplets, UniTriGen also employs a scene-balanced and class-aware few-shot sampling strategy, which induces a more balanced sampling distribution and enhances the scene and class diversity of generated triplets. Experiments show that UniTriGen generates high-quality aligned triplets from limited real paired data, thereby achieving consistent performance improvements across various RGB-T semantic segmentation models.

ai.tldr: 提出UniTriGen，一个统一的三元组生成框架，用于在文本提示引导下直接生成空间对齐、语义一致且模态互补的可见光-红外-标签三元组，解决RGB-T语义分割中标注三元组稀缺的问题。
ai.motivation: RGB-T语义分割需要严格对齐的可见光-红外-标签三元组，但实际场景中此类对齐数据稀缺；现有级联生成方法无法可靠保持三元组在空间结构、语义内容和跨模态细节上的一致性。
ai.method: UniTriGen采用统一三元组生成机制，将可见光、红外和标签联合编码到共享潜在空间，通过扩散过程建模以强制全局跨模态一致性；集成轻量级模态特定残差适配器以适应各模态成像特性和输出格式；并采用场景平衡和类别感知的少样本采样策略缓解生成偏差。
ai.result: 实验表明，UniTriGen能从有限的真实配对数据生成高质量对齐三元组，并在多种RGB-T语义分割模型上取得一致的性能提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从少量对齐的RGB-T数据中生成高质量的三元组，提升语义分割模型在数据稀缺场景下的性能。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将文本提示与扩散模型结合，用于生成其他跨模态对齐数据（如深度-可见光-标签三元组），或引入对抗训练进一步改善生成质量。
idea_spark.risk: 生成的三元组可能仍存在细微不对齐或语义偏差，需要更严格的评估指标；少样本采样策略可能对极端不平衡场景效果有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受文本引导生成和扩散模型在多模态一致性建模上的启发，可进一步研究如何利用预训练语言模型自动生成文本提示以降低人工成本。

en.tldr: Proposes UniTriGen, a unified triplet generation framework that directly produces spatially aligned, semantically consistent, and modality-complementary VIS-IR-Label triplets guided by text prompts, addressing the scarcity of aligned triplets for RGB-T semantic segmentation.
en.motivation: RGB-T semantic segmentation requires strictly aligned VIS-IR-Label triplets, which are scarce in real scenarios; existing cascaded generation methods fail to maintain consistency across spatial structure, semantic content, and cross-modal details.
en.method: UniTriGen introduces a unified triplet generation mechanism that jointly encodes VIS, IR, and Label into a shared latent space and models them with a diffusion process to enforce global cross-modal consistency. Lightweight modality-specific residual adapters handle modality-specific characteristics and output formats. A scene-balanced and class-aware few-shot sampling strategy mitigates generation bias from imbalanced distributions.
en.result: Experiments show UniTriGen generates high-quality aligned triplets from limited real paired data, achieving consistent performance improvements across various RGB-T semantic segmentation models.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate high-quality triplets from limited aligned RGB-T data, boosting semantic segmentation performance in data-scarce scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining text prompts with diffusion models to generate other cross-modal aligned triplets (e.g., depth-VIS-label), or incorporate adversarial training to further improve generation quality.
idea_spark.risk: Generated triplets may still have subtle misalignment or semantic bias, requiring stricter evaluation metrics; the few-shot sampling strategy may be less effective for extremely imbalanced scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by text-guided generation and diffusion models for multimodal consistency, further research could leverage pretrained language models to automatically generate text prompts, reducing manual effort.

papers.title: Hierarchical Image Tokenization for Multi-Scale Image Super Resolution
papers.summary: We introduce a multi-scale Image Super Resolution (ISR) method building on recent advances in Visual Auto-Regressive (VAR) modeling. VAR models break image tokenization into additive, gradually increasing scales, using Residual Quantization (RQ), an approach that aligns perfectly with our target ISR task. Previous works taking advantage of this synergy suffer from two main shortcomings. First, due to the limitations in RQ, they only generate images at a predefined fixed scale, failing to map intermediate outputs to the corresponding image scales. They also rely on large backbones or a large corpus of annotated data to achieve better performance. To address both shortcomings, we introduce two novel components to the VAR training for ISR, aiming at increasing its flexibility and reducing its complexity. In particular, we introduce a) a \textbf{Hierarchical Image Tokenization (HIT)} approach that progressively represents images at different scales while enforcing token overlap across scales, and b) a \textbf{Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) regularization term} that, relying solely on the (LR,HR) pair, encourages the transformer to produce the latter over the former. Our proposed HIT acts as a strong inductive bias for the VAR training, resulting in a small model (300M params vs 1B params of VARSR), that achieves state-of-the-art results without external training data, and that delivers multi-scale outputs with a single forward pass.

ai.tldr: 提出分层图像标记化（HIT）和直接偏好优化（DPO）正则化，实现多尺度图像超分辨率，模型更小且无需外部数据。
ai.motivation: 现有VAR超分辨率方法受限于残差量化，只能生成固定尺度图像，且依赖大骨干网络或大量标注数据。
ai.method: 引入分层图像标记化（HIT）逐步表示不同尺度图像并强制跨尺度标记重叠，以及直接偏好优化（DPO）正则化项仅利用（低分辨率，高分辨率）对鼓励生成高分辨率输出。
ai.result: 300M参数模型达到最先进结果，无需外部训练数据，单次前向传播输出多尺度结果。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效的多尺度超分辨率方法，适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将分层标记化与偏好优化结合，作为强归纳偏置，减少模型复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: DPO正则化可能对低分辨率-高分辨率对的质量敏感，需确保配对数据一致性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用VAR模型天然的多尺度特性，通过标记重叠和偏好学习提升灵活性和性能。

zh.tldr: 提出分层图像标记化（HIT）和直接偏好优化（DPO）正则化，实现多尺度图像超分辨率，模型更小且无需外部数据。
zh.motivation: 现有VAR超分辨率方法受限于残差量化，只能生成固定尺度图像，且依赖大骨干网络或大量标注数据。
zh.method: 引入分层图像标记化（HIT）逐步表示不同尺度图像并强制跨尺度标记重叠，以及直接偏好优化（DPO）正则化项仅利用（低分辨率，高分辨率）对鼓励生成高分辨率输出。
zh.result: 300M参数模型达到最先进结果，无需外部训练数据，单次前向传播输出多尺度结果。
zh.help_to_user: 提供一种高效的多尺度超分辨率方法，适合资源受限场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将分层标记化与偏好优化结合，作为强归纳偏置，减少模型复杂度。
idea_spark.risk: DPO正则化可能对低分辨率-高分辨率对的质量敏感，需确保配对数据一致性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用VAR模型天然的多尺度特性，通过标记重叠和偏好学习提升灵活性和性能。

en.tldr: Proposes Hierarchical Image Tokenization (HIT) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) regularization for multi-scale image super resolution, achieving state-of-the-art with a smaller model and no external data.
en.motivation: Existing VAR-based super resolution methods are limited by residual quantization to fixed scales and rely on large backbones or annotated data.
en.method: Introduces HIT to progressively represent images at different scales with token overlap, and DPO regularization that uses only (LR, HR) pairs to encourage high-resolution output.
en.result: A 300M parameter model achieves state-of-the-art results without external training data and delivers multi-scale outputs in a single forward pass.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient multi-scale super resolution method suitable for resource-constrained scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Combining hierarchical tokenization with preference optimization as a strong inductive bias reduces model complexity.
idea_spark.risk: DPO regularization may be sensitive to the quality of (LR, HR) pairs; consistency in paired data is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging the inherent multi-scale nature of VAR models through token overlap and preference learning enhances flexibility and performance.

papers.title: PREPING: Building Agent Memory without Tasks
papers.summary: Agent memory is typically constructed either offline from curated demonstrations or online from post-deployment interactions. However, regardless of how it is built, an agent faces a cold-start gap when first introduced to a new environment without any task-specific experience available. In this paper, we study pre-task memory construction: whether an agent can build procedural memory before observing any target-environment tasks, using only self-generated synthetic practice. Yet, synthetic interaction alone is insufficient, as without controlling what to practice and what to store, synthetic tasks become redundant, infeasible, and ultimately uninformative, and memory further degrades quickly due to unfiltered trajectories. To overcome this, we present Preping, a proposer-guided memory construction framework. At its core is proposer memory, a structured control state that shapes future practice. A Proposer generates synthetic tasks conditioned on this state, a Solver executes them, and a Validator determines which trajectories are eligible for memory insertion while also providing feedback to guide future proposals. Experiments on AppWorld, BFCL v3, and MCP-Universe show that Preping substantially improves over a no-memory baseline and achieves performance competitive with strong playbook-based methods built from offline or online experience, with deployment cost $2.99\times$ lower on AppWorld and $2.23\times$ lower on BFCL v3 than online memory construction. Further analyses reveal that the main benefit does not come from synthetic volume alone, but from proposer-side control over feasibility, redundancy, and coverage, combined with selective memory updates.

ai.tldr: 提出 Preping 框架，让智能体在无任务经验时通过自生成合成练习构建程序性记忆，解决冷启动问题。
ai.motivation: 智能体在新环境中缺乏任务特定经验，存在冷启动差距；现有离线或在线记忆构建方法无法在无任务时提供有效记忆。
ai.method: Proposer 根据当前记忆状态生成合成任务，Solver 执行，Validator 筛选轨迹并反馈，实现可控的预任务记忆构建。
ai.result: 在 AppWorld、BFCL v3 和 MCP-Universe 上，Peping 显著优于无记忆基线，性能与基于离线/在线经验的强方法相当，部署成本降低 2-3 倍。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助智能体在无任务数据时自主构建有效记忆，降低部署成本，提升新环境适应能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用 Proposer 控制合成任务的可信度、冗余度和覆盖度，结合选择性记忆更新，实现高效预训练。
idea_spark.risk: 合成任务质量依赖 Proposer 设计，可能引入偏差；Validator 的反馈机制需谨慎调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受课程学习与主动学习启发，通过控制任务生成顺序与内容来优化记忆构建。

zh.tldr: 提出 Preping 框架，让智能体在无任务经验时通过自生成合成练习构建程序性记忆，解决冷启动问题。
zh.motivation: 智能体在新环境中缺乏任务特定经验，存在冷启动差距；现有离线或在线记忆构建方法无法在无任务时提供有效记忆。
zh.method: Proposer 根据当前记忆状态生成合成任务，Solver 执行，Validator 筛选轨迹并反馈，实现可控的预任务记忆构建。
zh.result: 在 AppWorld、BFCL v3 和 MCP-Universe 上，Peping 显著优于无记忆基线，性能与基于离线/在线经验的强方法相当，部署成本降低 2-3 倍。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助智能体在无任务数据时自主构建有效记忆，降低部署成本，提升新环境适应能力。

idea_spark.idea: 利用 Proposer 控制合成任务的可信度、冗余度和覆盖度，结合选择性记忆更新，实现高效预训练。
idea_spark.risk: 合成任务质量依赖 Proposer 设计，可能引入偏差；Validator 的反馈机制需谨慎调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受课程学习与主动学习启发，通过控制任务生成顺序与内容来优化记忆构建。

en.tldr: Proposes Preping, a framework for building agent procedural memory via self-generated synthetic practice before task exposure, addressing the cold-start gap.
en.motivation: Agents face a cold-start gap when introduced to new environments without task-specific experience; existing memory construction methods cannot provide effective memory without tasks.
en.method: A Proposer generates synthetic tasks conditioned on proposer memory, a Solver executes them, and a Validator filters trajectories and provides feedback for selective memory updates.
en.result: On AppWorld, BFCL v3, and MCP-Universe, Preping significantly outperforms no-memory baselines and matches strong playbook-based methods, with 2-3x lower deployment cost.
en.help_to_user: Enables agents to autonomously build effective memory without task data, reducing deployment cost and improving adaptation to new environments.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage Proposer control over synthetic task feasibility, redundancy, and coverage, combined with selective memory updates, for efficient pre-training.
idea_spark.risk: Synthetic task quality depends on Proposer design, potentially introducing bias; Validator feedback mechanism requires careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by curriculum learning and active learning, optimizing memory construction by controlling task generation order and content.

papers.title: SAGE3D: Soft-guided attention and graph excitation for 3D point cloud corner detection
papers.summary: We present SAGE3D, a hybrid Transformer-based model for corner detection in airborne LiDAR point clouds. We propose a multi-stage solution built on a hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture that progressively downsamples point clouds through Set Abstraction layers and recovers per-point predictions via Feature Propagation. We introduce two innovations: Soft-Guided Attention, which injects ground-truth corner labels as a log-prior into attention logits during training to improve precision; then an Excitatory Graph Neural Network positioned at strategic resolutions in the hierarchy, employing positive-only message passing where high-confidence corners reinforce predictions through learned boosting, optimizing for recall. The hierarchical design enables multi-scale feature extraction while our guided attention and excitatory modules ensure corner signals are amplified rather than diluted across scales.

ai.tldr: 提出SAGE3D模型，结合软引导注意力与激励图神经网络，用于机载LiDAR点云角点检测。
ai.motivation: 现有方法在点云角点检测中精度和召回率不足，多尺度特征下角点信号易被稀释。
ai.method: 采用分层编码器-解码器架构，通过Set Abstraction下采样和Feature Propagation恢复逐点预测；引入软引导注意力在训练时注入真实角点标签作为对数先验，以及激励图神经网络在关键分辨率上通过正消息传递增强高置信角点。
ai.result: 软引导注意力提升精度，激励图神经网络优化召回率，分层设计实现多尺度特征提取并放大角点信号。
ai.help_to_user: 可用于机载LiDAR点云中建筑物、地形等角点的高精度检测，辅助三维重建与测绘。

idea_spark.idea: 将软引导注意力与激励图神经网络结合，在分层架构中同时优化精度和召回率。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖真实角点标签作为先验，可能限制无监督或弱监督场景的适用性；激励图神经网络的正消息传递可能导致过拟合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Transformer和图神经网络在点云处理中的成功启发，结合注意力引导与图激励机制解决角点检测难题。

zh.motivation: 现有方法在点云角点检测中精度和召回率不足，多尺度特征下角点信号易被稀释。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖真实角点标签作为先验，可能限制无监督或弱监督场景的适用性；激励图神经网络的正消息传递可能导致过拟合。

en.tldr: We propose SAGE3D, a hybrid Transformer model combining soft-guided attention and excitatory graph neural network for corner detection in airborne LiDAR point clouds.
en.motivation: Existing methods suffer from low precision and recall in point cloud corner detection, and corner signals are easily diluted across scales.
en.method: A hierarchical encoder-decoder architecture with Set Abstraction downsampling and Feature Propagation for per-point prediction; soft-guided attention injects ground-truth corner labels as a log-prior during training, and an excitatory GNN at strategic resolutions uses positive-only message passing to boost high-confidence corners.
en.result: Soft-guided attention improves precision, excitatory GNN optimizes recall, and the hierarchical design enables multi-scale feature extraction while amplifying corner signals.
en.help_to_user: Enables high-precision corner detection in airborne LiDAR point clouds for applications like 3D reconstruction and surveying.

idea_spark.idea: Combine soft-guided attention with excitatory GNN in a hierarchical architecture to simultaneously optimize precision and recall.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on ground-truth corner labels as priors may limit applicability in unsupervised or weakly supervised settings; positive-only message passing in excitatory GNN could lead to overfitting.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of Transformers and graph neural networks in point cloud processing, we integrate attention guidance with graph excitation to address corner detection challenges.

papers.title: Univariate Bicycle Quantum LDPC Codes: Explicit Logical Structure and Distance Bounds
papers.summary: We introduce univariate bicycle (UB) codes, a structured subclass of generalized bicycle (GB) quantum low-density parity-check (LDPC) codes obtained via a Frobenius relation. This construction reduces the code design space from a two-polynomial search in GB codes to a single-polynomial search, while preserving sparsity. We provide an explicit algebraic characterization of the logical coset spaces by constructing a basis for the logical quotient space, yielding a complete parametrization of logical operators. Leveraging this structure, we derive upper bounds on the minimum distance by relating structured logical representatives to cycle-density properties of associated circulant matrices. Finally, simulation results for short- to medium-length UB codes (block lengths ranging from a few hundred to approximately $10^3$) demonstrate competitive performance relative to existing GB and bivariate bicycle (BB) codes despite the additional algebraic restriction.

ai.tldr: 提出单变量自行车量子LDPC码，通过Frobenius关系简化设计空间，给出逻辑算子的显式代数表征，并推导最小距离上界。
ai.motivation: 广义自行车码需要双多项式搜索，设计空间大，本文旨在通过代数约束简化设计并保持稀疏性。
ai.method: 利用Frobenius关系将双多项式搜索降为单多项式，构造逻辑商空间基，通过循环矩阵的环密度导出距离上界。
ai.result: 短中码长下性能与现有GB和BB码相当，但代数结构更简洁。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种结构更简单的量子LDPC码构造方法，便于理论分析和实际实现。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Frobenius关系用于其他代数码族，如准循环码或极化码。
idea_spark.risk: 单变量约束可能限制码参数的最优性，需验证长码长下的性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用代数结构简化搜索空间，同时保持性能，启发其他编码问题的降维思路。

zh.tldr: 提出单变量自行车量子LDPC码，通过Frobenius关系简化设计空间，给出逻辑算子的显式代数表征，并推导最小距离上界。
zh.motivation: 广义自行车码需要双多项式搜索，设计空间大，本文旨在通过代数约束简化设计并保持稀疏性。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种结构更简单的量子LDPC码构造方法，便于理论分析和实际实现。

idea_spark.risk: 单变量约束可能限制码参数的最优性，需验证长码长下的性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用代数结构简化搜索空间，同时保持性能，启发其他编码问题的降维思路。

en.tldr: Introduce univariate bicycle quantum LDPC codes via a Frobenius relation, reducing design space to a single polynomial, with explicit logical structure and distance bounds.
en.motivation: Generalized bicycle codes require two-polynomial search; this work simplifies design while preserving sparsity through algebraic constraints.
en.method: Use Frobenius relation to reduce to single-polynomial search, construct basis for logical quotient space, and derive distance upper bounds via cycle-density of circulant matrices.
en.result: Competitive performance for short-to-medium block lengths compared to existing GB and BB codes, with simpler algebraic structure.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more structured construction of quantum LDPC codes, facilitating theoretical analysis and practical implementation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying the Frobenius relation to other algebraic code families, such as quasi-cyclic or polar codes.
idea_spark.risk: The univariate constraint may limit optimality of code parameters; performance at long block lengths needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using algebraic structure to reduce search space while maintaining performance inspires dimensionality reduction in other coding problems.

papers.title: PEML: Parameter-efficient Multi-Task Learning with Optimized Continuous Prompts
papers.summary: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) is widely used for adapting Large Language Models (LLMs) for various tasks. Recently, there has been an increasing demand for fine-tuning a single LLM for multiple tasks because it requires overall less data for fine-tuning thanks to the common features shared among tasks. More importantly, LLMs are resource demanding and deploying a single model for multiple tasks facilitates resource consolidation and consumes significantly less resources compared to deploying individual large model for each task. Existing PEFT methods like LoRA and Prefix Tuning are designed to adapt LLMs to a specific task. LoRA and its variation focus on aligning the model itself for tasks, overlooking the importance of prompt tuning in multi-task learning while Prefix Tuning only adopts a simple architecture to optimize prompts, which limits the adaption capabilities for multi-task. To enable efficient fine-tuning for multi-task learning, it is important to co-optimize prompt optimization and model adaptation. In this work, we propose a Parameter-Efficient Multi-task Learning (\PM), which employs a neural architecture engineering method for optimizing the continuous prompts while also performing low-rank adaption for model weights. We prototype PEML by creating an automated framework for optimizing the continuous prompts and adapting model weights. We evaluate PEML against state-of-the-arts multi-task learning methods MTL-LoRA, MultiLoRa, C-Poly, and MoE, on the GLUE, SuperGLUE, Massive Multitask Language Understanding, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks. The evaluation results present an average accuracy improvement of up to 6.67%, with individual tasks showing peak gains of up to 10.75%.

ai.tldr: 提出PEML方法，通过神经架构工程优化连续提示并联合低秩适配，实现参数高效的多任务学习，在多个基准上平均准确率提升6.67%。
ai.motivation: 现有PEFT方法（如LoRA、Prefix Tuning）针对单任务设计，在多任务场景下提示优化不足或模型适配能力有限，且部署多个单任务模型资源消耗大。
ai.method: 采用神经架构工程自动化优化连续提示，同时进行低秩模型权重适配，实现提示优化与模型适配的联合优化。
ai.result: 在GLUE、SuperGLUE、MMLU和常识推理基准上，平均准确率提升6.67%，单任务最高提升10.75%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效的多任务微调方案，可减少资源消耗并提升多任务性能，适合需要同时处理多个任务的LLM部署场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将提示优化与模型适配的联合优化扩展到跨模态任务（如视觉-语言模型）。
idea_spark.risk: 神经架构搜索可能增加训练计算开销，需平衡搜索效率与性能增益。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多任务学习中特征共享与资源整合需求启发，结合提示工程与低秩适配的互补优势。

zh.tldr: 提出PEML方法，通过神经架构工程优化连续提示并联合低秩适配，实现参数高效的多任务学习，在多个基准上平均准确率提升6.67%。
zh.motivation: 现有PEFT方法（如LoRA、Prefix Tuning）针对单任务设计，在多任务场景下提示优化不足或模型适配能力有限，且部署多个单任务模型资源消耗大。

zh.result: 在GLUE、SuperGLUE、MMLU和常识推理基准上，平均准确率提升6.67%，单任务最高提升10.75%。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了一种高效的多任务微调方案，可减少资源消耗并提升多任务性能，适合需要同时处理多个任务的LLM部署场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将提示优化与模型适配的联合优化扩展到跨模态任务（如视觉-语言模型）。
idea_spark.risk: 神经架构搜索可能增加训练计算开销，需平衡搜索效率与性能增益。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多任务学习中特征共享与资源整合需求启发，结合提示工程与低秩适配的互补优势。

en.tldr: Proposes PEML, which optimizes continuous prompts via neural architecture engineering and jointly performs low-rank adaptation, achieving 6.67% average accuracy improvement on multiple benchmarks for parameter-efficient multi-task learning.
en.motivation: Existing PEFT methods (e.g., LoRA, Prefix Tuning) are designed for single tasks, lacking sufficient prompt optimization or model adaptation for multi-task scenarios, and deploying separate models for each task is resource-intensive.
en.method: Employs neural architecture engineering to automatically optimize continuous prompts while performing low-rank adaptation of model weights, enabling joint optimization of prompts and model adaptation.
en.result: Achieves up to 6.67% average accuracy improvement on GLUE, SuperGLUE, MMLU, and commonsense reasoning benchmarks, with peak gains of 10.75% on individual tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient multi-task fine-tuning solution that reduces resource consumption and improves multi-task performance, suitable for LLM deployment scenarios requiring simultaneous handling of multiple tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Explore extending the joint optimization of prompts and model adaptation to cross-modal tasks (e.g., vision-language models).
idea_spark.risk: Neural architecture search may increase training computational overhead, requiring a balance between search efficiency and performance gains.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the need for feature sharing and resource consolidation in multi-task learning, combining the complementary strengths of prompt engineering and low-rank adaptation.

papers.title: EARL: Towards a Unified Analysis-Guided Reinforcement Learning Framework for Egocentric Interaction Reasoning and Pixel Grounding
papers.summary: Understanding human--environment interactions from egocentric vision is essential for assistive robotics and embodied intelligent agents, yet existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) still struggle with accurate interaction reasoning and fine-grained pixel grounding. To this end, this paper introduces EARL, an Egocentric Analysis-guided Reinforcement Learning framework that explicitly transfers coarse interaction semantics to query-oriented answering and grounding. Specifically, EARL adopts a two-stage parsing framework including coarse-grained interpretation and fine-grained response. The first stage holistically interprets egocentric interactions and generates a structured textual description. The second stage produces the textual answer and pixel-level mask in response to the user query. To bridge the two stages, we extract a global interaction descriptor as a semantic prior, which is integrated via a novel Analysis-guided Feature Synthesizer (AFS) for query-oriented reasoning. To optimize heterogeneous outputs, including textual answers, bounding boxes, and grounding masks, we design a multi-faceted reward function and train the response stage with GRPO. Experiments on Ego-IRGBench show that EARL achieves 65.48% cIoU for pixel grounding, outperforming previous RL-based methods by 8.37%, while OOD grounding results on EgoHOS indicate strong transferability to unseen egocentric grounding scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出EARL框架，通过分析引导的强化学习实现第一人称视角交互推理与像素级定位。
ai.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在第一人称交互推理和细粒度像素定位上仍存在困难。
ai.method: 两阶段解析框架：粗粒度解释生成结构化描述，细粒度响应通过分析引导特征合成器（AFS）和GRPO优化文本、边界框和掩码输出。
ai.result: 在Ego-IRGBench上像素定位cIoU达65.48%，比先前RL方法高8.37%；在EgoHOS上展示出对未见场景的强迁移性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解第一人称视频中的交互行为并定位相关像素区域。

idea_spark.idea: 将全局交互描述作为语义先验，通过特征合成器注入查询导向推理。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量的结构化描述生成，若第一阶段解析不准确可能影响后续性能。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从粗到细的推理范式与强化学习奖励设计结合，可启发多模态输出任务的新训练策略。

zh.tldr: 提出EARL框架，通过分析引导的强化学习实现第一人称视角交互推理与像素级定位。
zh.motivation: 现有多模态大模型在第一人称交互推理和细粒度像素定位上仍存在困难。
zh.method: 两阶段解析框架：粗粒度解释生成结构化描述，细粒度响应通过分析引导特征合成器（AFS）和GRPO优化文本、边界框和掩码输出。
zh.result: 在Ego-IRGBench上像素定位cIoU达65.48%，比先前RL方法高8.37%；在EgoHOS上展示出对未见场景的强迁移性。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解第一人称视频中的交互行为并定位相关像素区域。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从粗到细的推理范式与强化学习奖励设计结合，可启发多模态输出任务的新训练策略。

en.tldr: Proposes EARL, an analysis-guided reinforcement learning framework for egocentric interaction reasoning and pixel grounding.
en.motivation: Existing MLLMs struggle with accurate interaction reasoning and fine-grained pixel grounding in egocentric vision.
en.method: Two-stage parsing: coarse-grained interpretation generates structured text; fine-grained response uses Analysis-guided Feature Synthesizer (AFS) and GRPO to optimize textual answers, bounding boxes, and masks.
en.result: Achieves 65.48% cIoU on Ego-IRGBench, outperforming previous RL methods by 8.37%; shows strong transferability on EgoHOS.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand interactions in egocentric videos and locate relevant pixel regions.

idea_spark.idea: Use global interaction descriptors as semantic priors, integrated via a feature synthesizer for query-oriented reasoning.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality structured description generation; inaccurate first-stage parsing may degrade downstream performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining coarse-to-fine reasoning with reinforcement learning reward design inspires new training strategies for multimodal outputs.

papers.title: An Attention-Enhanced Network with Joint Dehazing and Retinex-Based Enhancement for Underwater Images
papers.summary: Underwater images suffer from severe wavelength-dependent light absorption and scattering, and turbidity due to suspended particles, degrading visual quality for applications in autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs), marine biology, archaeology, and offshore infrastructure inspection. Classical IFM inadequately capture nonlinear underwater light behavior, while purely data-driven methods lack physical interpretability. This paper proposes a three-stage network named ADR, that extends the underwater image formation model with additional terms to perform underwater dehazing, followed by Retinex-based enhancement and attention-enabled U-Net++ refinement. Experiments on UIEB and UFO-120 benchmark datasets demonstrate competitive performance with state-of-the-art methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种三阶段网络ADR，结合水下图像形成模型扩展、去雾、Retinex增强和注意力U-Net++细化，提升水下图像质量。
ai.motivation: 水下图像因光吸收、散射和浑浊导致质量下降，传统方法无法捕捉非线性光行为，纯数据驱动方法缺乏物理可解释性。
ai.method: 三阶段网络：第一阶段扩展水下图像形成模型进行去雾；第二阶段基于Retinex增强；第三阶段使用注意力U-Net++细化。
ai.result: 在UIEB和UFO-120数据集上达到与最先进方法竞争的性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何结合物理模型与深度学习进行水下图像增强。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Retinex分解与多尺度注意力融合，用于水下图像的颜色校正和细节恢复。
idea_spark.risk: 物理模型扩展可能引入额外假设，在复杂水下环境中泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受水下成像物理过程启发，将模型驱动与数据驱动结合，提升可解释性和性能。

zh.tldr: 提出一种三阶段网络ADR，结合水下图像形成模型扩展、去雾、Retinex增强和注意力U-Net++细化，提升水下图像质量。
zh.motivation: 水下图像因光吸收、散射和浑浊导致质量下降，传统方法无法捕捉非线性光行为，纯数据驱动方法缺乏物理可解释性。
zh.method: 三阶段网络：第一阶段扩展水下图像形成模型进行去雾；第二阶段基于Retinex增强；第三阶段使用注意力U-Net++细化。
zh.result: 在UIEB和UFO-120数据集上达到与最先进方法竞争的性能。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何结合物理模型与深度学习进行水下图像增强。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将Retinex分解与多尺度注意力融合，用于水下图像的颜色校正和细节恢复。
idea_spark.risk: 物理模型扩展可能引入额外假设，在复杂水下环境中泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受水下成像物理过程启发，将模型驱动与数据驱动结合，提升可解释性和性能。

en.tldr: Proposes a three-stage network ADR that extends the underwater image formation model with dehazing, Retinex-based enhancement, and attention-enabled U-Net++ refinement to improve underwater image quality.
en.motivation: Underwater images suffer from light absorption, scattering, and turbidity; classical methods fail to capture nonlinear light behavior, and purely data-driven methods lack physical interpretability.
en.method: Three-stage network: first stage extends the underwater image formation model for dehazing; second stage applies Retinex-based enhancement; third stage uses attention-enabled U-Net++ refinement.
en.result: Achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art methods on UIEB and UFO-120 benchmark datasets.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to combine physical models with deep learning for underwater image enhancement.

idea_spark.idea: Explore integrating Retinex decomposition with multi-scale attention for color correction and detail recovery in underwater images.
idea_spark.risk: Physical model extension may introduce additional assumptions, requiring validation of generalization in complex underwater environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the physical process of underwater imaging, combining model-driven and data-driven methods enhances interpretability and performance.

papers.title: SEDiT: Mask-Free Video Subtitle Erasure via One-step Diffusion Transformer
papers.summary: Recent breakthroughs in video diffusion models have significantly accelerated the development of video editing techniques. However, existing methods often rely on inpainting video frames based on masked input, which requires extracting the target video mask in advance, and the precision of the segmentation directly affects the quality of the completion. In this paper, we present SEDiT, a novel one-stage video Subtitle Erasure approach via One-step Diffusion Transformer. We introduce a mask-free inference approach that enables direct erasure of the targeted subtitle. The proposed one-stage framework mitigates the sub-optimality inherent in the two-stage processing of prior models. Since subtitle removal is a localized editing task in which most pixels remain unchanged, the underlying distribution shift is minimal, making it well-suited to one-step generation under rectified flow. We empirically validate the reliability of one-step denoising and further provide a formal theoretical justification. Under the localized-editing structure of subtitle removal, the conditional optimal transport (OT) map and its induced rectified flow velocity field are Lipschitz continuous with respect to the latent variable, which underpins the theoretical feasibility of one-step sampling. To address the challenge of long-term temporal consistency, we adopt a hybrid training strategy by occasionally conditioning the model with a clean first-frame latent. This facilitates temporal continuity, allowing each segment during inference to leverage the output of its predecessor. To avoid visible seams caused by cropping and reinserting processed targets, particularly in scenarios involving substantial motion, we feed the original video directly into SEDiT. Thanks to one-step and chunk-wise streaming inference, our method can efficiently handle native 1440p video with infinite length.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于一步扩散变换器的无掩码视频字幕擦除方法，无需预先提取掩码，支持无限长度的高清视频处理。
ai.motivation: 现有视频编辑方法依赖掩码输入，分割精度影响完成质量，且两阶段处理存在次优性。
ai.method: 采用无掩码推理的一阶段框架，利用局部编辑特性实现一步去噪，通过混合训练策略和分块流式推理保证时间一致性和无限长度处理。
ai.result: 理论证明条件最优传输映射和整流流速度场关于潜变量的Lipschitz连续性，实验验证一步去噪的可靠性，可高效处理原生1440p视频。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户无需复杂掩码即可直接擦除视频中的字幕，提升编辑效率和视频质量。

idea_spark.idea: 将一步扩散变换器与分块流式推理结合，实现无限长度视频的实时编辑。
idea_spark.risk: 一步生成可能在大范围运动或复杂场景下产生伪影，时间一致性仍需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用局部编辑的分布偏移小特性，简化扩散模型采样步骤，启发其他高效视频编辑方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a mask-free video subtitle erasure method via one-step diffusion transformer, eliminating the need for pre-extracted masks and supporting infinite-length high-definition video processing.
en.motivation: Existing video editing methods rely on masked input, where segmentation precision affects completion quality, and two-stage processing is suboptimal.
en.method: Employs a mask-free one-stage framework leveraging localized editing for one-step denoising, with hybrid training and chunk-wise streaming inference to ensure temporal consistency and infinite-length processing.
en.result: Theoretically proves Lipschitz continuity of the conditional optimal transport map and rectified flow velocity field w.r.t. latent variables, empirically validates one-step denoising reliability, and efficiently handles native 1440p video.
en.help_to_user: Enables direct subtitle erasure without complex masks, improving editing efficiency and video quality.

idea_spark.idea: Combine one-step diffusion transformer with chunk-wise streaming inference for real-time editing of infinite-length videos.
idea_spark.risk: One-step generation may introduce artifacts in large motion or complex scenes; temporal consistency requires further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Exploiting the small distribution shift of localized editing to simplify diffusion model sampling steps, inspiring other efficient video editing methods.

papers.title: VGGT-$Ω$
papers.summary: Recent feed-forward reconstruction models, such as VGGT, have proven competitive with traditional optimization-based reconstructors while also providing geometry-aware features useful for other tasks. Here, we show that the quality of these models scales predictably with model and data size. We do so by introducing VGGT-$Ω$, which substantially improves reconstruction accuracy, efficiency, and capabilities for both static and dynamic scenes. To enable training this model at an unprecedented scale, we introduce architectural changes that improve training efficiency, a high-quality data annotation pipeline that supports dynamic scenes, and a self-supervised learning protocol. We simplify VGGT's architecture by using a single dense prediction head with multi-task supervision and removing the expensive high-resolution convolutional layers. We also use registers to aggregate scene information into a compact representation and introduce register attention, which restricts inter-frame information exchange to these registers, in part replacing global attention. In this way, during training, VGGT-$Ω$ uses only about 30% of the GPU memory of its predecessor, allowing us to train with 15x more supervised data than prior work and to leverage vast amounts of unlabeled video data. VGGT-$Ω$ achieves strong results for reconstruction of static and dynamic scenes across multiple benchmarks, for example, improving over the previous best camera estimation accuracy on Sintel by 77%. We also show that the learned registers can improve vision-language-action models and support alignment with language, suggesting that reconstruction can be a powerful and scalable proxy task for spatial understanding. Project Page: http://vggt-omega.github.io/

ai.tldr: VGGT-Ω 通过架构简化和自监督学习，在静态和动态场景重建中大幅提升精度和效率，并展示了重建作为空间理解代理任务的潜力。
ai.motivation: 现有前馈重建模型（如 VGGT）虽已取得进展，但训练规模受限，且对动态场景支持不足。
ai.method: 简化 VGGT 架构，使用单一密集预测头和多任务监督，移除高分辨率卷积层；引入寄存器（registers）和寄存器注意力机制，限制帧间信息交换，降低 GPU 内存占用约 70%，从而支持 15 倍监督数据和大量无标签视频训练。
ai.result: 在多个基准上取得领先结果，例如 Sintel 相机估计精度提升 77%；学习到的寄存器还可用于视觉-语言-动作模型，支持语言对齐。
ai.help_to_user: 如果您从事 3D 重建或空间理解研究，VGGT-Ω 提供了高效、可扩展的基线模型和训练策略。

idea_spark.idea: 利用寄存器作为场景的紧凑表示，结合语言模型实现零样本场景描述或交互。
idea_spark.risk: 寄存器可能丢失细粒度空间细节，影响高精度重建需求。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将重建视为代理任务，启发其他几何感知预训练方法（如深度估计、光流）的规模化设计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用寄存器作为场景的紧凑表示，结合语言模型实现零样本场景描述或交互。
idea_spark.risk: 寄存器可能丢失细粒度空间细节，影响高精度重建需求。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将重建视为代理任务，启发其他几何感知预训练方法（如深度估计、光流）的规模化设计。

en.tldr: VGGT-Ω improves reconstruction accuracy and efficiency for static and dynamic scenes via architectural simplification and self-supervised learning, and shows reconstruction as a scalable proxy for spatial understanding.
en.motivation: Existing feed-forward reconstruction models like VGGT are limited in training scale and dynamic scene support.
en.method: Simplifies VGGT with a single dense prediction head and multi-task supervision, removes high-resolution convolutions; introduces registers and register attention to restrict inter-frame information exchange, reducing GPU memory by ~70%, enabling 15x more supervised data and large-scale unlabeled video training.
en.result: Achieves state-of-the-art results on multiple benchmarks, e.g., 77% improvement in camera estimation on Sintel; learned registers also benefit vision-language-action models and language alignment.
en.help_to_user: If you work on 3D reconstruction or spatial understanding, VGGT-Ω offers an efficient and scalable baseline model and training recipe.

idea_spark.idea: Use registers as compact scene representations combined with language models for zero-shot scene description or interaction.
idea_spark.risk: Registers may lose fine-grained spatial details, limiting high-precision reconstruction needs.
idea_spark.inspiration: Treating reconstruction as a proxy task inspires scalable design for other geometry-aware pretraining methods (e.g., depth estimation, optical flow).

papers.title: An inverse problem for inhomogeneous Signorini obstacle
papers.summary: This paper investigates the inverse problem of determining a general Signorini obstacle using boundary measurements. We demonstrate that both the shape of the obstacle and the obstacle function can be uniquely determined from solution measurements taken on an arbitrary open subset of the boundary. This result applies to both the scalar and elasticity versions of the Signorini problem.

ai.tldr: 本文研究利用边界测量数据唯一确定非均匀Signorini障碍的形状和障碍函数。
ai.motivation: 现有方法多针对均匀障碍，而实际中障碍可能具有非均匀性质，需要更一般的反演理论。
ai.method: 通过边界任意开子集上的解测量，结合Signorini问题的标量和弹性版本，建立唯一性证明。
ai.result: 证明了障碍形状和障碍函数均可由边界测量唯一确定，适用于标量和弹性情形。
ai.help_to_user: 为利用边界数据反演非均匀障碍提供了理论保证，可用于无损检测和材料识别。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将Signorini障碍反演与机器学习结合，利用边界测量数据训练网络预测障碍参数。
idea_spark.risk: 实际测量噪声可能影响唯一性结论的稳定性，需发展正则化策略。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从弹性Signorini问题出发，可探索多物理场耦合下的障碍反演（如热-力耦合）。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the inverse problem of uniquely determining an inhomogeneous Signorini obstacle from boundary measurements.
en.motivation: Existing methods often assume homogeneous obstacles, but real obstacles may be inhomogeneous, requiring a more general inversion theory.
en.method: Using solution measurements on an arbitrary open subset of the boundary, uniqueness is proven for both scalar and elasticity versions of the Signorini problem.
en.result: Both the obstacle shape and the obstacle function can be uniquely determined from boundary measurements.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical guarantee for reconstructing inhomogeneous obstacles from boundary data, applicable to non-destructive testing and material identification.

idea_spark.idea: Combine Signorini obstacle inversion with machine learning to train a network predicting obstacle parameters from boundary measurements.
idea_spark.risk: Measurement noise may compromise stability of the uniqueness result; regularization strategies are needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: From the elasticity Signorini problem, explore multi-physics coupled obstacle inversion (e.g., thermo-mechanical coupling).

papers.title: TERRA-CD: Multi-Temporal Framework for Multi-class and Semantic Change Detection
papers.summary: Urban vegetation monitoring plays a vital role in understanding environmental changes, yet comprehensive datasets for this purpose remain limited. To address this gap, we present the Temporal Remote-sensing Repository for Analyzing Change Detection (TERRA-CD), a benchmark dataset comprising 5,221 Sentinel-2 image pairs from 2019 and 2024, covering 232 cities across the USA and Europe. The dataset features three distinct annotation schemes: 4-class land cover mapping masks, 3-class vegetation change masks, and 13-class semantic change masks capturing all possible land cover transitions. Using various deep learning approaches including Siamese networks, STANet variants, Bi-SRNet, Changemask, Post-Classification Comparison, and HRSCD strategies, we evaluated the dataset's effectiveness for both vegetation Multi-class Change Detection as well as Semantic Change Detection. The proposed dataset and methods are available at https://github.com/omkarsoak/TERRA-CD.

ai.tldr: 提出TERRA-CD基准数据集，包含5221对Sentinel-2图像，覆盖欧美232个城市，支持多类别和语义变化检测。
ai.motivation: 城市植被监测对理解环境变化至关重要，但缺乏全面的数据集。
ai.method: 构建包含三种标注方案（4类土地覆盖、3类植被变化、13类语义变化）的数据集，并评估多种深度学习模型。
ai.result: 数据集有效支持植被多类别变化检测和语义变化检测。
ai.help_to_user: 提供公开可用的基准数据集和评估方法，便于研究城市植被变化。

idea_spark.idea: 利用多类别语义变化掩码，可开发细粒度变化归因模型，区分自然与人为变化。
idea_spark.risk: 数据集仅覆盖欧美城市，可能限制模型在其他地理区域的泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合时间序列分析和语义分割，可探索植被变化与气候数据的关联。

en.tldr: Proposes TERRA-CD benchmark dataset with 5,221 Sentinel-2 image pairs covering 232 cities in the USA and Europe, supporting multi-class and semantic change detection.
en.motivation: Urban vegetation monitoring is critical for understanding environmental changes, but comprehensive datasets are limited.
en.method: Constructs a dataset with three annotation schemes (4-class land cover, 3-class vegetation change, 13-class semantic change) and evaluates various deep learning models.
en.result: The dataset effectively supports multi-class vegetation change detection and semantic change detection.
en.help_to_user: Provides a publicly available benchmark dataset and evaluation methods for studying urban vegetation changes.

idea_spark.idea: Using multi-class semantic change masks, one can develop fine-grained change attribution models to distinguish natural from anthropogenic changes.
idea_spark.risk: The dataset only covers cities in the USA and Europe, which may limit model generalization to other geographic regions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining time series analysis and semantic segmentation could explore the correlation between vegetation changes and climate data.

papers.title: DriveCtrl: Conditioned Sim-to-Real Driving Video Generation
papers.summary: Large-scale labelled driving video data is essential for training autonomous driving systems. Although simulation offers scalable and fully annotated data, the domain gap between synthetic and real-world driving videos significantly limits its utility for downstream deployment. Existing video generation methods are not well-suited for this task, as they fail to simultaneously preserve scene structure, object dynamics, temporal consistency, and visual realism, all of which are critical for maintaining annotation validity in generated data. In this paper, we present DriveCtrl, a depth-conditioned controllable sim-to-real video generation framework for realistic driving video synthesis. Built upon a pretrained video foundation model, DriveCtrl introduces a structure-aware adapter that enables depth-guided generation while preserving the scene layout and motion patterns of the source simulation, producing temporally coherent driving videos that remain aligned with the original simulated sequences. We further introduce a scalable data generation pipeline that transforms simulator videos into realistic driving footage matching the visual style of a target real-world dataset. The pipeline supports three conditioning signals: structural depth, reference-dataset style, and text prompts, while preserving frame-level annotations for downstream perception tasks. To better assess this task, we propose a driving-domain-specific knowledge-informed evaluation metric called Driving Video Realism Score (DVRS) that assesses the realism of generated videos. Experiments demonstrate that DriveCtrl consistently outperforms the base model and competing alternatives in realism, temporal quality, and perception task performance, substantially narrowing the sim-to-real gap for driving video generation.

ai.tldr: 提出DriveCtrl框架，通过深度条件可控生成将仿真驾驶视频转换为逼真的真实风格视频，同时保留场景结构和标注信息，显著缩小仿真到真实的差距。
ai.motivation: 大规模标注驾驶视频对自动驾驶系统训练至关重要，但仿真数据与真实视频之间存在域差距，现有视频生成方法无法同时保持场景结构、物体动态、时间一致性和视觉真实性。
ai.method: 基于预训练视频基础模型，引入结构感知适配器实现深度引导生成，保留仿真场景布局和运动模式；设计可扩展数据生成管线，支持深度、参考数据集风格和文本提示三种条件信号；提出驾驶域知识驱动的DVRS评估指标。
ai.result: 在真实性、时间质量和下游感知任务性能上持续优于基线模型和竞争方法，有效缩小了驾驶视频生成的仿真到真实差距。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从仿真数据生成逼真的驾驶视频，用于训练和评估自动驾驶感知模型，减少对昂贵真实标注数据的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 结合结构感知适配器和多条件信号（深度、风格、文本）实现细粒度可控视频生成，并设计领域特定评估指标。
idea_spark.risk: 对预训练基础模型依赖性强，生成质量受限于基础模型能力；深度条件可能无法完全覆盖复杂动态场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用仿真数据的结构化信息（如深度）作为强条件，结合风格迁移实现域适应，为数据增强提供新思路。

zh.tldr: 提出DriveCtrl框架，通过深度条件可控生成将仿真驾驶视频转换为逼真的真实风格视频，同时保留场景结构和标注信息，显著缩小仿真到真实的差距。
zh.motivation: 大规模标注驾驶视频对自动驾驶系统训练至关重要，但仿真数据与真实视频之间存在域差距，现有视频生成方法无法同时保持场景结构、物体动态、时间一致性和视觉真实性。
zh.method: 基于预训练视频基础模型，引入结构感知适配器实现深度引导生成，保留仿真场景布局和运动模式；设计可扩展数据生成管线，支持深度、参考数据集风格和文本提示三种条件信号；提出驾驶域知识驱动的DVRS评估指标。
zh.result: 在真实性、时间质量和下游感知任务性能上持续优于基线模型和竞争方法，有效缩小了驾驶视频生成的仿真到真实差距。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户从仿真数据生成逼真的驾驶视频，用于训练和评估自动驾驶感知模型，减少对昂贵真实标注数据的依赖。

idea_spark.idea: 结合结构感知适配器和多条件信号（深度、风格、文本）实现细粒度可控视频生成，并设计领域特定评估指标。
idea_spark.risk: 对预训练基础模型依赖性强，生成质量受限于基础模型能力；深度条件可能无法完全覆盖复杂动态场景。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用仿真数据的结构化信息（如深度）作为强条件，结合风格迁移实现域适应，为数据增强提供新思路。

en.tldr: DriveCtrl is a depth-conditioned controllable sim-to-real video generation framework that transforms simulated driving videos into realistic footage while preserving scene structure and annotations, significantly narrowing the sim-to-real gap.
en.motivation: Large-scale labeled driving video data is essential for autonomous driving, but the domain gap between synthetic and real videos limits utility; existing methods fail to simultaneously preserve scene structure, object dynamics, temporal consistency, and visual realism.
en.method: Built on a pretrained video foundation model, DriveCtrl introduces a structure-aware adapter for depth-guided generation that preserves layout and motion patterns. A scalable pipeline supports depth, reference-dataset style, and text prompts as conditioning signals. A driving-domain-specific DVRS metric is proposed.
en.result: Outperforms baselines in realism, temporal quality, and downstream perception task performance, substantially narrowing the sim-to-real gap for driving video generation.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate realistic driving videos from simulation data for training and evaluating autonomous driving perception models, reducing reliance on expensive real-world labeled data.

idea_spark.idea: Combine a structure-aware adapter with multiple conditioning signals (depth, style, text) for fine-grained controllable video generation, and design a domain-specific evaluation metric.
idea_spark.risk: Heavy reliance on the pretrained foundation model; depth conditioning may not fully cover complex dynamic scenes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging structured information from simulation (e.g., depth) as strong conditioning, combined with style transfer for domain adaptation, offers a new approach for data augmentation.

papers.title: Fusion-fission forecasts when AI will shift to undesirable behavior
papers.summary: The key problem facing ChatGPT-like AI's use across society is that its behavior can shift, unnoticed, from desirable to undesirable -- encouraging self-harm, extremist acts, financial losses, or costly medical and military mistakes -- and no one can yet predict when. Shifts persist in even the newest AI models despite remarkable progress in AI modeling, post-training alignment and safeguards. Here we show that a vector generalization of fusion-fission group dynamics observed in living and active-matter systems drives -- and can forecast -- future shifts in the AI's behavior. The shift condition, which is also derivable mathematically, results from group-level competition between the conversation-so-far (C) and the desirable (B) and undesirable (D) basin dynamics which can be estimated in advance for a given application. It is neither model-specific nor driven by stochastic sampling. We validate it across six independent tests, including: 90 percent correct across seven AI models spanning two orders of magnitude in parameter count (124M-12B); production-scale persistence across ten frontier chatbots; and a priori time-stamped prediction eleven months before the Stanford 'Delusional Spirals' corpus appeared, and independently confirmed by that corpus of 207,443 human-AI exchanges. Because it sits architecturally below the current safety stack, the same formula provides a real-time warning signal that current alignment does not supply, portable across current and future ChatGPT-like AI architectures and instantiable in application domains where competing response classes can be defined.

ai.tldr: 提出一种融合-裂变群体动力学向量推广方法，可预测AI从合意行为向不合意行为的转变，并在多个模型和实际对话语料中验证。
ai.motivation: ChatGPT类AI可能突然从合意行为转向不合意行为（如鼓励自残、极端行为），现有对齐技术无法提前预警。
ai.method: 将对话历史、合意吸引子与不合意吸引子之间的群体竞争建模为融合-裂变动力学向量推广，推导出转变条件。
ai.result: 在7个AI模型（参数124M-12B）上达到90%正确率，在10个前沿聊天机器人中验证，并提前11个月预测了Stanford 'Delusional Spirals'语料中的行为转变。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解AI行为转变的早期预警信号，提升对AI安全性的认知。

idea_spark.idea: 将群体动力学中的融合-裂变模型应用于AI行为预测，提供架构层面的实时预警。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预先定义的合意/不合意吸引子，定义偏差可能导致误报或漏报。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生物和活性物质系统中的群体行为获得启发，用于AI安全监测。

zh.motivation: ChatGPT类AI可能突然从合意行为转向不合意行为（如鼓励自残、极端行为），现有对齐技术无法提前预警。

zh.result: 在7个AI模型（参数124M-12B）上达到90%正确率，在10个前沿聊天机器人中验证，并提前11个月预测了Stanford 'Delusional Spirals'语料中的行为转变。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解AI行为转变的早期预警信号，提升对AI安全性的认知。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖预先定义的合意/不合意吸引子，定义偏差可能导致误报或漏报。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从生物和活性物质系统中的群体行为获得启发，用于AI安全监测。

en.tldr: A vector generalization of fusion-fission group dynamics predicts when AI behavior shifts from desirable to undesirable, validated across multiple models and a large human-AI conversation corpus.
en.motivation: ChatGPT-like AI can suddenly shift from desirable to undesirable behavior (e.g., encouraging self-harm, extremism), and current alignment techniques cannot provide early warnings.
en.method: Model the competition among conversation history, desirable basin, and undesirable basin as a vector generalization of fusion-fission dynamics, deriving a shift condition.
en.result: Achieves 90% accuracy across 7 AI models (124M-12B parameters), validated on 10 frontier chatbots, and predicted the Stanford 'Delusional Spirals' corpus behavior shift 11 months in advance.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand early warning signals of AI behavior shifts, enhancing awareness of AI safety.

idea_spark.idea: Apply fusion-fission models from group dynamics to AI behavior prediction, providing architecture-level real-time warnings.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on predefined desirable/undesirable basins; definition biases may cause false positives or misses.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by group behavior in biological and active-matter systems for AI safety monitoring.

papers.title: TinySDP: Real Time Semidefinite Optimization for Certifiable and Agile Edge Robotics
papers.summary: Semidefinite programming (SDP) provides a principled framework for convex relaxations of nonconvex geometric constraints in motion planning, yet existing solvers are too computationally expensive for real-time control, particularly on resource-constrained embedded systems. To address this gap, we introduce TinySDP, the first semidefinite programming solver designed for embedded systems, enabling real-time model-predictive control (MPC) on microcontrollers for problems with nonconvex obstacle constraints. Our approach integrates positive-semidefinite cone projections into a cached-Riccati-based ADMM solver, leveraging computational structure for embedded tractability. We pair this solver with an a posteriori rank-1 certificate that converts relaxed solutions into explicit geometric guarantees at each timestep. On challenging benchmarks, e.g., cul-de-sac and dynamic obstacle avoidance scenarios that induce failures in local methods, TinySDP achieves collision-free navigation with up to 73% shorter paths than state-of-the-art baselines. We validate our approach on a Crazyflie quadrotor, demonstrating that semidefinite constraints can be enforced at real-time rates for agile embedded robotics.

ai.tldr: 提出首个面向嵌入式系统的半定规划求解器TinySDP，实现微控制器上含非凸障碍约束的实时模型预测控制。
ai.motivation: 现有半定规划求解器计算成本过高，无法在资源受限的嵌入式系统上实时运行，限制了其在敏捷机器人控制中的应用。
ai.method: 将正半定锥投影集成到基于缓存Riccati的ADMM求解器中，并配以事后秩1证书将松弛解转化为几何保证。
ai.result: 在挑战性基准测试中（如死胡同和动态避障场景），TinySDP实现无碰撞导航，路径长度比最先进基线缩短高达73%，并在Crazyflie四旋翼上验证了实时性。
ai.help_to_user: 为嵌入式机器人提供一种能在微控制器上实时求解半定规划的方法，从而在资源受限平台上实现安全敏捷的运动规划。

idea_spark.idea: 将半定规划求解器与缓存Riccati ADMM结合，并利用事后秩1证书提供几何保证，实现嵌入式实时优化。
idea_spark.risk: 秩1证书可能在某些极端场景下失效，导致松弛解无法恢复可行几何约束；求解器对问题规模敏感，大规模问题可能超出嵌入式内存。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受实时MPC中Riccati递归高效性的启发，将其与ADMM结合以处理半定锥约束，同时借鉴事后验证思想保证解的质量。

en.tldr: Proposes TinySDP, the first semidefinite programming solver for embedded systems, enabling real-time model-predictive control with nonconvex obstacle constraints on microcontrollers.
en.motivation: Existing SDP solvers are too computationally expensive for real-time control on resource-constrained embedded systems, limiting their use in agile robotics.
en.method: Integrates positive-semidefinite cone projections into a cached-Riccati-based ADMM solver, paired with an a posteriori rank-1 certificate to convert relaxed solutions into geometric guarantees.
en.result: On challenging benchmarks (e.g., cul-de-sac and dynamic obstacle avoidance), TinySDP achieves collision-free navigation with up to 73% shorter paths than state-of-the-art baselines, validated on a Crazyflie quadrotor.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method for real-time semidefinite programming on embedded systems, enabling safe and agile motion planning on resource-constrained platforms.

idea_spark.idea: Combines cached-Riccati ADMM with a posteriori rank-1 certificates to achieve real-time embedded SDP with geometric guarantees.
idea_spark.risk: The rank-1 certificate may fail in extreme scenarios, preventing recovery of feasible geometric constraints; solver scalability is limited by embedded memory for large problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the efficiency of Riccati recursions in real-time MPC, combined with ADMM for handling semidefinite cone constraints, and post-hoc verification for solution quality.

papers.title: Towards Accurate Single Panoramic 3D Detection: A Semantic Gaussian Centric Approach
papers.summary: Three-dimensional object detection in panoramic imagery is crucial for comprehensive scene understanding, yet accurately mapping 2D features to 3D remains a significant challenge. Prevailing methods often project 2D features onto discrete 3D grids, which break geometric continuity and limit representation efficiency. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes PanoGSDet, a monocular panoramic 3D detection framework built upon continuous semantic 3D Gaussian representations. The proposed framework comprises a panoramic depth estimation component and a semantic Gaussian component. The panoramic depth estimation component extracts the equirectangular semantic and depth features from the monocular panorama input. The semantic Gaussian component includes a semantic Gaussian lifting module that projects spherical features into 3D semantic Gaussians, a semantic Gaussian optimization module that refines these semantic Gaussians, and a Gaussian guided prediction head that generates 3D bounding boxes from optimized Gaussian representations. Extensive experiments on the Structured3D dataset demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing methods.

ai.tldr: 提出基于连续语义3D高斯的单目全景3D检测框架PanoGSDet，在Structured3D数据集上显著优于现有方法。
ai.motivation: 现有方法将2D特征投影到离散3D网格，破坏几何连续性且表示效率低。
ai.method: 框架包括全景深度估计组件和语义高斯组件：深度估计提取球面语义与深度特征；语义高斯组件包含提升模块、优化模块和引导预测头。
ai.result: 在Structured3D数据集上大幅超越现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种利用连续高斯表示实现高精度全景3D检测的技术思路。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将语义高斯与可变形注意力结合，自适应调整高斯参数以处理复杂场景。
idea_spark.risk: 高斯表示的计算开销可能较大，需优化实时性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 连续表示优于离散网格，启发在3D检测中采用更多连续几何基元。

zh.tldr: 提出基于连续语义3D高斯的单目全景3D检测框架PanoGSDet，在Structured3D数据集上显著优于现有方法。

en.tldr: Proposes PanoGSDet, a monocular panoramic 3D detection framework based on continuous semantic 3D Gaussians, significantly outperforming existing methods on Structured3D.
en.motivation: Existing methods project 2D features onto discrete 3D grids, breaking geometric continuity and limiting representation efficiency.
en.method: The framework includes a panoramic depth estimation component and a semantic Gaussian component: depth estimation extracts equirectangular semantic and depth features; the semantic Gaussian component comprises a lifting module, an optimization module, and a Gaussian-guided prediction head.
en.result: Significantly outperforms existing methods on the Structured3D dataset.
en.help_to_user: Provides a technical approach for high-accuracy panoramic 3D detection using continuous Gaussian representations.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining semantic Gaussians with deformable attention to adaptively adjust Gaussian parameters for complex scenes.
idea_spark.risk: Gaussian representations may incur high computational cost, requiring optimization for real-time performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Continuous representations outperform discrete grids, inspiring the use of more continuous geometric primitives in 3D detection.

papers.title: The Evaluation Trap: Benchmark Design as Theoretical Commitment
papers.summary: Every AI benchmark operationalizes theoretical assumptions about the capability it claims to assess. When assumptions function as unexamined commitments, benchmarks stabilize the dominant paradigm by narrowing what counts as progress. Over time, narrow evaluation reorganizes capability concepts: architectures and definitions are selected for benchmark legibility until evaluation ceases to track an independent object and instead produces a version of the target defined by its own operational assumptions. The result is a trap: evaluation frameworks treat self-reinforcing assessments as valid, both creating and obscuring structural limits on what the current paradigm can accomplish. We introduce Epistematics, a methodology for deriving evaluation criteria directly from technical capability claims and auditing whether proposed benchmarks can discriminate the claimed capability from proxy behaviors. The contribution is meta-evaluative: an audit procedure, a failure mode taxonomy, and benchmark-design criteria for evaluating capability-evaluation coherence. We demonstrate the procedure through a worked audit of Dupoux et al. (2026), a proposal that revises the dominant paradigm's theoretical assumptions at the architectural level while reproducing them in its evaluation criteria, thereby entrenching the constraint it seeks to overcome in a form the evaluation cannot detect.

ai.tldr: 每个AI基准测试都隐含理论假设，当这些假设未被审视时，基准会固化主导范式，使评估脱离真实能力，形成自我强化的陷阱。本文提出Epistematics方法论，用于审计评估标准与能力主张的一致性。
ai.motivation: 现有基准测试常将理论假设视为理所当然，导致评估结果自我强化，掩盖了范式内的结构性局限。
ai.method: 提出Epistematics方法论，包括审计程序、失败模式分类法和基准设计标准，用于评估能力-评估一致性。
ai.result: 通过对Dupoux等人(2026)的审计，展示了该方法如何揭示评估标准中隐含的理论承诺，即使提案在架构层面修正假设，评估标准仍可能固化原有约束。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员识别和避免基准设计中的理论偏见，确保评估真正反映目标能力而非代理行为。

idea_spark.idea: 开发自动化工具，在基准发布前自动检测其理论假设与能力主张的一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖审计可能抑制创新基准的探索，需平衡严格性与灵活性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴科学哲学中的范式检验思想，将基准视为理论承诺的载体而非中立工具。

idea_spark.risk: 过度依赖审计可能抑制创新基准的探索，需平衡严格性与灵活性。

en.tldr: Every AI benchmark operationalizes theoretical assumptions; when unexamined, they stabilize dominant paradigms and create self-reinforcing traps. This paper introduces Epistematics, a methodology to audit evaluation criteria against capability claims.
en.motivation: Benchmarks often embed unexamined theoretical commitments, leading to self-reinforcing assessments that obscure structural limitations of the current paradigm.
en.method: Proposes Epistematics, including an audit procedure, a failure mode taxonomy, and benchmark-design criteria for evaluating capability-evaluation coherence.
en.result: A worked audit of Dupoux et al. (2026) demonstrates how the method reveals hidden theoretical commitments in evaluation criteria, even when the proposal revises assumptions at the architectural level.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers identify and avoid theoretical biases in benchmark design, ensuring evaluations track genuine capabilities rather than proxy behaviors.

idea_spark.idea: Develop automated tools to detect theoretical assumption-capability claim mismatches before benchmark deployment.
idea_spark.risk: Over-reliance on auditing may stifle innovative benchmarks; balance between rigor and flexibility is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws from philosophy of science's paradigm testing, viewing benchmarks as carriers of theoretical commitments rather than neutral tools.

papers.title: Graphs of Research: Citation Evolution Graphs as Supervision for Research Idea Generation
papers.summary: Research idea generation is the innovation-driving step of automated scientific research. Recently, large language models (LLMs) have shown potential for automating idea generation at scale. However, existing methods mainly condition LLMs on eliciting idea generation through static retrieval of relevant literature or complex prompt engineering, without discarding the structural relations among references. We propose Graphs of Research (GoR), a supervised fine-tuning method that extracts a 2-hop reference neighborhood for each seed paper, derives the relations among those references from citation position, frequency, predecessor links, and publication time, and organizes them into a paper-evolution directed acyclic graph (DAG). We construct an automated extraction pipeline that draws data from five major ML/NLP venues, comprising 498/50/50 train/validation/test seed papers and approximately 7,600 cited references. Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M is fine-tuned on a structured-text prompt that includes the citation graph, edge signals, reference information, and task definition to predict the idea for the seed paper. Across head-to-head LLM-judge tournaments against gpt-4o-driven baselines, GoR-SFT achieves SOTA, demonstrating the effectiveness of citation-evolution graphs as supervision signal for LLM-based idea generation. We hope that this reduces the barrier for citation evolution graphs as a supervision, accelerating automated scientific innovation.

ai.tldr: 提出 Graphs of Research (GoR) 方法，利用引文演化有向无环图作为监督信号，微调大语言模型以生成研究想法，在 ML/NLP 领域取得最优效果。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖静态文献检索或复杂提示工程，忽略了参考文献之间的结构关系。
ai.method: 为每篇种子论文提取 2 跳引用邻域，根据引用位置、频率、前驱链接和发表时间推导关系，构建论文演化 DAG，并微调 Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M。
ai.result: 在与 gpt-4o 驱动的基线对比中，GoR-SFT 在 LLM 裁判锦标赛中达到最优。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户自动生成有结构依据的研究想法，降低引文演化图的使用门槛。

idea_spark.idea: 将引文演化图与多模态数据（如图表、代码）结合，进一步提升想法质量。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖高质量引文数据，且 DAG 构建可能引入噪声。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用图结构监督信号替代纯文本检索，为 LLM 提供更丰富的上下文。

en.tldr: Proposes Graphs of Research (GoR), a supervised fine-tuning method that uses citation evolution DAGs as supervision for LLM-based research idea generation, achieving SOTA on ML/NLP benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on static retrieval or complex prompts, ignoring structural relations among references.
en.method: Extracts 2-hop reference neighborhoods for each seed paper, derives relations from citation position, frequency, predecessor links, and publication time, builds a paper-evolution DAG, and fine-tunes Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-1M.
en.result: GoR-SFT achieves SOTA in head-to-head LLM-judge tournaments against gpt-4o-driven baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate structurally grounded research ideas and lowers the barrier for using citation evolution graphs.

idea_spark.idea: Combine citation evolution graphs with multimodal data (e.g., figures, code) to further improve idea quality.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on high-quality citation data; DAG construction may introduce noise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using graph-structured supervision instead of plain text retrieval provides richer context for LLMs.

papers.title: Veritas: A Semantically Grounded Agentic Framework for Memory Corruption Vulnerability Detection in Binaries
papers.summary: Detecting memory corruption vulnerabilities in stripped binaries requires recovering object semantics, interprocedural propagation, and feasible triggers from low-level, lossy representations. Recent LLM-based approaches improve code understanding, but reliable detection still requires grounding in memory-relevant semantics and runtime feasibility evidence. We present Veritas, a semantically grounded framework for binary memory corruption vulnerability detection. Veritas combines a static slicer over RetDec-lifted LLVM IR, a dual-view LLM detector that reasons step by step over grounded flows using decompiled C and selective LLVM IR, and a multi-agent validator that checks hypotheses against debugger-visible artifacts and runtime evidence. The slicer reconstructs value-flow relations from LLVM-IR facts, including def-use, calls, returns, globals, and pointer operations, and emits compact witness-backed flow objects. The detector uses these artifacts to reason about control flow, bounds, and object correspondence without rediscovering whole-binary propagation. The validator confirms or rejects candidates through guided debugging, breakpoint inspection, and memory-checking oracles. We implement Veritas as a modular pipeline and evaluate it on a curated benchmark of real-world binary vulnerability cases. Veritas achieves 90\% recall. For false-positive assessment, we exhaustively validate and manually verify 623 detector candidates and audit additional candidates from larger cases. The exhaustive subset produces no false positives, while the additional audit identifies two confirmed false positives. In a real-world application, Veritas discovered a previously unknown Apple vulnerability that was confirmed and assigned a CVE. These results support semantic grounding as an operational design principle for practical binary vulnerability detection.

ai.tldr: 提出Veritas框架，结合静态切片、双视角LLM检测器和多智能体验证器，在剥离二进制中检测内存破坏漏洞，达到90%召回率并发现真实CVE。
ai.motivation: 现有方法难以从低层、有损的二进制表示中恢复对象语义、过程间传播和可行触发条件，导致内存破坏漏洞检测不可靠。
ai.method: 使用RetDec提升的LLVM IR进行静态值流切片，生成紧凑的见证支持流对象；双视角LLM检测器基于反编译C和选择性LLVM IR逐步推理；多智能体验证器通过调试器可见工件和运行时证据确认或拒绝候选漏洞。
ai.result: 在真实世界二进制漏洞基准上达到90%召回率；623个候选漏洞的穷举验证无假阳性，额外审计发现两个确认假阳性；发现一个之前未知的Apple漏洞并获得CVE。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助安全研究人员在无源码的二进制程序中高效、可靠地发现内存破坏漏洞，减少误报并提高自动化程度。

idea_spark.idea: 将LLM的语义理解与静态分析和动态验证相结合，形成闭环检测流程。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖RetDec提升的LLVM IR质量，可能对高度混淆或自定义编译的二进制效果有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 多智能体协作验证的思路可启发其他安全分析工具，结合符号执行或模糊测试进一步降低假阳性。

zh.motivation: 现有方法难以从低层、有损的二进制表示中恢复对象语义、过程间传播和可行触发条件，导致内存破坏漏洞检测不可靠。

idea_spark.risk: 依赖RetDec提升的LLVM IR质量，可能对高度混淆或自定义编译的二进制效果有限。

en.tldr: Veritas combines static slicing, dual-view LLM detection, and multi-agent validation to detect memory corruption vulnerabilities in stripped binaries, achieving 90% recall and discovering a real CVE.
en.motivation: Existing methods struggle to recover object semantics, interprocedural propagation, and feasible triggers from low-level lossy binary representations, making reliable detection difficult.
en.method: A static slicer over RetDec-lifted LLVM IR produces compact witness-backed flow objects; a dual-view LLM detector reasons step by step using decompiled C and selective LLVM IR; a multi-agent validator checks hypotheses against debugger-visible artifacts and runtime evidence.
en.result: 90% recall on a real-world binary vulnerability benchmark; exhaustive validation of 623 candidates yields zero false positives, with two confirmed false positives in additional audit; discovered a previously unknown Apple vulnerability assigned a CVE.
en.help_to_user: Enables security researchers to efficiently and reliably find memory corruption vulnerabilities in stripped binaries without source code, reducing false positives and increasing automation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine LLM semantic understanding with static analysis and dynamic validation to form a closed-loop detection pipeline.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on RetDec-lifted LLVM IR quality may limit effectiveness on heavily obfuscated or custom-compiled binaries.
idea_spark.inspiration: The multi-agent collaborative validation idea can inspire other security analysis tools, potentially integrating symbolic execution or fuzzing to further reduce false positives.

papers.title: BiFedKD: Bidirectional Federated Knowledge Distillation Framework for Non-IID and Long-Tailed ECG Monitoring
papers.summary: Electrocardiogram (ECG) monitoring in Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) networks is constrained by strict data-sharing regulations and privacy concerns. Federated learning (FL) enables collaborative learning by keeping raw ECG data on devices, but frequent transmissions of high-dimensional model updates incur heavy per-round traffic over bandwidth-limited links. To alleviate this bottleneck, federated distillation (FD) replaces parameter exchange with logit-based knowledge transfer. However, the performance of FD often degrades under the non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID) and long-tailed label distributions in ECG deployments. To address these challenges, we propose a bidirectional federated knowledge distillation (BiFedKD) framework that employs an aggregation-by-distillation pipeline with temperature scaling to produce a stable global distillation signal for cross-client alignment. Experiments on the MIT-BIH Arrhythmia dataset show that BiFedKD improves accuracy and Macro-F1 over the baseline by $3.52\%$ and $9.93\%$, respectively. Moreover, to reach the same Macro-F1, BiFedKD reduces communication overhead by $40\%$ and computation cost by $71.7\%$ compared with the baseline.

ai.tldr: 提出BiFedKD框架，通过双向联邦知识蒸馏和温度缩放，解决非独立同分布和长尾标签分布下的心电图监测问题，在MIT-BIH数据集上准确率提升3.52%，Macro-F1提升9.93%，通信开销降低40%，计算成本降低71.7%。
ai.motivation: 联邦蒸馏在非独立同分布和长尾标签分布的心电图部署中性能下降，现有方法难以兼顾隐私、通信效率和模型精度。
ai.method: 采用聚合-蒸馏流水线，结合温度缩放生成稳定的全局蒸馏信号，实现跨客户端双向对齐。
ai.result: 在MIT-BIH心律失常数据集上，准确率提升3.52%，Macro-F1提升9.93%；达到相同Macro-F1时，通信开销降低40%，计算成本降低71.7%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在IoMT网络中高效、隐私保护地进行心电图监测，并应对数据分布不均和长尾问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将聚合-蒸馏流水线与自适应温度缩放结合，动态调整蒸馏信号强度以适应不同客户端的数据分布。
idea_spark.risk: 温度缩放参数选择不当可能导致蒸馏信号过强或过弱，影响收敛稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从联邦蒸馏的通信优势出发，利用双向对齐和温度控制提升非独立同分布场景下的模型泛化能力。

zh.tldr: 提出BiFedKD框架，通过双向联邦知识蒸馏和温度缩放，解决非独立同分布和长尾标签分布下的心电图监测问题，在MIT-BIH数据集上准确率提升3.52%，Macro-F1提升9.93%，通信开销降低40%，计算成本降低71.7%。

idea_spark.idea: 将聚合-蒸馏流水线与自适应温度缩放结合，动态调整蒸馏信号强度以适应不同客户端的数据分布。
idea_spark.risk: 温度缩放参数选择不当可能导致蒸馏信号过强或过弱，影响收敛稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从联邦蒸馏的通信优势出发，利用双向对齐和温度控制提升非独立同分布场景下的模型泛化能力。

en.tldr: Proposes BiFedKD, a bidirectional federated knowledge distillation framework with temperature scaling, addressing non-IID and long-tailed label distributions in ECG monitoring. On MIT-BIH dataset, accuracy improves by 3.52%, Macro-F1 by 9.93%, communication overhead reduces by 40%, and computation cost by 71.7%.
en.motivation: Federated distillation degrades under non-IID and long-tailed label distributions in ECG deployments, and existing methods struggle to balance privacy, communication efficiency, and model accuracy.
en.method: Employs an aggregation-by-distillation pipeline with temperature scaling to produce a stable global distillation signal for cross-client bidirectional alignment.
en.result: On MIT-BIH Arrhythmia dataset, accuracy improves by 3.52% and Macro-F1 by 9.93%; to reach the same Macro-F1, communication overhead reduces by 40% and computation cost by 71.7%.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to perform efficient and privacy-preserving ECG monitoring in IoMT networks while handling non-IID and long-tailed data distributions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine aggregation-by-distillation pipeline with adaptive temperature scaling to dynamically adjust distillation signal strength according to client data distributions.
idea_spark.risk: Improper temperature scaling parameters may cause overly strong or weak distillation signals, affecting convergence stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging the communication advantage of federated distillation, use bidirectional alignment and temperature control to improve model generalization under non-IID conditions.

papers.title: Agentic Recommender System with Hierarchical Belief-State Memory
papers.summary: Memory-augmented LLM agents have advanced personalized recommendation, yet existing approaches universally adopt flat memory representations that conflate ephemeral signals with stable preferences, and none provides a complete lifecycle governing how memory should evolve. We propose MARS (Memory-Augmented Agentic Recommender System), a framework that treats recommendation as a partially observable problem and maintains a structured belief state that progressively abstracts noisy behavioral observations into a compact estimate of user preferences. MARS organizes this belief state into three tiers: event memory buffers raw signals, preference memory maintains fine-grained mutable chunks with explicit strength and evidence tracking, and profile memory distills all preferences into a coherent natural language narrative. A complete lifecycle of six operations -- extraction, reinforcement, weakening, consolidation, forgetting, and resynthesis -- is adaptively scheduled by an LLM-based planner rather than fixed-interval heuristics. Experiments on four InstructRec benchmark domains show that \ours achieves state-of-the-art performance with average improvements of 26.4% in HR@1 and 10.3% in NDCG@10 over the strongest baselines with further gains from agentic scheduling in evolving settings.

ai.tldr: 提出MARS框架，将推荐视为部分可观测问题，通过三层信念状态记忆（事件、偏好、画像）和LLM驱动的六种操作生命周期，实现用户偏好的渐进抽象与动态演化。
ai.motivation: 现有记忆增强LLM代理采用扁平记忆表示，混淆瞬时信号与稳定偏好，且缺乏完整的记忆演化生命周期。
ai.method: 构建三层信念状态：事件记忆缓冲原始信号，偏好记忆维护细粒度可变块（含强度和证据追踪），画像记忆将偏好蒸馏为自然语言叙事；由LLM规划器自适应调度提取、强化、弱化、合并、遗忘、再合成六种操作。
ai.result: 在四个InstructRec基准域上，HR@1平均提升26.4%，NDCG@10平均提升10.3%，在动态场景下代理调度带来额外增益。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过结构化记忆和智能调度提升推荐系统的个性化与适应性。

idea_spark.idea: 将偏好记忆中的强度与证据追踪机制应用于可解释推荐，自动生成用户偏好变化的自然语言解释。
idea_spark.risk: LLM规划器的调度决策可能引入不可预测的延迟或计算开销，需评估实时场景下的效率。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）启发，将推荐建模为信念状态更新问题，为记忆管理提供了理论框架。

zh.tldr: 提出MARS框架，将推荐视为部分可观测问题，通过三层信念状态记忆（事件、偏好、画像）和LLM驱动的六种操作生命周期，实现用户偏好的渐进抽象与动态演化。
zh.motivation: 现有记忆增强LLM代理采用扁平记忆表示，混淆瞬时信号与稳定偏好，且缺乏完整的记忆演化生命周期。
